text:
I bought the Cool Kids Portable Stroller when my son was just 4 months old for a cruise, and I’m still using it today he’s now 3! It’s been an absolute game-changer. Lightweight, easy to fold, easy assembly, and compact enough to fit in tight spaces, including airplane overhead bins. Get a dark color black was good to avoid spills because you will take it everywhere. I’ve taken it on cruises, flights, to the park, grocery store, you name it. It’s easy to clean and doesn’t stay dirty, which is a huge plus for busy parents.

Even now at age 3, if I need to pull it out for my son, it still fits him comfortably. It’s durable, affordable, and never gets in the way. I honestly love this stroller and highly recommend it for parents who want something that lasts and is easy to travel with.

These are our favorite noise canceling headphones! We’ve bought two pair. One for the hunting camp and one for our house. The first time we put them to the test, he was 3.5 months old in a hunting blind and a rifle was fired. He slept through it completely. Didn’t even flinch. Tonight we went to the races and he was fine! He has always loved watching them on tv, but he was so happy in person tonight! He’s 5 months old and took his bottle and then fell asleep and stayed asleep for the second half of the race. These are the absolute best. 10/10 recommend.

This milk and food warmer is perfect for heating up dinners for my baby.
It means that I get a good potion size warmed and it is so easy to use.
Also easy to clean which is a massive bonus.
Tommee Tippee is such a trusted brand and this product does not disappoint.
5 stars and highly recommended.
This would actually make a lovely and very thoughtful gift for an expectant family.

LIKES 👍:
-Variety of functions: defrosting, heating, sanitizing
-Robust and solid materials
-Instructions in English
-Many customizations for various needs, e.g.: choose the type of bottle material
-Portability, the possibility of taking it on vacation does not clutter
- Easy to use, you learn immediately

TO IMPROVE 👉 :
-I don't like touch because it is enough to have a little dirty hands that it is not reactive

I WOULD RECOMMEND IT: Absolutely, excellent product, which can be useful to all parents

Full Review:
I bought this bottle warmer from Momcozy and I was extremely satisfied with how it works. It was a lifesaver for sleepless nights with my baby. The device is very easy to use: simply insert the bottle or bottle into the compartment provided, select the desired temperature and press the start button. In a few minutes, the milk or liquid is ready to be given to the baby.
One of the features I appreciate most is the precise temperature control. I can set the exact temperature I want, which is important to ensure that the food or milk is always at the right temperature for my little one. In addition, the device has a defrost function which was helpful when I had to thaw breast milk in a hurry.
Safety is a priority when it comes to baby products, and I'm happy to say that this bottle warmer has overheating protection and automatically shuts off once the set temperature is reached. This gave me a lot of peace of mind.
The design is compact and takes up little space on my desk or night table, which is very convenient. In addition, it is easy to clean due to its design without complex parts.
This bottle warmer has been a valuable investment for me and my family. It facilitates the preparation of food for my baby in a safe and efficient way, and has become an indispensable element in our daily routine. I highly recommend it to all parents.

I chose this portable bottle warmer as a birth gift to give to a friend who is going to give birth soon and I must say that it is the perfect gift and that pleases a lot!
What I like about this bottle warmer is its exemplary design with excellent autonomy that allows many quick heating before thinking about recharging it. So you can go away for the weekend with peace of mind and warm up the milk on the way to the holidays without having to stop on the road! In addition, the charging is fast and that's a very good point.
I find that this device is very efficient, whether it is for heating water or heating milk. It is waterproof and completely nomadic. It is an essential accessory for modern dads and moms, who can move around for a whole day with baby and stay free using it as they want without the need to find an electrical outlet.
I appreciate the safety of the device which is confined to hot temperatures but which are not burning which is safer for baby.
I therefore highly recommend this portable bottle warmer to all parents, it is an excellent product from Momcozy which as often offers high quality products, respectful for the child and very useful for modern parents! it is also an excellent gift idea for a gift at a birth, or for Christmas for example.

I received this bottle warmer for free through the Amazon Vine program, and after several uses, I'm very happy with its performance and practicality. This model is particularly versatile, with several heating modes: fast, keep warm, defrost and steam sterilization. The digital display is clear and intuitive, making it easy to adjust the temperature and time as needed. The heating is fast and even, which prevents over-hot spots in the milk. Another strong point is its ability to accommodate different types of bottles and small jars, which makes it adaptable to all brands. In addition, the sterilization function is a real plus to guarantee perfect hygiene. Finally, the compact and modern design fits well in a kitchen without taking up too much space. Easy to clean and use, this bottle warmer is a great choice for parents looking for convenience and efficiency. I recommend it without hesitation!

Very useful helper for at home and on the go. Gives you a good feeling on the go and saves time when preparing food at home. Unfortunately, it doesn't quite keep what it promises. The 37 degrees for the breast milk function are not reached. With the thermometer I get 34-35 degrees. However, I help myself with the water warmer function and regulate 43 degrees here to get to 37-38 degrees. Also, the promised 3 or 5 minutes are not kept, usually takes a little longer. Therefore, a star deduction.

Schieckes Design, However, you feel well prepared when the little ones are hungry. Thanks to the heat function, you can already preheat and are immediately ready to feed - almost as if you were breastfeeding. Therefore, definitely recommended!

Perfect, I can't do without it. This bottle warmer is a lifesaver. Transportable everywhere, I can quickly offer a bottle to baby all day long, whether at the park or at home in my bed at night. You have to indicate 40 degrees to be close to 37 degrees and the heating time can be a little long when baby cries but the keep warm function allows you to have water at the right temperature immediately. For my part, I start the bottle warmer while latching on and the water is perfect when you have to switch to the bottle. It is very easy to carry and can also be easily charged with a usb port.

Bottle warmer tested with a bottle of the same brand (AVENT, Natural anti-colic valve range that can be seen in the photos). Very satisfying. Very easy to use: plug in the bottle warmer, put the bottle in it, fill the tray around the bottle with water, then select the capacity of the bottle in ml with the wheel and finally press the start button. Then all you have to do is wait: the light gauge around the start button lights up as the warm-up progresses. And when it's ready, the bottle is kept at the right temperature until the device is switched off (double boiler principle, it soaks in hot water). The reheating time observed is a little longer than the one displayed on the packaging (rather 5-6 min than 3 min advertised for 200ml), but the result is very satisfactory: perfect temperature around 22 degrees, and above all VERY HOMOGENEOUS temperature of the liquid (without the bottle being hot), much better than in the microwave... And keeping warm is really very practical. It's more secondary but also to note: the design of the bottle warmer is aesthetic and underneath the cable can be stored if it is a little too long for the place where you install it, it's practical.

I have 3 children and this bottle is now used by the 3rd child. From the beginning it was a huge help, especially for on the road and at night.The annoying dragging of thermos flasks and mixing / looking for the right temperature is thus obsolete! The bottle heats up, in less than 5 minutes and actually keeps the temperature all night (in our case from about 10 p.m. to 8 a.m.). But then the charging takes several hours... which is why I ordered a 2nd bottle for on the go. Heating up several times also works great, because the thermos function keeps the water warm for a relatively long time anyway - even if the bottle is switched off again. One of my bottles broke after half a year and I didn't have the bill anymore. Nevertheless, Babymoov replaced it without any problems! In case you are wondering why the bottle doesn't charge properly... it only likes the included cable! The one from the cell phone, etc. doesn't work or only works very slowly. A tip: register for the lifetime warranty after purchase, then nothing can go 🙂 wrong

I ordered the Tommee Tippee LetsGo Portable Bottle Warmer a few weeks ago to keep my baby's meals warm on the go. Overall, I'm happy with the product and it serves its purpose, but there are a few minor weaknesses.Pros:The handling of the bottle warmer is really simple and straightforward. You turn it on, put the bottle in it and wait until the desired temperature is reached. The device is lightweight and travel-friendly, so you can easily store it in your diaper bag. The USB charging function is a great advantage and allows you to charge the bottle warmer on the go without the need for an extra adapter. Need for improvement:The heating time varies depending on the size of the bottle and the initial temperature of the food. So it can sometimes take a little longer for the food to warm. Here I would like to see a more precise temperature display in order to be able to better estimate when the bottle is ready. The heat is not always evenly distributed. It is therefore advisable to shake the bottle in between to distribute the heat evenly. Overall, I give the Tommee Tippee LetsGo Portable Bottle Warmer 4 stars. The device serves its purpose, is lightweight and practical for on the go. However, there are still a few minor weaknesses that could be improved in future versions. Nevertheless, I can recommend the product, especially for parents who travel a lot.

Stars: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️out of 5🔹Prologue:🔹For my nightly feeding of my little princess I originally always had a heat pad, which has now given up the ghost for the 2nd time after a short time. In search of alternatives, I stumbled across this and ordered directly. So here is my review as an overview for all those who need quick information, but don't want to read a long review. A detailed review is below:Pros: ✅ super processed✅ battery charging - so cordless on the go✅ Temperature adjustable✅ suitable for breast milk and also follow-on milk✅ signals, when fully heated✅ practically for many bottles through attachmentsCons: ❌ can leak and leak if you don't assemble neatly and perfectly after cleaningStill time? Very nice, because now it gets more detailed: 🔹 The product test for the description: 🔹As always, my delivery arrived very quickly and well packaged. There are no unpleasant things when unpacking Gerüche.Es everything you need for commissioning is included. In addition, replacement seals and attachments for different bottle models are supplied, which really fit the respective supplier. Personally, I think that's very good. The integrated battery is charged with the included USB cable and then lasts quite a long time, so you can easily charge a few bottles with it. The bottle is then simply screwed onto the device with the attachment, turns it on, sets the desired temperature and waits until the device beeps. For hygienic reasons, I only heat the water and pour the powder into it for drinking only after the temperature has been reached, so the device stays clean longer and you don't have the problem that the milk sours and can spoil. The bottle warmer can be easily taken with you in the diaper bag, for example. It doesn't take up much space. However, the warming is not going too fast. For 150 ml you have to plan about 8 minutes. So maybe don't wait until the baby is already crying out of sheer hunger, but start warming up a little earlier. A little tip: Unfortunately, it happened to me that I had not inserted the seal properly after cleaning, which gave me a wet bag. ⭐ The conclusion: ⭐With a price of currently 69.99 €, the price is justified in my eyes and I think it's a shame not to have discovered it earlier. I am really very satisfied with this alternative and there is a good ⭐⭐⭐️⭐ and also a recommendation from me for this price-performance.I really hope my review was helpful for you and I was able to support you in your decision.~ Review by L.-L. ~

Portable rechargeable bottle warmer green color. With capacity 340ml. The bottle is made of durable stainless steel. It is very convenient and useful, it can heat water and milk. The heating temperature is up to 50°. I tested the heating speed, it took 15 minutes to heat the water. In fact, it's a good practical idea: it can be placed in baby's bag or in the baby's room at night to warm up milk. Easy to clean and transport. I liked it and recommend it, but I find its price very high.

This MOMCOZY portable bottle warmer is really very easy to use, the battery lasts a really long time and the huge advantage is that it is cordless and therefore mobile and therefore perfect for on the go and is actually always used at home, e.g. great for holidays etc 🍼
I can go outside without having to worry about when my baby is hungry and how to heat his milk🍼
The product quality is excellent 🍼
At first I found the price high but after using it I can say that it is really the top, I recommend it to my dear friend and also will buy it now 🍼
I hope my review will be useful to you!! 🍼
The product is very well packaged with care and impeccable ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ delivery

For me, the big strong point of this bottle warmer is its very fast heating and especially its silent operation! The temperature is backlit and written in large letters. The charge lasts about an hour for 4/5 cycles, which is not bad at all. Lightweight, compact, I can take it anywhere. It is very easy to use, it is an excellent product. I have a reservation about its design. The color is great but the small spots on the top and bottom do not honor it and are useless in my opinion

Bottle warmer that allows us to do many more things than the simple warmer that is only good for heating the bottle.

Among its advantages I would highlight that once we have selected the correct mode, the heater is very fast.  Of course, it takes a bit to get the hang of it. If I had to say something bad it would be this, that the menu is not as intuitive as I would have liked it to be.

The defrost mode works well, although I have to say that it is a bit slower than if we use the microwave. On the other hand, this type of thawing is much better because it destroys less of the milk protein, something that is for the benefit of our little one.

The steam cooking mode does not work badly at all, but we are not using it much at home because we have a food processor that does the same function in a more optimal way, especially due to quantities since we usually cook large quantities and then freeze.

The heater allows us to choose between the materials of the bottle that we put inside. This is an advantage because in this way we get the food ready at its perfect temperature. On the other hand, it complicates the configuration a bit every time we use it.

The size is very well achieved since it does not take up much space, something ideal in kitchens and small ones, but instead it has a capacity large enough to accept the vast majority of baby bottles, etc.

Last but not least, it is easily assembled and disassembled, making the cleaning task easier.

📍📦The bottle warmer was delivered to your home well and safely packaged. 📦✔⏩Zack, the offspring is there and is always hungry. The idea with the bottle warmer was probably our best.It ✔⏩is easy to use and fits 2 bottles in it. So you always have warm water at the perfect temperature ready when the little one gets hungry again. This saves a lot of work and running especially at night. Just take the bottle warmer to the bed, mix the bottle with powder and you're done, all without getting up. A dream With✔⏩us it has been running continuously since then and with 200W at full power it runs here I think 100 W through. That's about 70 cents a day very roughly calculated and I think it's completely ok. It's only for a few months until they get bigger and therefore foreseeable. It's definitely worth it, I think.My ✔short conclusion:↪️The bottle warmer is easy to use, runs super quietly, looks qualitatively processed, makes food intake and preparation much easier and is our highlight in terms of time management. The price-performance ratio fits.I ✔💐✔hope I was able to send you some useful information and thank you very much for reading this far. ✔💐✔

✅THE PRODUCT >> from a qualitative point of view I would say that we are there, since this MOMCOZY bibberon warmer is pleasant both to the eye and to the touch, offering moreover in decidedly compact dimensions a complete product, able to meet the needs of the newborn in a very short time. Heating is entrusted to an efficient steam system, which has proved to be very convenient not only for heating milk, but also for sterilizing pacifiers and the like. As far as operation is concerned, everything is managed via the touch panel, through which it is possible to use the various functions present (bibberon warmer, defrosting, food heating, sterilization and temperature maintenance for 24 hours).

☑️ USER EXPERIENCE >> use is very simple, just turn on the device, select the desired function, and in a few minutes the milk will be ready to use. Moreover, the heating temperature is very close to that of breast milk, so you don't have to worry about it being too hot or too cold before using it. However, the functions, as already mentioned in the previous paragraph, are many and make the bibberon warmer useful not only for milk, but also for a whole series of other uses. Another aspect that left me pleasantly satisfied is the compact design, so as to minimize the footprint in the kitchen.

🛃 CONCLUSIONS >> the brand is known in the sector, so you approach the product already with the awareness of buying a bottle warmer of a certain technical/quality level. Unfortunately at the time of my review the product is not yet available for sale to the public, so I am not able to express evaluations on the purchase price.

I liked this milk or baby food warmer especially for its design, colors and size. The color in white with a touch of green that looks very beautiful. Then it is very modern, it is tall and has the LED screen that is only seen when it is on to the mains. The size is very good as it takes up little space, but it will be for heating containers that are rather elongated and not too wide.
It is indicated for heating breast milk, both in bibe and in a bag, to defrost or keep warm.
I liked that it has a 24-hour mode to maintain the perfect temperature for when we want to take the food and give it to the baby.
Then, take plastic or silicone to heat, this is ideal since depending on the type of material, the containers heat up in more or less time.

It has 3 modes, one to defrost, one to heat if it has been in the fridge and the container is cold and another to heat if the container was at room temperature.
In addition, depending on the ml of food you have, we can program in various quantities so that you heat more or less and take it into account.
So with all these parameters, we can get the perfect way for the food to be properly heated and not burn or cold.
To make it work, water is added with a dispenser that it has, 40ml is added if it is to heat and it is filled to the height of the food if it is to defrost. Then, it is covered with the transparent lid so that heat and temperature are not lost.
It is easy to disassemble and clean, as well as to handle.
I thought it was a good product.

This portable and cordless bottle warmer really won me over. It is very handy, has a great design and is easy to transport.  The instruction manual is simple and easy to explain, although I even find that the product is self-explanatory. At the beginning, it shows the current temperature of the liquid. During heating, the temperature just reached is always displayed. When the set temperature is reached, a short beep sounds. So you don't have to stand by. However, two minutes for warming up is also a great time, so you don't need to do anything else in between.  The timer modes and also the possibility to keep liquid warm for several hours are brilliant. The battery with 12000mAh also lasts a long time. When unpacking and also during the first use, there were no odors at all, it is really odorless, because it is made of high-quality stainless steel and no plastic is used.
I am really enthusiastic about the product and give a clear purchase recommendation.

I've already tested a few bottle warmers, but this one from Momcozy really convinced me. 👍

The handling is child's play: Simply fill in water, select the desired mode and off you go. I particularly like the gentle heating, which preserves the important nutrients in breast milk. The temperature is reached very evenly. 🌡️

The workmanship makes a high-quality impression and - what is particularly important - the device is absolutely tight. With a capacity of 500ml, it is also ideal for longer trips. The battery life is impressive and easily lasts a whole day. ⚡

A big plus is the wireless design, which offers maximum flexibility. You are not tied to sockets and can use the device anywhere. The compact size makes it the ideal travel companion. 🏃

Conclusion: A well thought-out product that keeps its promises. For parents who travel a lot, this bottle warmer is a real asset.

The device is simply worth its weight in gold. We are so enthusiastic about it that we ordered a second one for our bedroom.Since our son is not fully breastfed and we have to feed him, we bought the Grownsy bottle warmer. We use the keep warm function (24h) the most and so we have two bottles with the perfect temperature ready at all times. We then mix in the powder fresh. We once had "sour" milk when we took the keep warm function for a ready-mixed milk and kept it warm at 37 for several hours. Since then, we prefer to prepare the bottles fresh. One device is in our kitchen, the other in the bedroom on the bedside table. I put two bottles of water in at night and turn on the keep warm function. The water is heated and kept warm. When the little one wakes up, I mix in the powder from the powder scoop and don't even have to get up to feed the baby. On the bedside table there is a third bottle of cold water, which I then put in the device. This is then heated to 37 degrees. So I have 3 bottles for the night and don't have to run down. The fast heating function has also been used by us several times.I can warmly recommend this device. It makes everyday life with a baby much easier.

This bottle warmer is a well-designed product made with quality materials. It comes in a cardboard box, along with a quick guide. The cap has a safety closure and a spout. On the top, a practical rubber ring allows the bottle to be transported. The battery, charging port, and heating controls are located at the bottom. A full charge takes just over an hour. During this operation, I noticed that the base was warming up slightly. A full charge allows up to 4 heating cycles depending on the temperature. Operation is very simple: simply turn on the bottle warmer by holding down the center button for three seconds and select the desired temperature.5⭐

This product is really excellent! Because of the quality and design, there is nothing to say. The bottle warmer is easy to use and easy to carry. I have absolutely no regrets about my purchase because I can go out in peace, without worrying about heating the milk for my baby, I don't like to breastfeed in public. The bottle warmer now accompanies us on all our outings! And it allows us to go out more because there is no longer the stress of the next feeding etc. I also wanted to thank the seller who is super responsive and lovely; The product I received had a small temperature problem. I explained the problem and he kindly and directly replaced the product; I received the new one first before sending back the one with a problem. Thank you very much. So the price is a bit high but I assure you that it's worth the cost! This is one of the best baby purchases I've ever made.

… But of course also for home. But it's ideal when you're on the road or visiting somewhere. The bottle warmer can be easily taken with you in the diaper bag, for example, it does not take up much space. It fits Tommee Tippee bottles, but has adapters for other brands (e.g. Philips Avent). If a bottle does not fit at all, you could still heat it in a T.T. bottle and then decant. You don't need boiling water, just put the bottle in the device. But the heating is not too fast, for 150ml you should plan about 8 minutes. So maybe don't wait until the baby is already crying, but start warming up a little earlier. Mom usually has the feeding times quite well under control.When the temperature is reached, a beep sounds.The battery is charged with USB and lasts so long that you can charge a few bottles with it. Ideal for breast milk and follow-on milk.

I love this Bebeconfort Express electric bottle warmer which is a very efficient device designed to quickly heat up milk or baby food. Indeed the heating is fast: It heats milk or food in 2 minutes and sometimes even less, reaching an optimal temperature of 37°C, which is very practical on waking nights or urgent moments. I like the fact that it automatically stops at the end of the heating cycle, ensuring safe use and preventing overheating. Its large compartment fits most baby bottles and potties of different shapes and sizes. Its design is simple and allows for easy use. Compact and lightweight, it is convenient for on the go.

Occasional use on the go. Heated to the desired temperature in less than ten minutes, the battery life is very correct with regard to the use you make of the bottle warmer (otherwise it is possible to plug it into the car socket or a mobile battery). The sleek design makes it easy to use and maintain. The customer service is also very responsive and accommodating, a big thank you! Indeed, the glass container unfortunately broke, they offered to send me one back.

Perfect for outdoor outings, the bottle warmer accompanies us everywhere. Its battery allows several heats without recharging, a real asset for improvised outings. Practical and efficient, we recommend it without hesitation to all parents! Highlights:Fast and efficientHomogeneous heating at the chosen temperatureEasy to use and cleanCompact and elegant designPS: Customer service at the top! Super responsive and kind!

This sterilizer is very easy to use. The sterilizer itself includes a heating base, a tray for baby's dishes, and a bell that covers everything. We also have a tray on which to put the base, to heat the bottles. In practice, I don't sterilize baby's bottles, but my breast pump and the containers that are used to store the milk. This sterilizer is particularly interesting because it is completely modular. Stems can be removed and replaced. In addition, it is quite high, which allows you to fit a lot of dishes at the same time, whether it is the large bottles at the bottom, or the teats, lids, small accessories on the top hooks. To launch it, simply pour a pod of water into the base (it corresponds to 80 milliliters of water), and press the button. At the end of the sterilization, we got a beep that told us that it was over. Bottles are sterile, but moist due to condensation. You can then take the drip tray out of the sterilizer, and place it on the tray that comes with it, so that the bottles dry. I used to use a microwave sterilizer, which I thought was more practical because it was less bulky. In the end, the size at the base is equivalent, but I have the impression that the bottles are better sterilized by this device. And above all, I can put a lot more in one go, whereas before I was forced to run several cycles.

A bottle warmer is a device that is not really essential, it's true. On the other hand, when you get used to using it and find yourself without it, you realize how practical it is. In the classic bain-marie, it's not very practical and especially dangerous, you can burn yourself but the temperature control is tedious, because the heat is not homogeneous throughout the bottle. In the microwave, it is certainly the fastest. But the waves cause the milk to undergo a nutritional loss and degrade the vitamins. In addition, the milk is not evenly hot and continues to heat up a few minutes later. The bottle warmer is therefore generally a safe and practical way to warm a bottleWith it, you can also warm up solid food and defrost, whether puree or breast milk. It is compact and has little relief, no small corners that are difficult to reach, so it takes up little space and is easy to clean. It is very easy to use, you have to put a quantity of water equal to the amount of milk and press the large button. The indicator light flashes and when it stays solid it's ready. The defrost function takes a little longer, but unlike microwaves, there is no risk of overheating and the food is preserved, as is its nutritional quality. One really nice thing is that it keeps you warm. You thought baby was asking for his meal and he finally went back to sleep, his bottle is kept at temperature. Pro:- the compact, sober and refined design- the simple use- its efficiency- the cord can be stored underneathCounter- Defrosting a little long (just know)- the absence of an audible signal when the bottle or dish is ready. You can simply forget about it if you are very busy and baby doesn't cry.- its price a little highIt is suitable for all AVENT bottles, except the mini size 60 ml.Used with AVENT anti-colic bottles and it is simply perfect.

I am very disappointed with this product, since the beginning of its use it malfunctions and unfortunately too late for a possible return, it takes a lot of time to heat, see but sometimes does not heat up. It discharges at light speed and recharges very slowly. I don't recommend it, I'm looking into replacing it with something more suitable, it's a shame because its principle of use is good

I am very disappointed with this product, since the beginning of its use it malfunctions and unfortunately too late for a possible return, it takes a lot of time to heat, see but sometimes does not heat up. It discharges at light speed and recharges very slowly. I don't recommend it, I'm looking into replacing it with something more suitable, it's a shame because its principle of use is good

Sterilizer large enough to put a lot of products in it with 2 levels. The speed of sterilization, the large capacity of the tanks are great; the tanks: a small one for teats, pacifiers etc and a large one for bottles, breast pump accessories etc. The automatic mode allows you not to worry about time, it stops automatically. It is quite stylish and easy to maintain. For baby 1 I had sterilization tablets but drying was a problem. Now it dries and in addition it allows me to store bottles, jars and breast pumps for more practicality! In the end its bulkiness which put me off at the beginning is compensated for by a 3 in 1: sterilizer, dryer and storage of my bibs in which I store my breast milk before giving it. I recommend 😊I hope my comment will be useful to your decision 👍

🌿 This portable bottle warmer will really simplify your outings with baby. Whether on a walk, in a restaurant, or even in the car, it will heat the bottle quickly and wirelessly. Its 340ml capacity is perfect for heating water or breast milk if you're breastfeeding. 🔋 The USB charging is super handy, and it keeps the heat up for up to 7 hours, which is perfect for long rides. The setting is precise between 37° and 50°C and it heats 150ml in just 5 minutes. Perfect to prevent baby from getting impatient for too long. 👜 The design in sage green is pretty, it fits easily in the diaper bag. It's also easy to carry thanks to its secure cap, and the spout makes transferring the hot water into the bottle really simple. 👍 Plus, it's repairable and guaranteed for life, which reassures me about its durability. I am satisfied and I hope you will be too.

Very good bottle warmer with intuitive use. After some hesitation on which brand to choose, the very good reviews of this product convinced me. And I'm delighted with this purchase. I use it at home as well as for outings. The battery is excellent and lasts several days on a single charge for 5 to 6 bottles/day at 37 degrees. The real advantages of the product: the water heats up very quickly, the possibility of heating to + 37 degrees if necessary and the maintenance at temperature in case a setback occurs.

I bought this baby warmer to replace mine which didn't heat up fast enough for my taste (or my son's!). Indeed, the bottle heats up quickly (I have glass bottles). The only downside is that there is no measuring pod to put the exact amount of water needed to heat the bottle to the right temperature depending on the amount of water in the bottle. As a result, I have to take the bottle out earlier than planned otherwise it is hot (the bottle warmer stops automatically).
