Hyper practical and functional bottle warmer. I've been using it for 1 year and it heats bottles very well. It was very practical from the beginning when we had to get up at night several times a night. Easy to get started. You just have to read the instructions carefully at the beginning. Good value for money ideal for heating bottlesProduct content. I mainly use it to heat bottles in 5 min mode for 240 ml.The "heat the jars" option is not practical because it requires 1 hour according to the operating manual. 40 seconds in a microwave is enough. If you only want to heat bottles, this product is perfect. The device remains old because no on off button but it's fine with me because it's practical to turn it on easily in case of besoin.je highly recommend it

Sterilizer with steam nozzles. It can hold up to 6 bottles, you can also put accessories such as teats or the different elements of the breast pump. It is quick and sterilizes in 6 minutes and you can then leave the bottles on the nozzles and it then serves as a bottle drainer, thus limiting the purchase of additional accessories when you don't have much space. It automatically shuts off with a small alarm that warns when the cycle is complete. The nozzles are long and go all the way to the bottom of the bottle so that the steam diffuses throughout the bottle. There is a small pourer to pour water without getting it everywhere, it should be noted that the device is used to sterilize and not to clean bottles. Bottles will therefore need to be washed before the cycle begins. It is a good product that is very useful when you have an infant.

This is a purchase I recommend. I don't know if this portable bottle warmer will last long because I've been using it for less than a month but it's very practical, to be used with each bottle to be sure of the temperature. I have travelled with my baby and it is great to be able to prepare the bottle at the right temperature in any place or preheat the water to the right temperature while waiting for baby to be ready. The comments about the strong smell in new condition are accurate. It should be washed several times, sterilized according to the instructions and allowed to ventilate. On the other hand, I don't know if this is normal, but at the beginning, there were small black marks on the heating cell. I rubbed them with a dry cloth, it's gone, I don't know what it is, it worries me a little, I hope it's not toxic, since this cell is in contact with water (or milk). I'm waiting to see if it comes back, but I'm very careful to clean the bottle and the cell very regularly properly.

We have only been using the bottle warmer for a few days and are absolutely thrilled.
We can take it with us everywhere, it is handy and also looks good.

The warmer makes a high-quality impression, is easy to use and reliably brings the milk/water to the right temperature. The built-in night light is ingenious – enough light to find your way to the bottle at night.

The operation is simple, the design is modern and high-quality, and the safety functions such as the automatic switch-off give a good feeling. At first, the instructions were a bit brief, but after a short trial and error, everything is self-explanatory.

The workmanship is robust, the materials seem stable and durable. A really great product that I would recommend to all parents!

We ordered the Momcozy milk warmer for the first flight with our little son and can conclude that it has made our lives a lot easier and can definitely be recommended.
Before the trip, we thought a lot about how to do this on the road with the food of our little son on the road. How do we get the milk warm when we are at the airport, on the bus, on the beach or at night in the hotel room?

The battery-powered warmer from Momcozy seemed to us to be a suitable solution, which has been confirmed 100%.
The device makes a really high-quality and well-made impression. It is partly covered with soft silicone, which is why it fits very well in the hand. The lid closes tightly and can even be locked with a small button so that it does not accidentally open in the bag, which is very practical. Unfortunately, the silicone on our bottle is already discoloring a bit, probably due to the heating processes and the transport in the bag.

The warmer offers 2 levels (milk & water), whereby the "milk" level is supposed to be gentler and slower. Despite the use of milk, however, we have always used the higher level.
The desired target temperature can be set via the buttons, the display then always shows the current temperature.

Heating a portion (approx. 250ml) from room temperature to 38°C takes about 10 minutes. This is not really fast and especially at night when the child is writing on the side quite a long time.
One battery charge was enough for us for about 4-5 such large portions, which is enough for at least one day.

All in all, a really great product for on the go.
Due to the slight discoloration on the silicone and the heating power that is a bit too low for my taste, there is a star deduction.... Nevertheless, a recommendation.

My sister gives my smallest niece, always to fall asleep, warm milk. Consists of water and milk powder. Since the little ones are often with us, my sister picks up her children after work.
Here the little one is always excited and the drive by car is not very long, so it always takes a while longer than necessary for my little niece to finally sleep.

So I had the idea that it would be practical if the ritual of warm milk is already carried out on the way home and so the time until sleep is not long.

That's why I decided on this article.

The color already puts you in a good mood, as it was chosen in a very beautiful and matching tone.
The thermo mug is just under 500 ml, which is definitely enough.

The lower kit, which was permanently installed with the thermo mug, is the heater and the control.
The mug can be set in different heating functions, this is absolutely child's play and I didn't have to read any instructions for use, as the operation is very self-explanatory.

Within a very short time, the mug heats up, but remains cold on the outside and you don't have to worry that you will get burns from carrying the cup.

The battery has a long power supply, it takes quite a while for the battery to reach the end of its capacity.

What I also think is good, as a rule, when ordering electronic devices, you only get the pure charging cable sent. Here, for a positive change, is also an adapter included.

Personally, I think the price is absolutely justified.
In this respect, I am happy to give my full 5 stars and can "warmly" recommend the mug.

This bottle warmer, which I haven't yet had the opportunity to test in "car" mode (but only at home for the moment), gives me complete satisfaction: it heats up quickly and turns off by itself, as soon as the water put in it has completely evaporated. On the other hand, the indications for the amount of water to use are not necessarily very reliable: if I follow what is recommended to the letter, my little one's bottle is barely lukewarm... But, after the first tests and with practice, you end up knowing how much water to use! 😉For my part, I use it with Mam "Easy Start anti-colic" bottles, which fit in without any problem. In conclusion, it's a purchase that I don't regret at all. 👍🏼P.S. (April 2020) ⚠️ For this bottle warmer to continue to work properly, it is imperative to descale it regularly (about once a month, depending on the frequency of use) by filling it with a mixture of WHITE VINEGAR and WATER, in equal parts, and leaving it on for several hours (or even a whole night)... otherwise it really loses efficiency and doesn't heat up enough! 😬🙁

This is a solid electric bottle warmer that is very easy to use. Plus, it replaces a small oven or pot for reheating or defrosting. I have nothing but good things to say about it... ✅ It is delivered in a white cardboard box (which can be offered as is). ✅ It is made entirely of high-quality✅ plastic. There is a 24-hour keep warm function. ✅ It warms, sterilizes and thaws. ✅ Glass or plastic bottles can be used. ✅ It rises to a maximum of 100°C, especially for sterilization. ✅ The minimum temperature is 37°C (for reheating between 37 and 80°C). ✅ consumes only 200 watts (compared to 2000 watts for a hob or 1000 for a mini oven). ✅ It plugs directly into a 220-volt wall outlet. ✅ A paper manual is provided; in 12 languages. 👉 Simple and economical: descaling is done every 4 weeks with 50 cl of white vinegar for 10 minutes. In conclusion, for this very affordable price, especially of this quality and for its fast and practical aspect, I can only strongly recommend it, especially for night bottles!

I didn't know about this bottle warmer and I find it very practical; It runs on battery and allows you to heat bottles without the need for a plug next to it. It is therefore very practical when I am out shopping and it is difficult to find a socket to connect a bottle warmer. In use, this bottle warmer is also very practical. It does not take up much space and can be carried in a handbag for example; Simply aim it in place of the bottle nipple and turn the whole thing upside down. Then, he heats the contents of the bottle in about ten minutes and displays 37°C on his body once the temperature is reached. The internal battery allows you to prepare 5 to 7 bottles and then need to be recharged using any USB charger you already have.

⏩️Operation:The handling of the bottle warmer is great, as it is very simple and uncomplicated. Before using it for the first time, you should fully charge the device. A charging cable is included. Next, the enclosed bottle is filled with milk and inserted. Then all you have to do is turn on the bottle warmer, wait a few minutes and you have ready-to-drink milk for the baby.Heat ⏩️performance:The bottle warmer offers three temperatures. The selection consists of 37, 40 and 45 degrees.37 degrees would be the normal body temperature.Within 8-10 minutes, the milk is brought to the desired temperature. A small LCD display with the temperature is located on the front of the bottle warmer.The reheating works very evenly and not too quickly, otherwise important nutrients can be lost. When heating the milk, the device itself does not get warm, so you can touch it without burning yourself. In addition, the enclosed bottle offers enough volume for the child to be full. The milk is ready to drink immediately after the short warm-up phase. A great help to warm up a bottle quickly and easily.For ⏩️on the go:The bottle warmer works without a permanent power supply.For on the go, when traveling or at home, it can be used quickly. Also thanks to the small size and weight, carrying the bottle warmer is completely problem-free. It fits perfectly in a diaper bag or handbag.My 🔜conclusion:A great and quick help in warming up the bottle. The milk eye warmer is easy to clean. Value for money Very good 👍

I didn't know about this bottle warmer and I find it very practical; It runs on battery and allows you to heat bottles without the need for a plug next to it. It is therefore very practical when I am out shopping and it is difficult to find a socket to connect a bottle warmer. In use, this bottle warmer is also very practical. It does not take up much space and can be carried in a handbag for example; Simply aim it in place of the bottle nipple and turn the whole thing upside down. Then, he heats the contents of the bottle in about ten minutes and displays 37°C on his body once the temperature is reached. The internal battery allows you to prepare 5 to 7 bottles and then need to be recharged using any USB charger you already have.

The Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer is an asset to the "baby arsenal". With a capacity of 500ml, it's great for most standard baby bottles and is a real help on the go.

What impressed me most about this bottle warmer is its battery life. It offers up to 24x usage per battery charge, which is absolutely impressive. It's reassuring to know that I can rely on the device without having to constantly search for a power outlet.

The two heating modes for breast milk and water are well thought out and easily switchable. I would like to highlight the rapid heating mode – within just 3 minutes, the milk or water is ready. Simply brilliant when the baby gets hungry and needs to be fed quickly.

The design of the Momcozy bottle warmer is both practical and appealing. It is light, compact and easy to store in a diaper bag or stroller. Easy to use, even with just one hand while holding the baby.

All in all, the Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer is a high-quality and well-thought-out product that really makes the everyday life of parents easier. It's consistent, reliable and fast - everything you'd expect from an excellent bottle warmer. I can recommend it to absolutely anyone who travels a lot.

🔄 Dual heating modes

The Momcozy has been designed with versatility in mind. It offers two different modes to heat breast milk or water, allowing you to always get the right temperature. This feature is very practical for families who alternate between breastfeeding and formula, ensuring that each feeding is safe and comfortable for the baby.

⚡ Fast and precise heating

One of its strengths is speed. You can heat 230 ml of water in just 3 minutes and refrigerated milk at 37 °C in about 5 minutes. This performance avoids long waits and allows you to prepare a bottle at any time, which is essential when the baby is hungry and needs immediate attention.

🧴 Large capacity and practical design

With 500 ml capacity, it is suitable for covering several feedings a day. Its thermos type format is airtight and leak-free, making it an ideal ally for trips, outings or even for the car. In addition, with an approximate weight of 600 g, it is light and easy to carry in the baby's bag.

🔋 Long battery life

The heater incorporates a high-performance rechargeable battery that offers up to 24 water heating cycles or 8 milk heating cycles on a single charge. This provides peace of mind for parents for an entire day away from home. A full charge takes just 1.5 hours, using the included 18V/2A/36W charger.

🚗 Portable and wireless

Not relying on cables or plugs, the Momcozy is perfect for trips, excursions or nights when there is no power nearby. Its portable design makes it a must-have accessory for active families looking for comfort and autonomy.

⚠️ Important Note

The included charger is designed for this product only. It should not be used with other devices to avoid possible damage.

✅ Conclusion

The Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer combines speed, safety and mobility. Its dual heating mode, long battery life, large capacity and compact design make it a complete solution for parents looking for practicality inside and outside the home. A recommended purchase to ensure that the baby's feeding is always comfortable and punctual, no matter the place.

After almost 6 months of use, the Blimbini no longer charged. We tried several cables and plugs, but that could no longer be the reason. I then wrote to BlimBini's support and after only a few hours I was told that I should please pass on the batch number and after I did this, I was immediately offered a replacement device. The service is very good. Unfortunately, the replacement device does not charge well either. We have to disconnect the cable several times, contact it again and wiggle around until we see a charging bar. If you take down a warm bottle and screw a new one on it, it happens again and again that the Blimbini loses contact and simply discharges during the warm-up. Unfortunately, this is not acceptable to me.

Disappointed at first it was perfect but after a few uses the bottle warmer leaks and bellows. When you contact the brand, it sends you on a "see with Amazon" ride, in short, unusable. Fortunately, Amazon once again found us a good solution. Thank you to the best customer service in France.

I find this product to be an excellent option for parents looking for a portable and practical bottle warmer for their babies. The Tommee Tippee LetsGo is an electric bottle warmer that can be recharged via USB, making it very convenient to take anywhere without having to worry about finding a power outlet. In addition, its lightweight and compact design makes it ideal for traveling, as it does not take up much space in the diaper bag. Its operation is very simple, you just have to fill the container with hot water and place the bottle inside so that it heats up in a few minutes. It also has an automatic shut-off function for added safety. In summary, the Tommee Tippee LetsGo is a very practical and easy-to-use portable bottle warmer, ideal for parents looking for a convenient solution to warm their babies' milk while they are away from home. I recommend it without a doubt.

I think the Tommee Tippee LetsGo Portable Baby Bottle Warmer is a great choice for parents who are constantly on the go. This bottle warmer is USB rechargeable, making it very practical and convenient. In addition, its compact and lightweight design makes it ideal for traveling. As for its operation, this electric bottle warmer is very easy to use. You just need to connect it to a power source, either through a power adapter or through a USB port, and in a few minutes you will have your baby's bottle ready and at the right temperature. Another outstanding feature of this product is its ability to keep the bottle warm for an extended time. This is especially useful when you're away from home and don't have immediate access to a heat source. In addition, its ergonomic and sturdy design makes it safe and reliable. In summary, the Tommee Tippee LetsGo Portable Baby Bottle Warmer is an excellent choice for parents who need a practical and easy-to-carry bottle warmer. Its USB recharging capability, compact design, and ability to keep the bottle warm make it an indispensable tool for traveling with your baby.

Fast heat-up time. I heat both the milk that comes out of the fridge and the water at room temperature and in both cases the heating time is fast. Very easy to use. The bottle warmer indicates the temperature of the liquid and the heating progress of it.The keeping warm is automatic so no need to warm up if you have to postpone the intake of the bottle. The battery level is easily consultable, the recharge is done rather quickly and it holds the charge well. For my part, with very little warmth, I can do all day and night. Responsive and available customer service. Following a false manipulation on my part, I needed to contact the seller. He was very responsive and gave me a very quick solution.

I absolutely love this portable bottle warmer! It is super practical for on the go and makes life with baby much easier. The wireless design is a real plus – I can take it with me wherever I go, whether it's in the car, on a plane, or just when traveling. The quick heating up in just 2 minutes is really impressive, so my baby's milk is always ready quickly, no matter where we are.

The 12000mAh battery lasts a long time – I can heat several bottles without having to charge all the time. I especially like that it is odorless because it is made of high-quality stainless steel and no plastic is used. The different heating modes and temperature options are very handy for setting just the right temperature for breast milk, water or formula.

All in all, a great product that combines quality, comfort and safety. Highly recommended for all parents who travel a lot!

The bottle warmer is pretty good overall, the packaging is of good quality. You receive the bottle warmer with a charger and a manual in English.The bottle warmer is made of glass and quite sturdy, you don't feel the heat when you wear it. All the parts of the bottle warmer seem to be of good quality and are all removable. However, if your child likes to drink his bottle hot, you will have to heat the water to 55 degrees, which is the maximum temperature of the bottle warmer, at 37 degrees the water is barely lukewarm. The bottle warmer discharges quite quickly, it is better to take the charger with you if you need to heat several bottles outside. The heat-up time is quite fast. It remains to be seen in the long term if the product holds.

This Babymoov turbo steam plus sterilizer is presented as a bottle tree that can be arranged under a removable bell that allows you to sterilize up to 6 large bottles or accessories, a breast pump etc. This French-made device is guaranteed for life after registration on the website... an excellent thing. Just fill the small tank with water and start the cycle to see the bottles sterilized, but you have to clean them before.. It's not a dishwasher!! All the same!! An alarm warns you of the end... The device can store bottles ... it stops on its own!! I particularly appreciated the nozzles that go to the ends of the branches ensuring the steam at the bottom of the bottles turned upside down... An excellent point. The device is not very small but what a time saver with a newborn for a young mother who is sometimes a little lost... a cycle of 6 to 10 minutes and we find sterile and dry bottles!! No more worries about infant safety!! Its use does not last long, of course, but it is an undeniable plus. With 4 children, we are used to it but my husband would have appreciated this device with our eldest as he was lost and tired when he arrived from the maternity ward!! A great gift idea!! If this evaluation was able to help you, like, if you had any questions, don't hesitate to ask them, thank you.

Really ultra practical! We had initially bought a bottle warmer for the house that plugs in and finally we only use this one since we bought it at the beginning of September.- really fast heating compared to other bottle warmers- practical in outings as well as at home, zero leaks, maintains the temperature!- allows you to warm a lot of bottles in a row (the quantity decreases if they are large bottles,  which is logical but so far we make it easy to make 5 bottles of 180mL and we still have a charge! We then charge it just in case but may not be necessary)- small carrying pouch provided- easy to cleanAnd special mention for the customer service! 🤩🤩We broke the glass part on December 25th, msg sent in the evening and on the morning of the 26th already a reply to them with return of the part for free!! Really an investment that is well worth it! And in case of a problem, a follow-up of the seller behind! Compared to the competing brands where I hesitated for a long time, well I absolutely do not regret my choice to have bought Reveal Baby and not another. GO FOR IT 😃

Its appearance is relatively sober and discreet enough to blend easily into the décor of many kitchens. Be careful: it has no other socket than the mains one (so no need to think you can use it in the car - hence its star less for this price). As far as heating is concerned, it is efficient and in the average of the time. You have to be careful to fill with the right volume of water even if it seems little. Then just press the button and heat up. Only a light can see if it's in operation or if it's finished (too bad). A few small accessories to avoid burning yourself for the potty. In short, it's quite complete. Very good compatibility with AVENT bottles (the ones we use).

In our search for a bottle warmer, we came across various suppliers. Initially, the decision was made on a Phillips Avent, but it was out of the race after a very short time. The reason for this was the clearly consistently poor ratings. I don't just go by stars in the rating, but also read through the content/experience report. If you are interested, just read it yourself. Now we come to the Grundig bottle warmer, because that's what it's all about here! Short and crisp review:+ perfect temperature holding function (measured with 2 thermoeters)+ fast warm-up function+ heat up 2 bottles or food in parallel.+ sterilization function available+ digital display for target/actual temperature (works TOP)For us currently the best bottle warmer in the field. 5 reviews with a full 5 stars speak for themselves. I can only agree with the previous speakers and say that price/performance is absolutely consistent here.

The bottle warmer from MOMCOZY serves its purpose and offers a very good price-performance ratio.

The good piece is delivered neatly packaged to your home and makes a reasonable impression at first glance.
Material and workmanship are impeccable, size and specifications as described by the seller.

The machine seems very bulky at first, but it fits well in almost any bag. The operation is intuitive and works absolutely smoothly in everyday life. On the road, the part is a real blessing and heats the milk in a flash.

I wouldn't have expected anything else for the price called, but I am positively surprised and can really recommend the device without hesitation.

After several months of use, Perfect for heating the bottle or small jar, you just have to adapt the amount of water (20 ml) for the heat to be good. In a few seconds the bottle is ready. The stop is automatic once the water has drained you hear a slap at the end and the light goes out. Also used in the car, heats up a little longer without surprise. The fact that I don't have a lid means that you don't get stuck with the height of the bottle. Indeed, I had another bottle warmer with a lid but once passed on a large bottle it no longer closed and heat loss. The size is also suitable for transport. For cleaning, vinegar + water. Very satisfied

The milk and water warmer is a well thought-out device that makes our everyday life with babies and toddlers noticeably easier. It works reliably, saves time and consistently delivers the desired temperature – ideal when things have to be done quickly.

The precise temperature selection is particularly helpful:
• 37 °C – perfect for breast milk or pre-milk
• 40 °C / 45 °C – ideal for baby food
• 50 °C / 55 °C – for water, tea or other applications

The heating time can be flexibly selected: 30, 60, 90, 120, 150 or 180 seconds – depending on the quantity and initial temperature of the liquid. A 150 ml bottle is ready for use in about 60-90 seconds.

The heating element is made of SUS316 stainless steel, a particularly corrosion-resistant material that is hygienic and durable – a clear advantage compared to conventional SUS304.

Conclusion: Clear recommendation for parents who need fast, clean and reliable solutions in everyday life.

Bottle warmer used in the car to heat baby food (as explained in the instructions). Use 5/6 times in 1 year and the last time the connection started to melt in the cigarette lighter. Luckily I felt the plastic burned, when I wanted to remove it, the connected part separated in two because it had melted. Burning metal parts fell on the carpet, fortunately we were able to stop quickly because the carpets were starting to burn. We found the resistor intact when it is supposed to melt to avoid this kind of problem. In short, a poorly constructed and very dangerous product. I'll try to find time to contact the customer service. I advise against it, it's lost money.

This portable bottle warmer is ideal for parents on the go. Compact and lightweight, it is easy to carry in a bag and offers a long battery life for several uses during the day. The two heating modes allow you to adapt the temperature depending on whether you are heating breast milk or water, ensuring homogeneous and safe warmth for baby.

Its large 500ml capacity is perfect for preparing multiple bottles without constantly refilling, and the quick system heats up in just a few minutes, convenient when going out or traveling. An essential accessory to simplify the life of parents while guaranteeing the comfort and safety of the infant.

This invention seems to be taken from a space mission of the Chinese space agency, which NASA is very much seen, but it is designed for something much more heroic, namely: to survive motherhood with dignity and milk at the perfect temperature.

I took it for a friend who was just a mother and since then she says that it has restored her faith in technology.

It heats milk or water in a few minutes, without cables and without drama, keeps the temperature stable and also fits in the trolley bag.

Ideal for trips, parks or those endless nights when the baby decides that hunger does not understand schedules.

The battery lasts longer than the mood of new parents and the design is so cute that it almost makes you want to take it to work instead of the thermos of coffee.

In short, practical, fast and beautiful. If babies came with an instruction manual, it would probably say on the first page: "Get one of these".

This bottle warmer is super practical with a space-saving format. It heats up quite quickly and its autonomy allows it to be used several times during the day without worry. This is really useful when you don't have access to a microwave, whether it's on a shopping trip or on a long car ride, the bottle is ready in a few minutes. It is refuelable via USB-C (no need to take a specific charger). It doesn't take up too much space in the diaper bag. Operation is simple, just one button is all it takes. Allow a few minutes and it's good. It is compatible with Philips Avent bottles and adapters are provided for other brands. A good repair when you're out and about!

Recently bought so let's see if it holds up over time, but is already very promising! The promises announced are kept: speed of heating (30 to 45s to reach 37°C), keeping warm, sufficient battery for several preparations, etc! The product is quite expensive but worth it. Small ⚠️ though: the charging time is still quite long despite the inclusion of a usb-c cable + Qualcomm QuickCharge 3.0 charger

This bottle warmer warms breast milk and formula quickly, in just 2.5-7 minutes! It also has other features such as a 24-hour keep warm feature. It can gently thaw breast milk and warm baby food. It will even steam clean bottles and nipples and memorize the settings you've chosen. The device is equipped with a timer and allows you to adjust the temperature. I liked the fact that it uses hot water to heat the milk, so it doesn't damage the content and nutrients of the milk. So, overall, it's a great bottle warmer because it has a lot of extra features. It's a bit more expensive than some other bottle warmers, but it's great quality and exceptionally well made.

This is the 1st time I've used a bottle warmer and I admit that it's very practical. ➕ Pros:- Ideal for getting the perfect temperature- Elegant and space-saving design- 5-in-1 device- Compatible with Tommee Tippee➖ bottles Cons:- Warming a 240ml bottle takes about 4 min, which seems huge to me- Obligation to plug in/unplug it between each use because there is no switch- Requires manipulation to empty the water of the tank each time by moving the entire device- The handling is laborious, the instructions being very basic

Bought to replace my old bottle warmer which took 8 minutes to heat a 120ml bottle. On paper, this one was perfect. But if we follow the given water quantity table, the bottle comes out barely warm. For a 120ml wide-neck plastic bottle we need to put 45ml of water in the bottle warmer to keep it warm and it takes almost 5 minutes to heat up. So we are very, very far from the 30 seconds announced. In addition, it stops in the middle of heating. Even if we found the cause (a little scaled), it's quickly annoying when you have to descale the bottle warmer 2 times a week

This portable bottle warmer is simply great, the packaging is very good and you can give it as a gift! It heats milk in no time, without the need to boil water. It is super convenient to take everywhere with its small size and USB rechargeable battery. I also love the fact that it works with different types of bottles thanks to the included adapters. And the best part is that the milk is reheated evenly. It is really a must-have for active parents who want to bottle feed easily wherever they go. I am delighted with this product!

This portable bottle warmer is simply great, the packaging is very good and you can give it as a gift! It heats milk in no time, without the need to boil water. It is super convenient to take everywhere with its small size and USB rechargeable battery. I also love the fact that it works with different types of bottles thanks to the included adapters. And the best part is that the milk is reheated evenly. It is really a must-have for active parents who want to bottle feed easily wherever they go. I am delighted with this product!

We love this bottle idolatrously. Something so practical and also looks great.
We use the bottle every day, all day, not only on the go. It is always provided with fresh boiled water and is turned on as soon as our little one is hungry. Within a few minutes we have the right temperature and can feed.
On the go it is practical anyway, as the cap can be locked. Nothing leaks and it is immediately ready for use.
A very valuable product. The battery therefore only lasts one day with us. And must be fully charged every day. However, the charging process is fast.
If this bottle breaks, we will order a new one immediately. It has been in continuous use for 8 weeks now.

Absolutely great product! Design 1a easy operation. And simply gives us incredible flexibility. We ordered 2 Blimbinis directly and with each order there was an individually handwritten thank you card! If you have any questions, you will receive an answer in no time. Just great! 👍🏼

Excellent tool to manage situations in which it is impossible to enter a bar and ask to use the microwave. On paper, it promises various temperature levels. In reality, to obtain (artificial) milk at an acceptable temperature we have always had to use it at maximum power (45°) and depending on the quantity it may take some time. Better to shake it every now and then to get good results. If you're expecting something to save your life if your baby suddenly starts screaming in hunger... it's not good (I don't even know if such an object exists)... but if you are content to heat the milk beforehand while you are by the sea or in the mountains... that's fine. I never got below 40% battery, what remains after two 200ml bottles heated to 45° (which in my opinion are actually much less... but still fair for my 3 and a half month old daughter). Honestly, I have never timed but more or less we are between 15 and 20 minutes per bottle. My bottles are brand mam, the adapter works. The gasket supplied is a bit fragile, to be positioned carefully.

It is extremely practical, especially when you are on the go. A must-have accessory for parents who need to heat baby's milk. I've been using it for 2 months and I'm not disappointed. I am very satisfied with their responsiveness and the after-sales service, which really met my expectations. The glass of the bottle warmer unfortunately broke, but I contacted customer service to see if it was possible to get another one. They were responsive and sent me back a new drink quickly.

This bottle warmer is ideal for warming bottles (PHEW!) But also small jars. It is quite light and rather space-saving so easily transportable everywhere and adaptable to all types of cars so it will quickly become an essential when baby arrives. Its heating time is quite correct (90 seconds). It seems to me that the value for money of this item is very correct. To put on your birth list!

The Momcozy portable bottle warmer is very useful for parents on the go. Its large capacity of 500 ml allows you to last all day without having to refill with water. The two heating modes are convenient, whether for breast milk or just water. The device heats up quickly and keeps the temperature for quite a long time. The autonomy is decent and reassuring for mobile use. Small downside: it is a bit bulky in a changing bag, but its effectiveness more than compensates.

When you become a parent, you buy the biggest sh...., because you think you need it - and then you don't need it. This is absolutely not the case here, even if I am 'fully' breastfeeding, I have decided to bottle my milk on the go. It's really easier for both of us after several trials. And now this small, useful thing comes along. I don't need a thermos bottle for water and breast milk, but only for breast milk, or the bottle in which breast milk is located. Just screwed on, turned on and lo and behold - within a very short time the milk (the water) is warm and at drinking temperature. 👌

Super practical and stowable. We have been using the bottle warmer from Blimbini for about 1/4 year and it still runs great. Absolutely recommended. The customer service is also very nice. I had stupidly lost the sealing ring of the adapter on the way while cleaning and had asked if I could buy a separate one. However, the customer service offered to send me 2 pieces free of charge. An absolute dream. Thank you again for that

The Tommee Tippee Portable Bottle Warmer is a product that I received on schedule and that really surprised me positively. From the very beginning, the Tommee Tippee brand has proven its great professionalism with this product. The aesthetic appearance of the bottle warmer is eye-catching, and the compact design makes it extremely easy to transport. It is a significant advantage for parents who travel frequently or who need to warm their baby's bottle when they are away from home. In addition, I really appreciated the compatibility of the bottle warmer with different types of bottles, including those from the Chicco brand, which was a pleasant surprise. However, the feature that impressed me the most is the efficiency of the device. Using slow heating technology, the bottle warmer is able to warm a 150ml bottle in just 10 minutes. This is a very quick warm-up time, which comes in extremely handy when dealing with a hungry and impatient child. Not having to wait too long to have the bottle ready is certainly a plus point for this product. In addition, the autonomy of the bottle warmer is satisfactory. A single charge allows you to heat up to 7 bottles of 150 ml, which is more than enough for daily use. Three different temperatures can be set, allowing you to tailor the heating to your child's individual preferences. Overall, I was extremely pleased with the Tommee Tippee Portable Bottle Warmer. In addition to its attractive appearance and compact design, the efficiency of the device in quickly heating bottles and the autonomy of the battery are features that make it a high-level product. I highly recommend this bottle warmer to any parent looking for convenience, efficiency, and compatibility in one product. I hope this review is useful to you and that it can put you in a position to make an informed purchase.

Electric bottle warmer produced and sold by the company EOMMEE TIPPEE model LETSGO, this portable accessory is made of composite plastic material of fair quality. The upper part in contact with the bottle is made of steel. In the package there is the USB cable for charging the internal battery and a pair of adapters for the various bottles. Once turned on, you can see the presence of LEDs on the front under the plastic coating that indicate the battery charge level and the temperature reached by the heated liquid. The advantages of this accessory are the possibility of heating milk for the baby even outside the home with comfort and during a possible trip; even the recharging of the device is facilitated by the presence of a USB adapter for charging even on board the car. The defects are instead given by the poor efficiency of the device's internal battery: in fact, with a recharge of about 4 hours it is possible to heat only 4 bottles with 120 ml of milk. Another defect is the heating time: 10 minutes of waiting are too long to heat 120 ml of milk, as with a thermos of hot water you could instantly prepare the drink. Another defect is given by the possibility of using only some bottles, i.e. those of the same company and the MAM brand. Other products are incompatible. Finally, the price: too high for this accessory as there are similar products on the market with better features at much more affordable prices. Product not recommended!

Very good product, and in addition everything is very well thought out.It ⭐️is of excellent quality and easy to use.It ⭐️is very compact and ergonomic and can be moved easily since I find it light compared to another one I had tested previously.Sterilization ⭐️seems to me super practical and useful for babies ✔️Ideal to carry on vacation.For ⭐️those who are looking for a gift,  It's a good idea for both mom and baby. ⭐️The price seems reasonable to me. ⭐️

We have tested different bottle warmers. First the Philipps Avent. Then two other no-name parts.The bottle warmer from Grundig was the most convincing. We put bottles of boiled water in it, which are reliably kept at 45°. As soon as the child wants a milk, you can help yourself directly to the well-tempered water, put the appropriate amount of powder for the milk on it and have a bottle ready for the child within 15 seconds. A revolution for new parents. Especially at night, but also during the day, we have not found any other method to prepare a bottle so quickly.

Arrived on March 17thBeautiful object that seems qualitative to the naked eye, received in a pretty box and a small storage bag. Contrary to some comments, I didn't have a plastic smell on my side. After sterilization I did some tests. The device is easy to use and ergonomic. 3 buttons easy to use. It shows the battery % in one click. We choose the desired temperature and he gets to work. Going from 20° to 37° in 3 minutes watch in hand and it visually indicates the temperature that rises to the one you have chosen. After testing a probe in the water. It was at 35°/36°. I'm absolutely not going to quibble it's perfect for me, baby doesn't feel the difference between 1 or 2 degrees, he drinks it and it's fine with me! Test of the probe of keeping warm after 5 min, same temperature also I like! Instant hot keep after temperature reached... PerfectA disadvantage: not to rely on the graduation which remains wrong for me. But another solution was quickly found. I pour the water into the bottle for the graduation and I pour the water back into the bottle warmer so no blocking subject on my side. Waiting for testing:At what battery level does the water no longer heat up? Actual charging time compared to the operating instructions (6h/7h) ... To be tested. A perfect bottle warmer for a plane trip for me.

The bottle warmer is really well made and does exactly what it is supposed to. It feels very valuable. I had originally ordered the wrong adapter and the service was super fast, really nice and extremely accommodating. Thank you very much!

Very practical and easy to use portable bottle warmer, recharges easily with its USB port (car) or classic plug, efficient battery hold, stays warm if needed it's perfect! Large capacity in ml and quality product in hand, received in its packaging! I strongly recommend for travel, avoid the cold bottle and the search for a plug to plug in.. Was used during a 10-hour drive, at the top

I can't help but share how the Nuk Thermo Express Auto Home Bottle Warmer has been a game-changer for me as a new parent. This device has become my ultimate ally for delicate moments, day and night. Let me tell you, restless nights have been much easier thanks to this bottle warmer. When my baby is hungry at 3 a.m., I'm no longer fumbling with hot water or juggling the microwave. Within minutes, the milk is at the perfect temperature, and it makes all the difference in calming my hungry baby. The versatility of this device is amazing. Whether I'm at home or in the car, it follows me everywhere. Car rides have become much less stressful, knowing that I can warm up the bottle in a flash. The white color of the Nuk Thermo Express gives it a modern and clean look, which fits perfectly in my kitchen. But beyond the looks, it was really the simplicity of use that convinced me. I don't have to be a tech expert to operate this device. In the end, the Nuk Thermo Express Auto Home Bottle Warmer has become a staple in my life as a parent. It has brought a touch of ease and precious comfort to sometimes chaotic times. If you're looking to simplify your routines with a baby, I highly encourage you to consider this device. For me, it's so much more than just a bottle warmer, it's become a loyal companion on my parenting journey.

Product consistent with the description, heats up very quickly with a little water (one, two tablespoons) in a few seconds the bottle is good! If I put a lot of water I remove the bottle, and I let the water evaporate, the bottle warmer stops by itself. I don't use them yet in my vehicle (read the instructions before use). Since the water at home is calcareous, leaves black marks on the bottom, to be wiped regularly. Thank you

Rather nice bottle warmer, not too expensive (it seems to me less than 70€ to buy, but currently unavailable), for pretty cool performance and full of very useful features such as sterilization, gentle defrosting or even keeping warm for 24 hours (do you see where I'm going to optimize short nights?)! It is rather accessible, functional and takes into account bottles up to 240ml which is already appreciable and we can say that it will last a few months before becoming a little tight and at that time we will also go through the diversification phase which occurs around 4 to 6 months depending on the children. We will not radically change the way we eat and replace milk, but introduce new tastes and new textures. Even if it is quite large it remains easily transportable, depending on where you go, a battery-powered model could be better suited but it's rather nice. The screen is clear and you can read the setting well. In short, for a very competitive price, this bottle warmer will satisfy you, just like baby and the bottles of the night! A product with a good quality/price ratio, very nice and well made, I recommend!

I strongly advise against this product. Almost all other reviews come from testers. Although the design is nice, that's its only advantage. Unfortunately, it does not perform its main function: heating the milk to the right temperature. We found that the heated milk was sometimes cold and sometimes too hot, even when using the same container and the same heating time. This disappointment led us to stop using it.

I ordered the bottle warmer on 13.05 and on 17.05 it was already there. The box also included a cloth bag to take the device with me on the go without it getting scratched. Unfortunately, the sealing ring of my adapter broke right at the beginning, but the team responded quickly to my request and sent me a new one free of charge. So far I had not used it outside, but I tested it at home and measured the temperature (was correct). Since I have not yet put the device through its paces, I give it 4 out of 5 stars 😊 for the time being

Bottle warmer and baby food jars (for those you prepare yourself too, very simple and practical. I have several for my children and grandchildren. This one is practical because it can be used in the car or motorhome on the cigarette lighter.lI heats up quickly; the water boils and then it's the steam that heatsIt can heat other containers than bottles, I take it for the motorhomeIf you put more water; The liquid will be warmer, you will quickly get used to it. On the back you have a slider to use it on a socket or on the cigarette lighter. If the container allows you to use the adapter, it will heat up fasterthe steam will not escape. At home, a pot with water also does the trick, but with this bottle warmer you are more guided at the beginning. So it's up to you to see if it's essential for 30 euros, especially since now with powdered milk you can give at room temperature. All the dosages are written on an adhesive, I needed a magnifying glass, but I can't see. A small grey basket with 2 handles supports bottles and jars. You should never pose naked. After a while, you will have to descale with white vinegar. If I was able to help you, let me know.

First bottle heater I buy and I am really disappointed despite the relatively good ratings that are given to this product. Pros:- Beautiful design: it's sober, small, practical. It fits in every kitchen.- Easy to use: there are not ten million buttons, not a lot of electronics. On paper, it is an easy-to-use product that must be able to last over time.- Heating: this is what we ask of it. Cons:- Inconvenient: to empty the water (which is used for heating) you have to unplug the electrical outlet every time. It's really not practical, especially since the manufacturer advises to empty the water after each use. Same, it is asked to put the same level of water as what is in the bottle... except that it is not easy to measure once the bottle is in the machine.- No signal: for the only end signal you have a light signal, no sound alert. So either you stay while it heats up, or you come back regularly.- Fairly summary documentationIn short, the price remains contained but but in use I regret my purchase a little. Maybe a product with more practicality and more versatility would have done the trick.

The portable bottle warmer from Momcozy is a real relief for everyday life with children. Especially on the road or at night, I no longer have to look for hot water or plan awkwardly – just turn it on and everything is ready to drink in a few minutes. Heating up is really fast, about three minutes, and the temperature remains reliably constant.

The two heating modes for breast milk and water are very convenient and ensure that nothing overheats or stays too cold. The 500 ml capacity is more than enough to prepare several vials in a row or to keep water warm in stock. I'm particularly excited about the strong battery performance – up to 24 uses without charging are ideal for trips, travel, or long days on the go.

The device fits well in the hand, is compact and fits easily in a diaper bag or backpack. Cleaning is also straightforward, as the surfaces are smooth and hygienic. In addition, the design is simple and modern, without unnecessary frills.

For parents who want to be flexible and independent, this bottle warmer is highly recommended. Fast, reliable and well thought-out – a product that makes everyday life noticeably easier!

The mobile warmer combines a 500 milliliter thermos bottle with a dense stainless steel design and weighs only 600 grams, suitable for two to three baby bottles to go. The construction relies on food-safe materials and tight silicone seals for safe transport without leakage.

The two-in-one heating mode allows you to quickly switch between milk and water, and the temperature accuracy is ±0.5 degrees Celsius for breast milk and infant formula. 100 milliliters of water reach 40 degrees in about three minutes, chilled milk is 37 degrees in about five minutes. Super fast and accurate!

One charge covers up to eight heats with 150 milliliters of milk or up to twenty-four heats with 250 milliliters of water, the Eco mode extends the runtime by about thirty percent in a cool environment. The system reliably maintains target temperatures, works in a nutrient-friendly manner and is therefore particularly practical for night-time feedings and tours.

Wireless, precise and fast, with a large capacity for multiple families and short heat-up times in everyday life. Thanks to fast charging, it is ready for use again in about an hour and a half, but it is important to use the included power adapter with two amps and thirty-six watts for full power.

This portable bottle warmer has proven to be an indispensable helper for me as a parent. The ability to quickly and precisely switch between milk and water modes makes preparing baby food incredibly easy. Particularly impressive is the temperature accuracy, which ensures that the food always has the right heat – perfect for sensitive baby stomachs.

It's easy to use, and its compact size makes it ideal for outings, whether it's in the park, traveling, or everyday life. The fact that it can heat several bottles with one charge gives me the freedom to enjoy the day without constant recharging. Cleaning is also straightforward, which saves me a lot of time and effort.

Another plus point is the rapid heating - in a few minutes everything is ready, which is worth its weight in gold, especially for a hungry baby. The leak-proof construction gives me additional security, no matter where I am on the road. All in all, a well thought-out product that makes my everyday life much easier and is absolutely recommendable!

The bottle warmer is great. Exactly what is intended is implemented. It is handy, light in weight and (I didn't take the time exactly) with a full battery it heats up the liquid very quickly. Very easy to clean, so there is actually nothing wrong with the thing. Great design, easy handling, idiot-proof functionality, fast charging. Top product. Price/performance ratio is great!

The delivery of the bottle warmer was faster than specified and without any problems. The bottle warmer is safely packed in an attractively designed cardboard box. The workmanship is flawless, there are no sharp or unclean edges on the plastic, the cover of the charging slot is made of robust, flexible rubber.Enclosed is a detailed description.The Tommee Tippee is charged using a USB cable type C. However, no plug is included. A full charge takes about 4 hours. However, the device can also be used for charging if it has a basic charge. The device is pleasantly light and therefore an enormous relief if you have always carried 1l of hot water with you beforehand. The heating surface is first protected by a lid. It is a bit annoying that it only lies on top of it and therefore always falls off in the diaper bag. The heating surface itself is surrounded by a milky white rubber ring for sealing. Then either the attachment for Tommee Tippee or the attachment for MAM can be screwed on. The attachments themselves seal again by means of a transparent rubber ring. Finally, screw the bottle into the attachment and turn it upside down.The bottle warmer is switched on using the button on the bottom and selects between the three available temperatures of 37, 40 and 45 degrees by pressing. After the desired temperature stops flashing, the bottle warmer detects the temperature of the milk and starts heating. The current temperature is displayed. Cleaning is easy - the heating surface can be easily wiped and disinfected, the sealing rings can be removed and washed down along with the attachment. We feed expressed breast milk. It is important not to heat it above 40 degrees, otherwise you should no longer use it because of destroyed nutrients, among other things. With our previous bottle warmer, which works with water, this regularly went wrong despite the "bottle level" setting. So you always had to be careful when you heated the milk and measure it with a thermometer. The Tommee Tippee heats up to 37, 40 or 45 degrees on its own, beeps once when the temperature is reached and then holds it until you turn it off. So you don't have to worry at all. The attachment holds super tight, so that you can also heat the milk in the car without any problems.150ml of room-temperature milk is heated within 10 minutes. The even heating also preserves nutrients. The milk also seems to taste better as a result - our child always drinks a larger amount when the milk has been heated in the Tommee Tippee. A total of seven 150 ml vials or four 260 ml vials should be able to be heated. The specified warm-up times are observed for milk at room temperature. It takes a little longer at refrigerator temperature. And when it comes to refrigerator temperature, there is also a need for improvement. The Tommee Tippee just manages 2 250ml bottles of milk at refrigerator temperature.At home we have the bottle warmer almost permanently at the store and even on the go you should have a charging option if you transport the milk in a cooler bag. I find the price of 68.50 EUR a bit steep. All in all, I am thrilled with the product, only the battery performance needs to be improved. That's why I give 4 stars and a purchase recommendation.

First of all: Basically, the bottle warmer works. But how to disinfect it properly for newborns is a mystery to me. The bottle is screwed directly onto the opening, i.e. the heating plate comes into direct contact with the milk. However, the heating plate is installed directly with the device, which must not get wet. Furthermore, there is a seal with sharp edges between the heating plate and the bottle, which is not necessarily easy to remove for cleaning. For protection on the go, there is a lid that covers the heating plate and keeps it clean. Now I thought, ok, at least I'll put it in the sterilizer (it can also fall down and get more dirty...). But no: Afterwards it was badly bent! Who makes a device for toddlers where the plastic can't even withstand 100 °C? I bent it halfway again, but I imagine quality and good design differently. I don't dare to fill the warmer with a little hot water for disinfection anymore. Unfortunately, it is therefore not possible for our newborns to use it. Unfortunately, a return is not possible either. What a pity.

"Tommee Tippee LetsGo" rechargeable and portable electric bottle warmer supplied with:⃣ 1️1 USB-C2️charging cable ⃣ 1 user3️manual ⃣ 2 adapters for MAM and Philips Avent4️bottles ⃣ 1 replacement rubber❌ gasket Without AC📌 adapter Features🍼 Fast warm-up: 150 ML in 10 minutes🍼 Runtime: 7 reheats of 150 ML or 4 of 260 ML🍼 3 temperature settings:  37°C, 40°C and 45°C🍼 Gentle heating: this technology eliminates hot spots and ensures that the milk is warmed evenly📌 Use⃣1️Turn the bottle warmer upside down and connect it to the bottles2️⃣ Turn the bottle warmer on and select the desired temperature (short press of the start button)⃣ 3️The bottle warmer will turn on and beep when finished. 📌 Price This review📌 ReviewsDesigned to be used with Tommee Tippee bottles (except the glass range), this bottle warmer is versatile because it can also be used with MAM and Philips bottles Event.Il offers a satisfactory autonomy and a simplicity of use that is very appreciable on a daily basis (a single button allows you to turn it on and select the desired temperature).

Personally, we try to promote the use of glass bottles for our daughter as much as possible; so inevitably disappointed when I discovered the little sentence in the instructions "Do not use with glass bottles" (it is nevertheless written on the product page, at the very bottom of the paragraph on compatibility, but let's say that it is not highlighted much). Too bad because apart from that, nothing to complain about this very practical portable bottle warmer, and I would have liked to be able to use it more.- compatibility announced with Tommee Tippee, MAM and Avent bottles (I confirm, see photos) and I can even add Dodie to the list that I also tested and which adjusts very well without an adapter because the screw thread is the same as on the Avent bottles. On the other hand, I tested Nuk and it doesn't work.- simplicity of use: a single button, a short press to see the battery level of the device, a long press to set the heating temperature.. and that's it!- easy charging with a standard Usb-c output (+ a cable is provided).- screwing of the bottles super fast and simple- perfect sealing (a spare gasket is provided if the one installed ends up being damaged)In short, I recommend, if you are not a stickler for the use of glass:)
