This is my first review ever. The device is so great and I recommend it to all mothers who, like me (for whatever reason), express milk. As a premature mother, I unfortunately cannot breastfeed my child directly and therefore pump breast milk and then feed it by bottle.Breast milk can only be kept warm for about 1 hour and must be disposed of afterwards. For me, this meant planning trips well, because the child was hungry about every 3 hours and then I had to stay somewhere near a power outlet (e.g. in a café). It was clear to me quite quickly that I needed a portable milk warmer, which in the best case also works without a water bath. After a short research, the choice fell on the Tommee Tippee for 70€ and I am overjoyed to have made this investment. This bottle warmer has given me back my freedom, now I can go out with my child and don't have to plan the bottle stops beforehand. I have been using it for about 4 months, it is compatible with Philips Avent bottles and I can heat at least 4 bottles (about 130 ml) with one battery charge. For me, an absolute gamechanger in everyday mommy life and worth every penny. :-)

Personally, we try to promote the use of glass bottles for our daughter as much as possible; so inevitably disappointed when I discovered the little sentence in the instructions "Do not use with glass bottles" (it is nevertheless written on the product page, at the very bottom of the paragraph on compatibility, but let's say that it is not highlighted much). Too bad because apart from that, nothing to complain about this very practical portable bottle warmer, and I would have liked to be able to use it more.- compatibility announced with Tommee Tippee, MAM and Avent bottles (I confirm, see photos) and I can even add Dodie to the list that I also tested and which adjusts very well without an adapter because the screw thread is the same as on the Avent bottles. On the other hand, I tested Nuk and it doesn't work.- simplicity of use: a single button, a short press to see the battery level of the device, a long press to set the heating temperature.. and that's it!- easy charging with a standard Usb-c output (+ a cable is provided).- screwing of the bottles super fast and simple- perfect sealing (a spare gasket is provided if the one installed ends up being damaged)In short, I recommend, if you are not a stickler for the use of glass:)

How it works: You choose the holder according to the container (bib or small jar), then you pour water (with the doser but not very practical), you put the bib on and you start using the press button. A red light comes on (see photo). The water comes to a boil, when it is completely evaporated the bottle warmer automatically stops and the indicator light goes off.the advantages:- aesthetics: discreet and modern, it fits without denoting in many kitchens- simple use- rather fast (3-4 minutes)- bottom wide enough to accept many bottles (even large ones!)- holder for the small jars provided (it avoids burning your fingers), as well as a ring to wedge the bibs- safety grid at the bottom- automatic safety stop- operation light- can be cleaned with a spongethe defects:- cord a little short- no beep warning that the bottle or jar is hot- works by boiling:  a lot of water vapour - I am worried about the lifespan in hyper calcareous regions (heated by boiling): the bottom is already all white with limestone after a few uses

This water bath bottle warmer has a simple operation, its control panel has 4 control buttons to choose the key functions of heating time and temperature. To start the start, we pour 40 ml of water into the tank, we add a bottle protection basket then the bottle or the small potty, finally we place the lid that covers the whole. In operation, the device communicates by beeping sounds to indicate when temperature and time thresholds are reached. A manual in French details step by step the programming sequences to be performed. A table is available to evaluate the time programming for special cases of cold or freezing storage of bottles. The same goes for food in small jars and for disinfection operations. After temperature checks at the end of various bottle and food operations, I was able to see that the temperatures after the alert beeps are in accordance with the programming to the nearest degree. Cleaning at the end of use is limited to the passage of a damp cloth, the descaling of the tank is necessary at a frequency that varies according to the amount of limescale in the tap water. Made for daily use, this bottle warmer does not take up much space in the kitchen, it combines precision, ease of use and heating speed.

After 5 months of use, we mainly used it to reheat breast milk ("food" option), sterilization of bottles/pacifiers/teats and reheating purees. What you need to remember:* /!\ Sometimes, the mode starts to change on its own, so much so that it starts to switch from water bath mode (32°) to other modes such as sterilization (100°). You can hear the device beeping on its own. The touch controls are then ultra sensitive and you can't change the mode correctly. This becomes dangerous because we have already had the surprise of recovering boiling milk when it should normally be at room temperature. Fortunately, we tested the milk before... Maybe due to a malfunction, but it is still potentially very dangerous for baby.* /!\ The black layer at the bottom of the bottle warmer comes loose as the first few times are heated. So much so that a lot of black particles (plastics??) then mix in the water and stick to the wall. Very hard to remove, with steaming, it is possible that these particles are found on the teat, the pot or any part that could then be ingested by the baby.* The names of the modes are not really very clear, bain-marie => "food", steam = "fast"... I strongly advise against the device unfortunately due to the potential risks it exposes to baby. In view of the use of the object, it should have been much more secure (checked the material deposits, no change of mode in progress etc.). Edit: defective product refunded by the seller.

We previously had a bottle warmer with which you could always bring the water to temperature when needed. Yes, what can I say about that... Typical beginner's mistake! The little one is hungry and you have to wait until the water is at the right temperature. You can save yourself the 5 minutes of screaming! The tip for such a device came from a friend. Since then, it has been really quiet. The device has the optimal temperature all day and the bottle is ready within a minute. This is not only easy on your own pulse but also on the pulse of the baby ;-) The biggest problem now is that the device switches off automatically after 24 hours. Here you should definitely agree when it will restart ;-) Otherwise, a clear purchase recommendation on my part!

Unfortunately, the device cannot be used for warming up milk.* The set temperature is massively exceeded. On the first attempt 40° set, 48° measured. Second attempt set 37°, measured 44°. The device's own thermometer simply goes 2-5°, and in addition it always overshoots the target temperature by 2-3°. The instructions also describe how to cook eggs with the device - maybe it can be used for this - but not for breast milk.* There is no hold for the bottles - so if you only put a bottle in it, it can fall over at any time.* The power cable is quite short, if you want to pour out the water without unplugging, the socket must be very close to the sink.* The product is not manufactured by Grundig, it is "cheap Chinese goods", and if you look through the holes in the plastic, you can also guess how cheap it all is. On the packaging it says in small letters "Grundig Trademark is used under Licence"Too bad, the concept sounded good, but...

This device is intended for sterilizing, drying and storing bottles. In just 40 minutes, the bottles are sterilized with steam, without chemicals, then dried by a projection of concentrated air! The device can sterilize up to 6 bottles of the Brand and accessories such as pacifiers, teats or manual breast pumps ..... Of course, it also works if you introduce other brands of bottles...... No need to rush, once the bottles are sterilized and dried, they are kept sterile for 24 hours. The advantage of the device is to have a built-in drainer that protects the heating plate from drops of milk! This sterilizer comes with a user manual in several languages. It is rather basic but you can download the complete manual from the Brand's website if necessary.The device offers three operating modes:- Either you put yourself in "sterilization mode" alone (10 minutes),- Or in "drying mode" alone (about 30 minutes)- Or in automatic mode (sterilization + drying: 40 minutes). Be careful, for sterilization, it is necessary to use distilled water (13 cl per cycle). For perfect hygiene and to avoid the proliferation of bad bacteria, the filter must be cleaned every 4 weeks and the device descaled in the same period of time. It is undeniably a device that will make daily life easier and reassure many parents. For me, this electronic sterilizer is a quality product!

The babymoov TURBO STEAM+Practical because it is an independent device, no need to put it in the microwave or heat water before use. Simply put a cup of tap water (cup provided) in the bowl and the coil included in the device heats the water very quickly. In 6 mins the sterilization is carried out. An orange light is illuminated throughout the sterilization process and a beep sounds when the sterilization process is complete. The color of the TURBO STEAM is neutral in shades of blue that can go very well for a boy or a girl. There is quite a bit of storage for bottles and teats. The configuration of the bottle tree is adaptable. Everything is easily removable. Small holes on the shaft are present to let the steam pass everywhere in each accessory to be sterilized. The only small downside in view of the cleaning space is that the appliance is large enough for small kitchens. Very good product. Well explained and clear instructions. Rating between 4 and 5 stars.

This Reveal Baby portable bottle warmer has completely changed our outings with baby! Our daughter did not like milk at room temperature, so we had to find a quick and effective solution. So yes this purchase is a blow, but we take it as a real time saver, we leave the house with peace of mind without asking ourselves "How are we going to heat the milk?!". The Reveal Baby bottle warmer has a good autonomy, a very decent heating power (compared to other identical products that are displayed at the same price!), is compact and above all can be completely dismantled in order to be able to wash the glass container effectively. A very small downside on the graduation, which is not very precise, but you just have to measure the water, or any other liquid, in your usual bottle and transfer everything and off you go! We had a question about the bottle warmer and the customer service was incredibly fast and kind! In short, go for it if you want to have peace of mind and make the most of your baby without any headaches!

The bottle warmer arrived quickly and reliably as usual.

In addition to the Comfyer bottle warmer itself, the box contains a quick start guide, detailed instructions in different languages, and a USB A cable to USB C charging cable. I think it's great that a future-proof USB C port already takes care of the charging process and that a corresponding cable is even included.

The bottle warmer makes a very solid and high-quality impression, the cap sits neatly and is definitely leak-proof. No unpleasant smell when unpacking, as stainless steel is used instead of plastic.

Due to its compact dimensions, it fits easily in the diaper bag, luggage, handbag or car, making it ideal for excursions. Whether for longer car journeys, flights, visits to friends or walks, the precise timer and thermometer function keeps the water at a comfortable drinking temperature.

A real game-changer and a great relief for such purposes.

The operation is intuitive and the display clearly shows the current temperature.
The battery life is completely sufficient for our everyday life, and the device can be easily charged with the included cable in the car, at the power bank or at home.

This makes you really independent and flexible.

Conclusion: compact, practical and relieving

I bought the bottle warmer for my two children (2 months and 2 years old).
It is very easy to use, and the digital screen is quite intuitive.
Very practical when travelling, walking. We do a lot of hiking, and sometimes car trips quite long for holidays or to see the family, so we needed a bottle warmer of this type. We went for the comfort baby brand because we have bottles from the same brand, but there are adapters included in the pack for other bottle brands which is very practical. We can heat several bottles with its 5/6 autonomy, but I don't wait for it to be completely empty before recharging it for safety. It can be taken anywhere, it is small and light! You can choose the heating temperature, so it's perfect so as not to burn baby and not to distort the nutritional qualities of breast milk!
I love it, it's become our diaper bag staple

Superior 👍 bottle warmer
✅️PROS:
•Large housing perfect for any size of bottle or jar (for defrost function)
• Many functions for personalized use, it heats milk at room temperature (for example the one we find ready in brick), cold milk (for example breast milk stored in the fridge or freezer), it also allows you to set the material of which the bottle is made (glass or plastic) and the quantity so as to have the ideal temperature for our little ones
•The screen is quite intuitive, in any case we have instructions in English 🇮🇹 for any doubts

❌️CONS:
•Due to the many functions, it may be confusing about use.

Overall I appreciated the product even comparing it with the bottle warmer we already use, I think that this is much more precise and that in this way there is no risk of bringing the milk to too high a temperature.
Excellent portable bottle warmer! Very practical for outings or travels, it heats up quickly and holds the load well. The absence of wires is a real plus, especially when you are on the move.

After some evaluations I decided to buy this milk warmer which seemed excellent in terms of value for money. I've been using it for almost 2 months and for the moment no problem. I heat about 100 ml of milk in 4/5min and a recharge lasts 5 times, then it must be recharged with USB when I discharge. Also easy to clean, just remove the gaskets and clean the internal steel with running water (I don't need to sterilize because I use breast milk). There are two adapters, I use the one for Tommee tippee bottles (bottle not included), so I don't know exactly which bottles you can use them with. Definitely with the Chicco one too because I tried one. Cannot be used with glass bottles as directed. The LED indicates the charge level, and the temperature you want to obtain (37°-40°-45°) and then drops to the actual temperature of the milk inserted and shows its progress until it reaches the desired temperature. Advised!

Fantastic tool that allows you to heat milk in minutes! You charge it at home at the electrical outlet or via USB and then you can use it comfortably outside the home by placing the bottle on top. Small, you can carry it in your change bag it is quick to use and does not require water to use. A real evening saver! It is used to pass the milk from fridge or room temperature to the desired temperature of 37-40-45 degrees. Already supplied as a base for inserting MAM bottles.

This portable bottle warmer is very practical!! What a joy to be able to be outside without stressing about heating my little one's bottle... The materials used are robust and seem qualitative (to be seen in the long term, but it is not low-end quite the contrary)! The heat-up time is quite fast, easy to use and being able to heat several bottles before you have to charge it is a BIG plus!! He's a bit heavy but that doesn't bother me because of his many qualities... I would also like to emphasize the quality of the after-sales service: fast, efficient, available and friendly, in short AT THE TOP!! Indeed, I had a small problem with the cap and they sent me one directly the next day! I had hesitated with another brand seen on social networks but the comments about the quality of the after-sales service made me lean towards this one and without any regrets!! I am really satisfied with the product and the seller...

From the beginning I didn't feel like millions of thermos flasks that I had to take with me and then I discovered this part. And honestly.. absolutely cool part.. I don't want to give up this thing anymore, it takes up so little space and it doesn't take long to reach the desired temperature, and you can even always see at what temperature the water or even the milk is. Absolute game changer.. In fact, one of the best investments I've made in my mom being there.. Clear purchase recommendation

I am a childminder so I might as well say that this little device is very practical in my daily life.✓ compact✓ easy to understand user manual, in several languages including French.✓ possibility to heat a bottle to 37° in two minutes 30.So ok it's longer than in the microwave but it's simpler. You don't have to watch the 30 seconds of the microwave! Who hasn't ended up with a bottle that is too hot?✓ and even, you can activate the keep warm.. up to 24 hoursBut it's very practical for example if you know that the baby will claim within 30 minutes .... You can start the bottle!✓ Sterilization function..... This is also very practical for sterilizing teats, syringes.... or even bottles .✓ defrost function. So I think you can even thaw breast milk with a container that can withstand the heat.✓ cooking basket for small pot✓ small measuring cup included to pour the required water.

First of all: I bought the version compatible with the car. I use MAM glass bottles. The button in the middle is an "on" button only, but the device cuts off when there is no more water. So you have to put the exact measurement of water in it. It automatically turns on when you plug it in but otherwise it stays "off" and you have to press on to start the steam. In addition to that, there is a small on off button on the back that allows you to turn off the power. Personally, I never use it. There is a graduated water scoop provided with it to add the water. I put a line in the marker because I couldn't see much in it. Despite this, I find that the heat is not always the same from one bottle to another. I noticed that sometimes there is a little water left that had fallen with the steam, from one time to the next, which can suddenly break the measurement. Be careful when you immediately remove the bottle, there may be a risk of burns with the remaining steam. In terms of speed, I find it very satisfying. In less than a minute I have a bottle of 180 hot. The more water you add, the longer it takes of course. As for glass bottles, they come out hot. Warmer than in the microwave. However, the liquid inside is at the right temperature. It's a bit surprising at first. You should not hesitate to taste at the beginning to reassure yourself. I always cool the surface of the bottle with cold water because my daughter likes to hold it with her hands. After two months, the glass has not been damaged by this hot/cold system.

I like its design which is rather sober but very elegant with its gold finishes. I also like the fact that it has a touchscreen (timer countdown), sound notification and time and temperature adjustment. I find that its medium size is practical (no big bulk) and the fact that it is multifunctional is a big plus. The advantages:- Its bain-marie mode allows you to gently heat breast milk and preserve the nutrients in the milk.- Its bell and steam mode quickly heat milk and baby jars.- It allows the defrosting of small soups and baby jars.- It sterilizes bottles, teats, empty jars and others.- The times and temperatures can be adjusted with the + or – buttons.- It is compatible with most sizes and shapes of bottles and small basic jars.- It is easy to wash. I am satisfied and recommended.

The Blimbini is really great, I didn't know exactly if you can also screw on Atlas bottles, the support on the Blimbini site answered me immediately. The device warms up breast milk or water super quickly - compared to normal bottle warmers! The milk from the fridge sours for about 3 minutes, but you should swirl the milk so that the heat is better distributed. Cleaning is easy. My glass bottles from NUK and No Name bottles also fit without an adapter. Otherwise, the adapter for Mam also fits on the bottles.

We loved this bottle warmer as it has a very minimalist but at the same time very practical design.

It heats the bottle through hot steam, so it is not exactly the fastest system, but it does it in a way that I personally consider very suitable.

It has several modes, it can be programmed and in addition to serving for bottles, it also heats food jars, it can also sterilize and can keep products warm for up to 24 hours, making it a fantastic product that perfectly serves its purpose.

It is a bottle warmer-small jars very simple to use, once you have got used to dosing, which must be accurate to the nearest ml, depending on the nature of the bottle (glass or plastic) and the amount of milk. A table tells you whether you should pour 17ml or 23ml or 28ml .... This dosage is also the adjustment variable: if the bottle is not hot enough, you will have to add a little water for the next time, if it is too hot you will have to put a little less water.  We are getting to the point of dosing the last straw! Fortunately, the pod is practical, and it can be stored on the device itself. Once you have put the right amount of water, the bottle or the potty in the basket, simply press the power button (the only button on the device) and wait for the light to go out. It's fast, and it's practical because you can also use it in the car with the included adapter. A well-designed device.

Excellent bottle warmer, fast and versatile thanks to the home + car connection. Works very well with glass bottles (dodie), the plastic basket that allows you to collect the bottle is effective but not essential (I can take the bottle by hand without burning myself). The water pod can be stored directly on the bottle warmer, so you always have it at hand. In summary, excellent value for money

Poor quality product despite the design. Since we have it, no bottle has come out at the same and good temperature despite the respect of the graduations almost impossible to read except from an angle adjacent to the hypotenuse of the Pythagorean square. Suffice to say that it is better to call Thales to pour an approximate amount of water into the tank and thus burn your hands when taking out the bottle to dip your finger in it, at your own risk, and thus know if you should put it back to heat or put it back in the fridge! Move on and buy another bottle warmer!!

Aesthetic, practical, really a must, I breastfeed and being able to warm my milk gently was really my 1st criterion! (In the evenings I go out with my friends, I leave daddy some fresh milk that he gives to the baby warmed up with it) it also keeps warm, easy to clean, light, transportable, long load but possibility to do a lot of heating with it then... Go for it

The device has several functions, so it is very practical. Is primarily used for warming up milk and sterilizing it. The only thing is that it sometimes exceeds the desired temperature for a short time (set to 37 degrees, but is heated to 40 degrees). The temperature then drops back to the one you have set. Just goes on for a few minutes. So it's best to turn it on shortly before use and only put milk in when the temperature is stable. On the whole, we are very, very satisfied.

Well, blah blah. The impression of heating is quite deceptive: you grab the bottle which seems boiling, but in fact, the milk inside is not; hence a certain disarray during the first uses. The temperature in "fast mode" (heating the bottle to 37°) is quite fanciful. Checked with a probe, it oscillates between 26° and 32°, but never 37°. The heating time indicated will therefore have to be reviewed by the user, according to several criteria:- the material and brand of the bottle (plastic, glass, Advent or not)- the original temperature of the breast milk stored: room temperature (which is rare) or extracted from the refrigerator. This will therefore cause several experimental phases while Baby waits (I hope patiently) for his food. Our baby has not yet reached the age of feeding small pots, I cannot say anything about the heating efficiency for them.

The Nuliie Bottle Warmer is a great choice for parents 👶✨. It offers a multitude of functions, such as quick warming, sterilization, and keeping warm, making it very versatile 🌟. Its LCD display is intuitive and allows you to easily control the temperature and heating 🔧📊 time. Compact and efficient, it fits different types of bottles, which is super convenient for busy 🚼✅ families. I highly recommend it to simplify baby's meals! 🙌

An excellent ally for new moms or dadsMakes life much easierMakes sure that baby has his bottle well cleanedNo risk of contamination, especially in the first months of lifeThe Philips Avent range is clearly no longer to be presented and is a guarantee of quality and safetyI am very satisfied with itIn addition to sterilizing, it also dries the bottles evenlyI recommend this productExcellent value for money, I have seen the same more expensive one in store!

It simplifies daily life and it is very practical, there is a drying function which is excellent. It takes up little space and will fit even in a small kitchen, it is spacious despite being compact. There is an automatic function, I put 130 ml of water and I let it happen, it sterilizes bottles and accessories in 40 minutes I can store everything and everything is dry. If you have hard water at home you will absolutely have to use demineralized water in order to preserve your sterilizer

This bottle warmer was super useful to me in the first days of my daughter's life and I'm sure it will come in handy in a few weeks. I had to give a supplement of my milk to my daughter, however it was 15ml so really nothing and the babycook I own doesn't heat up so little ml. So I was lucky enough to be able to put the milk in the bottle warmer and warm it up like that before giving it to him. It's very easy to use, just pour the milk into the container and select the temperature. Personally 37 degrees. Then you have to wait a good minute and it's hot. Obviously the more liquid, the longer it takes but it's more than reasonable. This also keeps the heat in. It has a capacity of 340 ml and a battery life of 7 hours. It is recharged via USB. A good investment for people who like to travel and move with their baby.

I took this cordless portable bottle warmer because it's always a hassle when driving. This bottle warmer is much more practical than another that you have to plug into a cigarette lighter.  👍🍼Easy to use, it works with three buttons. Namely a first one in the center that allows you to turn the device on or off and then another button on each side of it to set the desired temperature. 🌡️The bottle warmer is totally airtight, if by accident you knock it over, there is no risk of burning. 👍🔥The liquid you want to heat is adjustable between 37 and 50 degrees, over a 7-hour autonomy. Heats up quickly! We are talking about heating a bottle, but of course it can also be used for herbal tea for example. ☕It runs on a rechargeable battery using a USB cable which is itself supplied.

I am satisfied with the product. I use it mainly for outdoor use. It is compact and fits perfectly in my changing bag. Its design is nice and the screen practical. The bottle is warm in less than 5 minutes. Not all bottles fit, you still have to look before choosing the bottles!
Load holds approximately 8-10 heaters.

Here we find Tigex quality with a well-designed and well-thought-out product. It will be used to warm a bottle as well as the baby jars when baby has grown, which I personally find better and more "safer" than in the microwave. In addition, they have affixed a "memo sticker" to the back of the product to help you on the duration and temperature of heating food or liquids. On the other hand, you have to have excellent eyesight because the annotated information is really ridiculously small!! Too bad! Otherwise its operation is simple, it is easy to clean and no heating problems encountered in testing. I particularly appreciate the fact that it can be used both at home and in the car via the cigarette lighter cord provided when you go on holiday or for the weekend. As it is quite compact without a button sticking out, it will not clutter you too much in the kitchen or in the trunk ;-)At 29.90 € the value for money is correct. So of course it is not an essential accessory but unlike the microwave, this one will be able to follow you everywhere in case of travel, which for me is precious. :-))

This bottle warmer is an absolute lifesaver on the go! I give a full 5 stars because he made our travels with baby so much easier.
The heat-up function is really lightning fast, which is worth its weight in gold, especially when the baby is hungry and there is no time to lose. I am particularly impressed by the long battery life of the 12000mAh battery. We were able to warm up several bottles without worrying about the battery running out – perfect for long car journeys or flights.
The two heating modes for breast milk and water are super convenient and ensure that the sensitive breast milk is not overheated. The 340ml capacity is sufficient for the common bottle sizes.
The device is robust, easy to use and fits easily in the diaper bag. A clear purchase recommendation for all parents who travel a lot!

It is a mid-range bottle warmer that has all the necessary options to take care of the newborn's feeding. When you plug it in, the front panel lights up with 3 lines:(1) The temperature display (or the timer)(2) The line of the 4 heating options(3) The line of the parameterization of the values +-In the options you have 4 heating choices:-------------------------------------------------(1) FAST or quick defrost- which triggers a timer like on the microwave around 3 minutes- (you can't adjust the temperature)(2) 24H or "bain-marie" function- which maintains the meal (or anything else) has something over 24 hours(3) FOOD the most useful function- which will heat the bottle or the jar to a temperature that is set around 70°c- (you can't set the time)(4) STERILIZE which goes up to 100°c to produce steam- (You can't set the temperature,  nor the duration)We see that these are options that are set by default to the most useful settings in practice- time for defrosting- or temperature for cookingKnowing that you will have to do some tests to get the best results- (a user guide is printed on the appliance)And we regret of course that all the controls are in English on the appliance. The bottom line allows:- Start the device- Increase or decrease the time or temperature values=> From an ergonomic point of view, whenever there is a choice to be made, the available buttons light up to guide the userThe equipment is supplied with:- 1 basket- 1 pod for water- 1 vapor barrier lid high enough to accommodate a large bottle- 1 user manual in FrenchThe design is quite classy and the screen very responsiveIN TOTAL:========-  It is a nice bottle 🍼 warmer that has both the basic functions such as: -* food preparation (bottle and jars) -* keeps it warm during the day of a product (for professional use such as a medical gel for example)- And advanced functions such as: -* Timed defrosting -* Steam sterilization of bottlesWith a simplified adjustment system to the essentials that avoids headaches.

We had been looking for a suitable companion for a long time that would replace the annoying thermos flask with all the necessary accessories and possibly unpleasant surprises. We were convinced by the bottle warmer with its design and easy handling, so we would like to recommend it to other parents who spend a lot of time in the great outdoors. Nevertheless, there is a point of criticism, because when the outside temperatures now come into full swing in summer, we have noticed that the bottle warmer has its problems and the battery empties very quickly for reasons that are not yet explainable. Unfortunately, we couldn't even load 1 bottle in sunny weather on the road without causing minor problems. However, it is absolutely recommended for mountain tours, just not suitable for a sunny warm beach stay.

This Babymoov bottle warmer allows you to heat all bottles regardless of their size, but also baby's small potties when he starts meals. Accessories are included:- a graduated pod to measure the volume of water to be added to heat the bottle- an adapter ring to be able to put any bottle or jar in it- a small basket to isolate direct contact with the heating plateIt is easy to use, quick to heat and its start-up is done using the button located on the front. When the bottle or jar is ready, the red light will turn off and the device will automatically shut off. With its very nice, modern design, it will find its place everywhere. It is easily transportable when traveling. It is very stable, no overturning problem will be able to happen. It is a very good product.

The sterilizer is designed for 6 bottles so it is large and therefore takes up a little space. It is rather well designed with its bell shape and its bottle tree in it. It is light and above all very easy to use: you have to remove the tray placed under the device to put the bottle tree. A pod (provided) of water on the base, put the bottle tree back with the clean bottles, the teats and the caps, put the bell, plug in and press the big button in front once and off you go: the steam comes out through the small holes everywhere and fogs the whole device very quickly, then 6 minutes later the timer sounds,  it's over. The bottles are not very wet because there is little water. We leave them dry and we can use them in peace, it's really nice this speed and with so little water.

We ordered the bottle warmer to try out, thank god we did. When our little one cries it takes 2 minutes and the bottle is ready to serve...... the bottles are kept constantly warm at 40° (with boiled water) and are immediately ready for use.... no boiling of water, no cooling or other complications (especially at night when it has to be done quickly). An incredible relief and Zeitersparnis.TOP RECOMMENDATION

Since breastfeeding unfortunately didn't work out, we needed a bottle warmer that could be used to quickly supply our son. The bottle warmer keeps the temperature so that we always have warm water, so we only have to add the powder and feed directly. It runs 24 hours a day, then unfortunately it peels off. It's best to set a timer so that you know when it peels off and you don't suddenly find yourself without warm water.

I am excited to share my experience with the device I purchased from this retailer. This device is not only extremely convenient, but it's also incredibly easy to use, which makes my everyday life much easier. However, recently I had a problem with the device, an unexpected failure that upset me but I immediately contacted the dealer to report the problem. Their response was remarkable: they responded quickly to my request and took steps to resolve the issue. I am grateful for their professionalism and commitment to customer satisfaction. This confirms my positive opinion of this dealer, and I will definitely continue to trust their service in the future. Thank you for their attention and assistance in this situation!

Hello,It has already been more than 4 months since we bought the bottle warmer from reveal baby. And we are very happy with it because it is very practical. A few days ago we broke the glass container and couldn't find this piece anywhere else. We contacted Reveal Baby via Amazon and received the new container after 3 days. Excellent after-sales service and very appreciable speed. Thanks to themI recommend the product 1000%

My large Tommee Tippee bottles fit in without any problem. For 210 ml bottles, it takes about 3 minutes to heat. The amount of water needed to heat the bottle, depending on the amount of water to be heated and its initial temperature (ambient/fridge), is noted on the side: no need to take out the instructions! Small and lightweight, it is easy to take on the go. It's quiet and versatile: it will also heat up the jars when baby grows. Its only drawback: the graduations on the dispenser are difficult to read. To remedy this, I put a marker line at the right height, which corresponds to the quantity of current bottles. It would have been perfect if it came with a cigarette lighter adapter for the car. Last point, its "Tulip" design is nice, which doesn't spoil anything in the kitchen.

Having the simple hot water bottle warmer from avent, I wanted to go for this model because I was struggling to thaw the breast milk that I stored in the freezer for my daughter. This bottle warmer has met this need and thaws milk very well before heating it. Heating is done quickly in just 3 minutes and above all, for mothers who have babies who are getting to food diversification, it's super practical to have this bottle warmer because it also heats baby's little jars. You just need to have Philips advent jars that are compatible with this bottle warmer. It is very easy to use (just turn the selector and choose the heating mode. A little extra, it keeps the bottle or the pot warm. It prevents me from wasting already heated breast milk.

Happy with the product. I mainly use it to heat bottles in 5 min mode for 240 ml.The "heat the jars" option is not practical because it requires 1 hour according to the operating manual. 40 seconds in a microwave is enough. If you only want to heat bottles, this product is perfect. The device remains old because there is no on off button but it's fine with me because it's practical to turn it on easily when needed. The operating manual seems complicated at first glance but after a few tries you find the marks. Negative point: It's a bit of a hassle to respect the 40 ml of water at the bottom of the device to use the device, but the other bottle warmers work on the same principle. At the end we make the level by eye.

Very practical bottle warmer. Bought several months ago for outings, it has become essential for us. Very practical for the night too, placed on the bedside table for a few minutes it takes to prepare the bottle. Easy and simple to use. Good quality materials and fully removable for cleaning. Glass container that does not alter over the course of use unlike plastic. Charges well and holds the charge well. Charging is even possible in the car. Heating water is no longer a problem. He follows us everywhere. Don't hesitate. In addition, after encountering a problem (breakage of a part) I contacted the after-sales service who answered me during the day. A solution was offered to me in order to repair my device and to be able to use it again. Product and seller at the TOP

Great product all around. Warms up quickly to the desired temperature (37, 40, 45 or 50). Actually, we had gotten the bottle warmer for on the go because it runs on battery and can be charged in the car, among other things. In the car. However, it is so practical that we also use it at home. Especially at night... the little one gets restless, you turn on the warmer and due to the keep warm function, it doesn't matter at all whether the bottle is needed directly or only in 1 or 2 hours. After some time we had the problem that the combination of warmer and bottle leaked (Nuk perfect match with matching adapter). The seller found a solution quickly, easily and super friendly! I have never experienced such a lovely customer service. Thank you very much! Every family with a bottle baby should get this warmer into their home.

I previously had a similar device from a no-name brand for myself. However, I wanted to give my brother-in-law something of higher quality and that's why I came across Grundig. You really can't go wrong here. Although the device was given away, I can still tell you a lot about it. I was looking for an affordable device with all the necessary features and found this one that, unlike other brands, combines all the functions in one device. With other brands, you have to buy a separate device for each function, but this one has it all. For us, the highlight is that it heats the bottles or water to 40 degrees and keeps them at that temperature continuously. This makes the nights stress-free – the water was always ready warm, and you only had to add the powder. The device can also sterilize within 15 minutes, which is great for pacifiers and bottles. What's especially handy is that you can sterilize many different bottles without having to stick to a specific brand. Even if the baby no longer needs a bottle, you can still use the device. My nephew is now 8 months old, and they still use it. It has a defrost function for frozen porridges and also heats porridge jars up to 70 degrees, which is still very helpful. I can't complain about anything and can only highly recommend it.

We bought the item less than 30 days ago, after 4 uses at home (so no difficult temperature conditions) the bottle warmer no longer works properly. The device charges up to 40% and then no further. Thus, only one bottle could be heated at most. Return although sale and shipping by Amazon is not possible, you are referred to the product support of TommeeTippee via link, only that the link leads to a non-existent website. During the applications, the device moderately heated the milk, the set temperature was questionably reached. In addition, the "alarm sound" is almost inaudible when the desired temperature is reached. So we would not recommend the item for daily everyday use, even with a functioning device.

I bought the portable bottle warmer from Momcozy because I was looking for something mobile for warming up milk on the go. The device is really super well thought out – handy, light and easy to use.

The heating time is really fast, after about three minutes the milk is ready to drink. I find the two heating modes particularly practical – one for breast milk and one for water. So you can adjust as needed without having to try around for a long time.

The battery lasts surprisingly long, I heated several bottles in a row without having to recharge directly. I also like the design – simple, modern and stable.

Ideal for on the go, excursions or at night when you have to go fast. All in all, a really helpful companion for parents - saves time and works reliably.

The portable bottle warmer convinces with its well thought-out technology and easy handling.
The option to switch between a milk and a water mode is particularly practical.
This makes everyday life on the road much easier. The temperature accuracy of 0.5 °C ensures that nothing overheats and that the desired temperature is reliably maintained. In just three minutes, the liquid is up to temperature, which is especially advantageous for restless babies.

With a capacity of 500 ml, the device offers enough space while remaining compact enough to be easily stored in a diaper bag. The battery allows up to 24 uses, making it possible to go on longer trips without constant charging.
The milk or water will be warm in no time and there is no risk of them heating up too much, because with the bottle you have the temperature fully under control.

The workmanship looks high-quality and stable, and the device is also comfortable to hold. Overall, this is an ideal solution for those who want to remain flexible on the go and yet do not want to sacrifice comfort and safety.

It is the evolution of the "thermoses" of a lifetime, and a very well achieved device: it has many uses, I usually use it to drink my coffee with milk very hot, but it also serves to heat the milk for the baby.

If we use water or milk from the fridge, heat it in about 5 minutes, but if we use it "of the time" with 2-3 is enough. It has a capacity of half a liter, has a triple anti-leak system (something that is very important to me, because I am fed up with thermos flasks that end up losing liquid) and is very comfortable to use.

It runs on a battery, which makes it perfect if we are away from home or at work. With each load we can use it for more than a week if we heat milk and almost a month with water. The temperature can be easily selected via a digital control and can be charged in just 1 1/2 hours using the power adapter included in the package.

It is super easy to use, and has details that make the difference, such as a resistant silicone ring to hang it (if we are camping or cycling). The touch is very pleasant, soft and it is very easy to clean.

Highly recommended!

I bought this Nuliie bottle warmer for my baby, and I'm really thrilled with its features. Fast heating and intelligent temperature control make it possible to heat breast milk or formula to the right temperature in just a few minutes. The digital timer and automatic shut-off are convenient additions that ensure safe and efficient use. I also like the versatility of this bottle warmer, which can heat bottles of different sizes and even small jars. The compact and stylish design fits perfectly into my kitchen, and the operation is simple and intuitive. I recommend this bottle warmer to all parents who are looking for a convenient, safe and efficient solution to heat their baby's milk.

Anyone who has a baby and is on the road thinks about the best way to get hot water for the milk powder or how to keep mother milk warm. So far I have always had a thermos flask with hot water with me. This was a good idea at first, but the milk was sometimes too hot or no longer warm enough.
That's why I ordered this bottle warmer.
Visually, it resembles a normal thermos flask, but has a few things in store. It is charged by cable. The charge level indicator can be read on the bottle itself.
Heating works, but not comparable to a kettle. You should plan a few minutes.
The decanting works without liquid spilling.
Due to its compact size, the bottle warmer finds its place in the diaper backpack.
A great solution for on the go. And can also be used after the bottle time if you want to drink a warm tea on the go.
The price is ok.

A super cheap bottle warmer, very easy to use, with a single knob to turn from right to left for precise adjustment of the heating power. It has a defrost function that can be adjusted for milk and frozen baby food. A lighted strapping indicates the power on when the bottle warmer is on. It is small in size so as not to take up too much space and to be taken everywhere. The opening is wide enough to accommodate just about all bottles, regardless of brand, and the small jars to make sure they are high enough. This Philips Avent bottle warmer is well designed, very good finishes. In the high average of prices. I recommend 😊I hope my comment will be helpful to your decision 👍

Very good product, unfortunately this bottle warmer no longer works after 3 months... The automatic shut-off stops the heating at you for a few seconds, while more than half of the water remains at the bottom... I hope it's an isolated defect but in the meantime I'm not satisfied with it...

I just tested the Momcozy portable milk warmer and I'm really delighted! 😍
It's super easy to use: I fill the thermos, plug it in, and in a few minutes the baby's milk is at the right temperature. I'm no longer afraid of being outside without a way to heat a bottle.

I love its compact size, it fits easily in my changing bag, and I can prepare several bottles without having to refill it all the time. And above all, it is reassuring to know that the milk heats evenly and without overheating.

For me, it has become a must-have for outings or travel. I recommend it to all moms who want a practical and safe little help to feed baby! 👶💛

Now I'm won over and so is my sister! A compact all-in-one! I had a basic fascinator warmer and obviously I wanted to test this one with my sister and my little niece. It heats the water gently, just like breast milk, which retains all its qualities without boiling in the microwave... The principle is to screw your bibi tommee tipee or advent them thanks to the nozzle provided and to heat only the liquid, not the container thanks to the inverted position of the bibi.3 available temperatures and charge level visible by LED. The must is its nomadic side with the battery rechargeable by USB-C/ USB-A but the adapter is not included. I recommend even if I find it a bit expensive 😊I hope my comment will be useful to your decision 👍🏻

Now I'm won over and so is my sister! A compact all-in-one! I had a basic fascinator warmer and obviously I wanted to test this one with my sister and my little niece. It heats the water gently, just like breast milk, which retains all its qualities without boiling in the microwave... I've had it myself for 2 years, I love it. I bought it from my best friend for the birth of her son a month ago she validates it at 200%the only advice I can give is to use demineralized water instead of tap water, to avoid limescale on the resistance it allows me to use vinegar less often.so I disinfect with a sponge and vinegar once a week and I clean it otherwise just with a sponge and dishwashing liquid during the weekwhile at the beginning I used vinegar and I had to leave it on to remove the limescale at the bottom and I was afraid that the coil would not hold longtemps.je am very happy and I am sure it will hold for baby 2I recommend 200%

A bottle warmer is not essential.. before we use it!! We often think of you and that it's a gadget and that only the microwave is enough, except that no shooting, approximate temperature, never at the right temperature, heating time too long ... no worries with this type of device, and even less with those of Philips Avent. The brand specializes in childcare and it is quite successful. A few years ago (less than a decade but still) I bought a bottle from the range and I was satisfied. My sister has just given birth, she wanted one, so I recommended this one. Already, by its compact shape, it is very easy to store. Large, it is suitable for all shapes of bottles. Light, it can be nomadic and follow you everywhere. In terms of technical quality, it heats up quickly, has the defrost function, and can be adjusted according to the volume, perfect for following baby from birth to 3 years old and over. It is equipped with the smart control function: By means of a smart sensor it detects the baby's basic temperature and warms him up so that he is at the right temperature. Smart and no headaches! A real favorite and practical choice for this product which is really very affordable.

This heater has solved my life since in a few minutes I have the milk or water at the right temperature, without stress and without spills. Its design is compact, fits perfectly in the baby's bag and the battery lasts long enough for a whole day out. In addition, it does not weigh much and cleans quickly.
I highly recommend it.

Practical, takes up very little space, takes no more than two minutes to heat the bottles, really a great product, at a reasonable price. I have not tested the device in travel configuration with the cigarette lighter but this possibility is in the continuity of all the features offered by this product. An excellent surprise, good quality, I highly recommend.

Heats everywhere, really practical: two dedicated modes (breast milk/water) and rapid temperature rise, without "hot spots".
500 ml tank + leak-proof insulated bottle: perfect for a day of outings or for two bottles in a row.
Credible battery life: several cycles without recharging; The indicator avoids surprises.
Compact size (≈600 g) and simple tank cleaning; Lid and seals fit well in the bag.
One hand can be used in emergencies, clear interface.

Things to know & tips
• For breast milk, turn on dedicated mode and shake gently to homogenize.
• Preheat the water a little in winter to save time; Keep the bottle tightly screwed on to limit swallowed air.
• Fast charging, but only use the included adapter; Do not plug other devices into it.
• Rinse after mineral-rich mineral water to limit deposit.

A relief when preparing bottles, especially at night. The "anti-stomach ache" automatic is nonsense in my opinion. How should that work? I bought this model because it is from Grundig and has good reviews. Identical models are also available on Amazon for about 8 euros less. I don't know if there is a difference. Probably not. 😉

Satisfactory product, does the job
Negative point: The heating indications on the instructions in relation to the ml are not good, the bottle is boiling but the water/milk inside is cold I had to add 1min or even 1min5 of heating. So be careful because very hot bottle at the
end.Positive point: emits an audible signal at the end, adjustable temperature and heating time, the heating system automatically cuts off to the desired temperature no need to stay next to monitor to heat the bottles but also puree, small jar, and thaws too.
Small, easily transportable, ideal for night trips for example (heat during a diaper change for example).

Super practical and quick at home, the use of bottle warmers is deplorable in the car. It takes 10 minutes of heating in a cigarette lighter connection for the temperature of the liquid (~180ml) to rise a little (not hot enough yet). After which we take out the catch and 2nd surprise... The cigarette lighter socket of the device is hot. We bought 2 identical Tigex car/home bottle warmers and both have a problem I literally burned my leg to the point of having a blister... The tip of the cigarette lighter socket touched my leg about 0.5 seconds, well 30 seconds after being unplugged.

In itself, the device is designed for 2 bottles. So if you have twins, this is the right place for you. It is best to use glass bottles, as they are heavier and do not float away. At least that happens when they are not completely full. Otherwise, everything works very well and as described. Highly recommended for double bottle warmer use.

Certainly on paper this bottle warmer was promising. The brand has accustomed us to top design and functionality on most of its products, but here, we are in a state of incomprehension: the bottle warmer is slow, it does not adapt to the temperature of the bottle, it heats the water in a very traditional way and then you have to wait for the necessary time, obviously different if the bottle or the jar was in the fridge or at room temperature for its preparation. So we are on an ultra-traditional bottle warmer ... without any brand advantage from our point of view! The liquid stirring function did not seem to us to be dazzling in its efficiency either.

I bought this bottle warmer to warm my breast milk in the Mam bottles. It worked well for 2 weeks, with 4 bottles of 120ml per day coming out of the fridge. And then on the 16th day, I found it charging only at 80% while it had been plugged in all night. I first thought it was a problem with the plug adapter but even when I change the plug adapter (and even the plug at all) it doesn't charge properly anymore. This morning, I found it only 40% charged. Too bad, it was a pretty well thought out bottle warmer. A small downside too, the seals of the Mam adapter are not easily found and only one is provided. So I'm disappointed with this purchase

I bought this bottle warmer to warm my breast milk in the Mam bottles. It worked well for 2 weeks, with 4 bottles of 120ml per day coming out of the fridge. And then on the 16th day, I found it charging only at 80% while it had been plugged in all night. I first thought it was a problem with the plug adapter but even when I change the plug adapter (and even the plug at all) it doesn't charge properly anymore. This morning, I found it only 40% charged. Too bad, it was a pretty well thought out bottle warmer. A small downside too, the seals of the Mam adapter are not easily found and only one is provided. So I'm disappointed with this purchase

Following my comment below, the seller contacted me to offer me a shipment of a new product. I accepted their proposal without really believing in it. Nice surprise when I received this morning the new bottle warmer in perfect working order. I had recommended this bottle warmer to my friends and family but I was disappointed by its rapid obsolescence. I will recommend this product again, especially for the impeccable after-sales service. Thank you.Very good for its function, but after three months of daily use, the buttons no longer show any brightness... not practical at night. Too bad...

I very rarely write a review, but since I've been a mom, I have to say that this part was one of the best investments for me. Absolutely suitable for breast milk and powdered milk. I measured myself with a thermometer and had only one degree deviation upwards. Easy to clean, the battery can withstand a longer time, can be stowed in a backpack to save space. Tiptop!! Especially at night a game changer. While you are making the diaper, the breast milk/or water for the PreMilch is ready.

This bottle warmer is ideal for warming breast milk, as it is not microwave safe. Here, the bottle warmer is quick and simple. Just add water, put the bottle in the basket, select a mode and it's ready to beep. The screen is quite large which allows good visibility, the touch works very well, there are not many modes which makes it easy to use. It can also be used for sterilization, keeping warm, or thawing. The price is a low price in the childcare bottle warmer range, yet it works very well so I can only recommend it.

I bought this bottle warmer to go on holiday with my 3 and a half month old daughter. It's really practical, you stop everything, you plug the bottle warmer into the trunk and off you go! On the cigarette lighter socket you still have to wait 15-20 minutes to get a bottle at the right temperature. On the mains socket, the water boils very quickly (The slogan "Heats up in 60 seconds" is really respected, be vigilant and reactive! (I don't use it on the mains for my part)I just regret the cigarette lighter cable a little too short for my taste. This is a good travel bottle warmer. But I don't recommend it for regular use

Personally I heat my breast milk there, but sometimes I have to heat it 2 times, on the highest level when it's only a 120-130 ml bottle, it's a shame because it makes the heating longer! Otherwise it's great for all brands of bottles, I use the Easy Start from MAM

The portable bottle warmer convinces with its easy handling and fast heat-up time. Especially when you're on the go, it's helpful that the temperature is kept constant, so you always have a warm bottle at hand. The large capacity is practical, and operation is intuitive, without complicated settings.

The battery life does what it says on the tin, making the warmer flexible to use – whether it's in the car, on trips or on a walk. The design is compact enough to easily store in the diaper bag. Overall, a solid solution for stress-free feeding away from home.

What a disappointment when I saw the price, the brand, the fact that it is multifunctional, defrosting, warms baby's meals and the automatic temperature adjustment, I said to myself, wow, the best, then I ended up taking out my old bottle warmer 1st price which works much better and faster, I prefer to waste a few seconds cooling the bib if it is too hot with it than to wait a lead to look at The pretty light on the on/off button flashes for a null result because it doesn't heat my 240ml bottles properly.

I bought this product to heat the bottle of our little bou on the move in the car. Finally the alume cogarre mode takes a lot of time 15min easily. It is clearly in direct power outlet, the bottle is heated in 3 min max. Overall the product does its job well and has an excellent value for money.

Once again, the brand does not disappoint me. This sterilizer is imposing in size, everything that touches milk or food or simply baby's mouth, can be sterilized, even bottles from other brands. Simply fill the tray with water and start the desired cycle. Drying takes half an hour longer than disinfecting (10 minutes). We find it healthier to dedicate a machine to baby's world. Indeed, by leaving the lid closed, everything remains perfectly tidy and sanitized for 24 hours.

The design of this bottle warmer is quite nice, it fits well into the kitchen décor without being too bulky. You can possibly bring it with you on trips. Bottles fit there without any problem. They heat up quite quickly. Once you have mastered the dosages, this device is very practical on a daily basis. An automatic shut-off is programmed. On the other hand, it's a shame that there isn't a beep at the end of the cycle. The advantage is that it can also be used to heat up small jars. As a result, this bottle warmer is rather versatile and the investment is worth the candle. Very satisfied.
This purchase is simply great! The design quality, elegant design, and ease of use make this product an impeccable choice. Fast delivery, efficient customer service. 100% recommended! 👌

The big strength of this product is that it has two functions, it is both an electric bottle sterilizer and a drainer. No need for a microwave, here it is a sterilizer that works on the mains. Once finished, just remove my bell and the base and there we have our bottles on their drainer. It's great that it combines the two, it's a big space saver. Very easy and quick to use. We sterilize bottles, teats, pacifiers, breast pump shields... etcIts shape makes it more compact than my usual bottle drainer.

Bottle warmer is portable delivered with the USB cordand especially this plugSimplicity to useIt is nomadic thanks to this battery that lasts all dayI can easily heat more than 4 bottles without problemThe temperature chosen even at the maximum 55° heats up in 3 minutesAt 37° in less than 2 minutesI can leave quietly my baby will always have his milk warmThe cleaning is simple, quick with soapy waterIt is not heavy and not too bulky perfect for the outside pocket of my changing bagIt can be a perfect birth gift, I can't do without it anymore

A well-designed, on-the-go device that saves moms!!
No more adventures to find a microwave in a restaurant or supermarket, it's THE solution for travel and travel.
Really too good and effective, no more stress and hassles if it's too hot or too cold, a simple click on the buttons and presto, it heats up to the right temperature, it's really very easy to use!  It's effective and a very good investment in his life as parents.
Excellent value for money, knowing that we will keep it for at least 2 and a half years!  Top!
Thank you Momcozy!! I absolutely recommend to all parents, it will make your life much easier!

Simple and fast, it is a device that is easy to use on a daily basis. It is intuitive: 1 wheel, 1 button. The capacity is indicated (in ml and oz), just turn the dial to the appropriate capacity and press the button, you're done. No need to monitor the device. The heating time is fast and above all heated to the right temperature. On the other hand, even if I didn't have any bad surprises with the temperature, always pour a few drops on your hand before giving the bottle (you never know). Note: it works on mains power only.

So make it short, the device is:- made of the cheapest plastic- design and controls from the 50s- quality that you knew from Grundig apparently no longer existsWhat a star brings for us:- The device goes off automatically at some point, usually at night when you need it- temperature displayed on the outside is totally inaccurate, water measured with fever termometer is +3 degrees warmer water. Very stupid. We don't use sterilize because it's too small for it. No purchase recommendation we are looking for something qualitative and better, above all more accurate and reliable

This bottle warmer heats bottles and jars quickly and very well. This is ideal because it does not overheat the milk like a microwave. A very good product for quickly and efficiently heating baby food. Especially when the baby is impatient to eat, it is a great ally. The heating time is fast, less than a minute or so. I am satisfied with the product. In addition, it does not take up much space and is easy to transport for travel. A small amount of water is enough to turn it on. The delivery was fast.

This bottle warmer is an essential object for young parents. I find it really good for several reasons:- good size, practical for transport- heats well, no bad surprises- plugs into a car socket, it's an asset!- excellent value for money. I recommend!

This bottle warmer is just perfect for parents on the go or those looking to avoid nighttime interruptions in baby's sleep. In just 2 minutes, it heats milk/water, providing a quick and effective solution. Its versatility makes it an ideal companion even after the baby phase, perfect for picnics. Its aesthetic design and solidity make it a safe and reliable choice. I sincerely recommend it to all parents looking for a practical and effective solution. A very nice discovery, I'm happy!

Perfect bottle warmer!- it is very pretty- it is efficient and allows you to heat safely- it is easy to use, and efficient- excellent value for money. No unpleasant surprises with Advent, you are sure of what you are buying. Perfect to take with you.

Unfortunately, something broke in the interior of the device during the transport of our first bottle warmer. Blimbini took over the return. We ordered a second one and are still totally enthusiastic about the device. Very nice handwritten greeting cards.

After a long search on the net, by far the fastest and most efficient. The quality, solidity and speed are at the appointment. It is also possible to use it in the car with the cable provided that you just have to plug in or unplug without forgetting to put the device in car mode. It's just a shame that it is not possible to remove the classic power cable when using it in the car. It would have been nice to come with a pod to put the right level of water in the device. I recommend it 100%.

This portable bottle warmer was given to me by my mom and I'm super happy with it. Both the packaging and the product itself are of quality. The instructions for use are simple and clear. For me, it keeps its promises and seems precise in the heating temperature. In addition, we know the exact temperature of the liquid at the moment T and the percentage of battery remaining. I don't ask for anything better for such a product. It is really perfect! Not to mention that I had to contact the after-sales service for a mistake I did and they were responsive and kind.

The Blimbini has become one of the most important things of our initial equipment for us! We just take it with us everywhere and at night it is next to the bed, so you don't even have to get up to prepare the bottles. Cleaning is really easy and it's just super cool that you can use it for a wide variety of bottle types. Someone really thought about the production. A small drawback may be the battery, which could last a little longer, because from 40% residual charge, the heating of the water takes quite a long time, whereas at 100 and 80% it is done in no time at all (big advantage with a very impatient baby ;)) We would recommend it at any time with a clear conscience!

Never disappointed with the Nuliie brand, very practical on a daily basis and simple to use, allows you to easily warm up the bottle, programmable functions and timer. Can also be used to defrost vacuum-packed food, for example. Great product

Excellent bottle warmer. We leave the very famous Bib'-espresso which took between 15 and 18 minutes to heat a 330 ml fascinator in a bain-marie, while this one, barely 4 very short minutes and bam! it's ready. Without regret, we strongly recommend it ;-)

Express: I don't think soI put 5 minutes in home mode to heat the little jar out of my baby's fridge. When I heat a brick blediner in the bottle, I have it for 3 to 4 minutes. I only use it for that. In addition, the bottle stops heating automatically after a few seconds while the jar has not even finished heating... you have to keep pressing the button constantly...? I have the espresso bib which is faster and more practical to prepare bottles but too long for small jars.

Excellent, easy to use. I like the temperature to be adjusted in relation to the amount of milk. And I appreciate its speed. The only "downside" I would say is that there is not a small sound signal when it's ready, but without that it's an excellent bottle warmer.

The bottle warmer is very practical and takes up little space. My son drinks his milk hot and not at room temperature, with keeping warm, I can start his alarm clock and keep the bottle at temperature to add only the milk. The usb charger is very good because you can charge it in the car if needed. Heating the bottles to 40 degrees, it makes me 3 bottles because when I get to 40% battery it doesn't heat up to 40 anymore.Happy with my purchase.

I was looking for exactly such a thing, the other reviews and reviews from other mothers convinced me to order the product.

And what can I say, I am enthusiastic about this product and can only recommend it. It's worth every penny.

I got this bottle warmer so that I don't have to go to the kitchen at night because of the bottles. The device is next to the bed and when my baby wakes up at night, I have the bottles at the perfect temperature at hand. This makes things easier and my baby doesn't have to wait long. The operation is very easy after reading the manual. You have to note that the device turns off automatically after 24 hours. Since we take it off the power when we leave the house anyway, it has never run for 24 hours at a time. We have had the bottle warmer for 4 weeks now and everything works perfectly. I am very satisfied with this item and my baby gets warm milk immediately. Clear purchase recommendation!

Very disappointed with this bottle warmer. If you leave the cycle complete, the bottle will be too hot (I use glass bottles from the NUK brand). So I was forced to control the temperature by putting a barbecue probe in the milk with the bottle open... Very long waiting times for the start and for the different cycles. I got tired of it and today I switched to a bottle warmer from a competitor brand that heats milk well to 37 degrees in 30 seconds. It changed my life!

Impeccable manufacturing and quality, it is a bit imposing for the capacity, but this is due to the double stainless steel wall which allows the milk or water to be kept at the right temperature over time, without necessarily needing to reheat. This makes energy consumption very limited once the heating mode is engaged.
 It can be charged either via USB or with the supplied mains power supply (18 V, 2 amps). The lid and cap are lockable and of course perfectly leak-proof.

We are not completely satisfied with this product... The 60-second heat-up time is random. It is sometimes much + long, while we always put the same dosage of water. As a result, the bottle is too hot, in this case. Sometimes the water in the bottle evaporates. As a result, we are forced to supplement the bottle. However, it's still very practical to have a bottle warmer of this type, which is adaptable, in the car AND at home. It doesn't take up too much space in the diaper bag.

I regret it because I finally find that this round design takes up space on our table compared to a rectangular shape. Another disadvantage: it is easy to touch the button by mistake and there is no way to disable it... Except turn it off. I don't know if all similar products are like that. It's stressful when it happens the first time. But anyway, we do well with this product now after a month of use. Not too many regrets.

After 3 months of use, I can do a check-up and I find that it works a bit randomly. The bottle sometimes comes out as cold as it came in and sometimes it comes out really hot. Fortunately no case of burning, and my baby is not very picky because he likes cold and hot bottles as much, but with a baby who really asks for a bottle at 37C precisely it seems really complicated to me

Very practical bottle warmer allows you to retain heat or heat water more or less quickly (about 5/6min) to the desired temperature. Once the water has reached the desired temperature, it is kept warm. Super practical for holidays or when traveling or you don't necessarily have access to a hot spot. The charge is quite good. You can easily last 2/3 days depending on your use. The bottle is lightweight, compact and opens easily with one hand.

After we were disappointed with another product (Milky now) because it worked but the water tasted like plastic, we decided on this better thermos flask.
It works great for us, keeps the water constant at 37°C and you can always take it with you.
The battery could be a bit more powerful. If the temperature is kept at 37°C, it lasts about 1.5 days. Then you have to recharge via USB C.
Furthermore, I could imagine that some people are annoyed by the relatively bright display. However, we just put something in front of it :)

We are definitely super satisfied and the second thermos flask has already been ordered.

This portable bottle warmer from Momcozy is simply ingenious and has revolutionized our outings with baby! I find it particularly practical that it works completely without a socket and heats up milk or water quickly and easily and keeps warm on the go. Super user-friendly is the simple operation with the buttons for temperature adjustment and the two storage profiles for milk and water. And best of all, it is of high quality, easy to clean and absolutely leak-proof thanks to the lockable lid. For all parents who want to prepare baby milk flexibly and carefree on the go, this bottle warmer is an absolute top recommendation - we are completely thrilled!

I am quite satisfied with this bottle warmer, I bought it to replace another competitor model that no longer worked. At first, I found the finishes a bit coarse and the bottle warmer quite bulky. The fact that the container is made of glass is a big plus, as is its 300 ml capacity. On the other hand, we have not been able to separate the protection from the glass container, so we are forced to wash them assembled. After charging it to 100% and unplugging it from the charger, it took 3 min to heat 210 ml of water to 37 degrees, it's really fast. I then left "keep warm" to find out how long the battery could last in autonomy (without charger) and well to my surprise, after 9 hours of "keep warm", there was 18% battery left!! I also checked that the temperature indicated was the right one, it was just 1 degree higher than the one announced. Knowing that the water is then transferred to the bottle... It is clear that the degree is lost in the process, so the temperature is rather fair. It remains to be seen if this battery life will last over time....I will put a new message in a few months to come back on this subject.

We are delighted with our purchase. After 2 months of intense use on holiday in particular, this kettle has become indispensable to us! The battery can heat 5 to 7 bottles without having to recharge it.  And when baby is older, it will allow us to heat the water to make our coffee or tea on a walk! Finally, the after-sales service is particularly responsive. We highly recommend this product!! Well done!

It is excellent. It heats up very quickly, about 2 minutes to go from the fridge to 40°C.  It is practical and lightweight, recharges quickly. The after-sales service is top-notch. We dropped the bottle warmer and they answered us and sent the spare part quickly.

I'm not one who writes reviews and usually I've never had problems, but honestly I needed this bottle warmer and I received a product that doesn't turn on I don't know how to charge and it doesn't work and honestly it annoys me a bit because it was in an emergency and among other things it doesn't even cost cheap, so now I'll have to wait more time to make the return and so on ... among other things, sellers on Saturday and Sunday do not exist so absurd stuff!

Great bottle warmer, quick heat temos nothing to complain about, it is very practical especially when you go on a walk with a baby who only drinks his warm fascinators. Great design, very refined! Unfortunately, we only used it once because we dropped the glass from the bottle warmer, but the customer service was very responsive and we received the spare part very quickly! A very big thank you!!

We ordered this item to meet our needs. Big disappointment, the device is supposed to stop automatically after a certain heating time but unfortunately we are forced to unplug after each use otherwise it continues to work (boil) non-stop. So we're talking about automatic shut-off, please check your devices before selling them. More.kabut I wouldn't buy devices on the site. Better go to the store.

I thought it was great, unfortunately since today it doesn't work anymore it doesn't turn on anymore even though it's only been 5 months that I've been using it, my daughter only drinks 4 bottles a day and 5 when she was smaller, so we don't use it much so it's really disappointing that it's already dead. Buying a bottle warmer so that it doesn't work so quickly is really annoying, especially since you find yourself in an embarrassment with nothing left to heat the bottles.

The product convinced us. We have to feed with powder pre-food and at first struggled to pour the correctly tempered water mixture together at night. All time that the child then spends restlessly or screaming because it is hungry. With the bottle warmer it is a piece of cake. Simply put the pre-potioned amount in the correctly tempered bottle, shake and ready to go. The baby is happy and especially the parents. In the meantime we have bought a second one because it is so practical during the day. With two bottles you are also very well stocked. We were worried whether the wide Avent bottles would fit in, but that worked great.

Bottle warmer from the famous brand momcozy
Its cordless use makes it possible to heat anywhere, even in the car or at the park, and the milk reaches the right temperature in just a few minutes.
The large 500ml capacity is very convenient
He heats the water in 3 minutes and the milk in 5 minutes
The autonomy is impressive, I can do several heaters without recharging
Fast charging in 1 hour 30 minutes
The supplied charger is specific, cannot be used for other devices

A quality product, well made and finished, super practical. Allowing to have a content at the right temperature even at the outlet. The thermos function is also practical, the temperature is well preserved. The battery can therefore be saved by placing a heated liquid beforehand.
