It will only take a few minutes of heating to reach the set temperature. Charging is fast via USB-C. The only downside is the price, which will not be within everyone's reach.

A great product to have absolutely.
Having 2 young children I didn't have a solution for long trips, I have already tried the bottle warmer on a cigarette lighter but it heated the bottle and not the contents.
This one is perfect, you can choose the temperature, the charge lasts a lot of time and the heating time is not ridiculous. The price is justified and not excessive in view of the quality.
I just regret not taking this product sooner

Beautiful design, convenient to use. But 3 big disadvantages and size:- heating time more than 1 minute. Often, I have to reheat so that the bottle is at the right temperature. I finally opted for heating in the microwave. So this is a product that does not meet its initial function. To do it again I wouldn't have bought it.- no "cigarette light" or USB cables for car trips.- small potty: no basket.

If you see this review, don't buy this bottle warmer. At first it works and heats up quickly but now it's been 1 month and it doesn't heat up as well anymore. What was good is that it heated up quickly at the beginning and it was good because when baby cries it can't wait. But now for the bottle to be warm you would have to leave it for 10 minutes and it's too long. And I only had 1 month to send it back and I exceeded by a day. Really bad

With its sleek design, this bottle warmer promised to be simple and quick to use. And then we also trust the brand... Result: it doesn't heat anything at all, the bottles don't even come out warm because the water barely heats up, and this regardless of the capacity chosen... I thought that the MAM silicone bottles might be the problem but after running it on empty it turns out that the water barely lukewarms too... so really to be avoided!

I bought this product for the baby in the end, I use it to prepare my cups of tea when I'm on the go.
It's super practical, you can choose the temperature (which avoids burning yourself). For baby's milk or water, it's really ideal when you leave the house. For the moment, the battery holds up well and we haven't had to recharge it often.
Charging on USB C port, convenient since everyone has it now at home or in the car.

Very nice design and easy to use. For the moment used only to warm breast milk and water to prepare bottles of infant milk. Heating time of about 3 minutes respected, the milk may seem cold to us adults but it is at the ideal temperature for baby. I just regret that there is no bell to signal the end of the ideal heating time, you have to pay attention to the light signals but this is a detail.

So what about this bottle warmer... There are several points to emphasize:From a heating point of view, this heat it up but gently gently you shouldn't be in a hurry. From a quality point of view, unfortunately I don't think I'll leave it plugged in unattended and I don't recommend you to do it, the plastic is very cheap and I'm afraid it will melt. Otherwise the concept was good for this price it is easy to use but I don't think it will last, too bad

We had invested in this bottle warmer to be able to make the bottles directly in our room rather than going down two floors... Failure. The warm-up time is rather long and when the baby cries next to it, every second seems like an eternity. I left it longer than expected hoping it would be warm but it was never enough. I turned the product over and we went back downstairs... The microwave did the job much better.

This product is superb! No need to plug in a bottle warmer in the car that can take a long time to heat, this bottle warmer is great: it has a battery that lasts a very long time. You can even anticipate the heating of the water (4 min for 210mL) and let the device keep the water at the desired temperature. Really practical! We take it everywhere as soon as we leave the house. A little extra: the customer service is really responsive and kind! Don't hesitate any longer!

Bottle warmer after several months of useThe doser is not correct, I always have to restart the bottle warmer a second time so that it is at the right temperature and if I add slightly too much water to my second warmer the bottle is the container is boilingPut easily 1 to 2 minutes before being ready which can be complicated if baby is squeezed 🤣Still mitigating but I will consider that it is me who is a bad use

The best investment since the baby is born. At the beginning we thought naively, no one needs bottle warmers, we warm up water when needed. Two days later came the realization that the thing is needed, as soon as we ordered the hope was high that our bottle warmer would come soon and when it arrived the relief was great. About the function: Keeps water warm directly on drinking temperature, suitable for disinfecting bottles and heating meals, only that the device switches off after 24 hours must be kept in mind. Temperature can be set exactly from 37 to 80 degrees, device also shows is and should temperature.

We ordered the bottle warmer / sterilizer because I unfortunately have to feed and we now of course use bottles. To then quickly warm up the vials and also sterilize them. We always sterilized with a pot at first but that was not really good, constantly a white stuff remained on the bottles, I guess limescale. With the device it is now much easier to get the bottles sterilized. Wash it out briefly in the sink and then into the device.So far everything is running perfectly and we are glad to have bought the device. It is used several times a day and is worth buying.

Article that I don't recommend yet I was delighted with it at first. Convenient, fast, sterilizing properly.. but almost not even a month of use this one was already no longer working .. Amazon exchange it to me. and again the same problem... For a sterilization time of about 6 minutes, it rings at less than 30 seconds of sterilization to announce the end 😔🤨 of the damage.

The bottle warmer is effective in quickly warming breast milk without getting burned. Sometimes a little random on the temperature depending on whether the milk is room temperature or in the fridge. Easy to use (1 button only) and a water dispenser. I appreciate that it stops automatically at the end of the heating. Design is very simple, not too bulky. Good value for money. I use it mostly at home because it requires a standard plug.

It's a bottle warmer that does what is expected of it... provided that you scrupulously follow the quantities of water to be applied, depending on the volume of the bottle to be heated. It's very precise, to the milliliter, and the mini doser (supplied with the device) unfortunately has graduations that are difficult to read under the kitchen bulb. It's pretty with its flower shape, but I find it impractical and that's still the main thing.

The first word that comes to mind to define this product: PERFECT! It's really a must-have item when you have a baby! If you are on the go you have no stress wondering where you will heat the bottle, and above all, unlike most other bottle warmers, this one is portable, no need for a power outlet at hand! I recommend it 100%

I bought this item as a gift for a couple who had a child in June 2017.I noticed, when visiting them, that they use it on a daily basis. I also used it myself when they came to my house. It is a practical, easy-to-use appliance that provides a complete service for a small footprint in the kitchen. It warms up both jars of purees and bottles. I recommend to couples with young children.

It is clear that this sterilizer is quite bulky but it is often the case. It is very high. I remember the one I used for my daughter and her three cousins, it was a little lower but wider so in terms of size it is the same. This one is made for all bottles, at least a very large majority, given its size and height. You will need to use demineralized water to pour into the tank. It sterilizes and dries bottles and accessories: up to 6 bottles and on the upper deck teats and small spoons when the baby starts to integrate compotes into his food. Three symbols at the bottom of the device announce three possible settings: a short sterilization mode, about ten minutes (including heating time), an automatic mode that sterilizes and then dries (it lasts about 40 minutes), and a drying mode only (it lasts about 30 minutes). It is through use that each parent will realize the usefulness and preference of one mode over another. There is a small pair of pliers to retrieve the pacifiers and pacifiers. Noise level, it is reasonably noisy, it does not differ from those we have had in the family and I always ran my sterilizer at any time of the day without it disturbing.

This sterilizer is really very easy to use: you put the bottle bottles (up to 6) in the bottom compartment, the teats and lollipops in the upper basket, a bottom of water (ideally demineralized, it will limit the need for descaling the machine over time) in the tank at the bottom and that's it. A single button on the machine with three positions to choose from (auto mode, sterilization mode only, drying mode only), it couldn't be simpler. Certainly the sterilizer is quite big, but that's the price of fame since it can hold up to 6 large bottles at the same time. (compatible with all brands it seems; personally I have Avent, Tommee Tippee, Nuk and all these beautiful people fit without any problem) The drying function works well, I can't find any water residue on the neck of the bottles when I get out. In addition, the sterilizer can be dismantled into parts that are very easy to clean, which is practical. My only criticism: the high noise level of the drying function. Our kitchen being far from the bedroom this is not particularly annoying, but for this reason I avoid turning it on during the day. The duration of the complete cycle (announced 40 minutes) does not bother me since we run it at night so the important thing is that the bottles are ready in the morning.

Before coming to the major flaws of this product, let's talk about the positive points that make you deserve the 5 stars:1. Simple and convenient: That's all you ask. You can leave the water in it. Insert the bottle or jar and press the button. Nothing more.2. Usefulness. So, frankly, before using it, I think that if someone had told me about the product, I would have gently mocked the buyer: "Do you think our parents needed this?". But in reality, it's just ultra essential, once you have one because it's really easier than the microwave to adjust the temperature.3. Standardization. I have to admit that there is no hot spot. This is the principle of the bain-marie but kettle-style with a temperature conservation function. And I come to the only downside: the weather. It's really long in real life. Especially if you take your milk out of the fridge. In an asterisk, it is stated that:" *With 150 ml of milk at a temperature of 20 °C in a 260 ml Philips Avent Natural bottle"So, in real life, in the real world of the true truth, with a plastic bottle coming out of the fridge, it takes about ten minutes. Afterwards, once we know it, we just do it accordingly. It's still very simple. I put the bottle in it, I throw. A minute before the end, I go to get the baby, and it's settled. It's just the first time you have to wait that's frustrating. In addition, if you have read my comment so far, you should avoid this first surprise. You're welcome, huh? ;)

First of all, it is necessary to specify that we bought this bottle warmer to warm fresh breast milk (less than 24 hours old) straight out of the fridge (at a temperature of 3°C for optimal storage). We wanted a bottle warmer to make sure we had the right temperature (for fear of getting too cold or too hot). I would also like to point out that I have always followed the instructions for use to the letter. Result? It doesn't work! The milk is still cold at the end of the program. So I question myself. Is it because the milk to be heated is too cold? I have the feeling that this bottle warmer could work perfectly well with powdered milk where the water to be heated is often at room temperature (or less cold), otherwise it's zero. At the end, I even put the cursor one/two/three notches higher, but nothing to do! The bottle was hot but the milk inside was still cold. In the end, we opted for a much faster and more effective method: put the bottle in a water bath and test on the wrist!

This portable bottle warmer is very practical because during outings it helps me feed my baby thanks to its speed of heating. For the moment I only use it for breast milk. Without an easy-to-use socket, however, the battery drains quickly, rechargeable by USB cable.
Its capacity is 500ml. The cap locks which is well thought out because it prevents leaks.
Doesn't take up too much space in my changing bag.

This bottle warmer is called "Tulip" because of its nicely pleated belt shape with a notched neckline. The heating method is steam. The temperature rises quickly. The bottle warmer has an adapter ring and a basket for the baby food. A measuring pod attached to a notch in the device is very useful because it indicates the amount of water to put in the device compared to the amount of milk in the bottle or the weight of the pot. Once switched on by pressing the switch, the switch is switched off automatically as soon as the food has reached temperature. The various tests have shown that the temperatures are perfect, the heated product is neither too hot nor too cold (which does not prevent us from checking). Small downside, the graduations of the pod are not very legible and it's a shame. On the back of the bottle warmer is glued a table reminding us of these quantities, which avoids taking out the "instructions for use" document, which could be misplaced. The basket is extremely practical for taking out the jars without burning yourself and finally the adapter ring allows smaller containers to remain stable. It's a good product. The tests were carried out with a bisphenol-free plastic bottle and common baby food jars.

What I love about this bottle warmer: its possible use both at home but also in the car thanks to its "cigar warmer" tip. What comfort! To be able to heat your child's bottle or potty, on the go (for example on vacation where it's sometimes hard to find a place for it), in 90 seconds, regardless of the size of the jar or bottle! Very intuitive and very easy to use, I recommend!

This bottle warmer is the latest from Nuk and seemed very interesting on paper. You put a certain amount of water depending on what you want to warm, you put the basket, the bottle, the ring to limit the evaporation of water too quickly and you press the only button which is then circled in blue. The heating stops when there is no more water to heat. Pros: - It heats up quickly and accepts any type of bottle or potty- It comes with a cigarette lighter socket and can therefore be used at home or on the go- Uses very little water Cons:- Unlike the old version, there is no built-in dispenser. So, we try to follow the instructions (using a teaspoon) to add the water needed for heating but from one bottle to another the results are very variable. We don't know if this is due to our inaccuracy or to the device itself.- We can't stop the device except by unplugging it. It's a bit annoying when you feel that the bottle is going to be too hot. In short, it heats up quickly but the result can be random (at least for us, maybe it's due to misuse).

We bought this bottle warmer, for when we go out to friends' houses or go for walks the bottle warmer works great for 3 days and then now it's a disaster 😡. It heats up much too fortunately that we always test the heat on the wrist, so the function when it is hot turns on but much too late, really disappointed with this article which no longer works properly after a week!

The BEABA bottle warmer/sterilizer in stylish Night Blue has made my everyday life much easier. With five smart modes, including Fast Steam mode and gentle water bath heating, it adapts perfectly to my varied needs without compromising safety. The versatility of the Multi-Milk is revealed in its ability to heat any type of bottle, whether breast milk or powder, with soft or quick heat options. The preservation of the nutrients in breast milk is a feature that caught my attention, highlighting the special attention paid to health. The hotspot-free design ensures even heating, eliminating the worries of uneven temperatures. Additionally, safety features, such as overheat protection, add a layer of peace of mind when in use. The intuitive touchscreen and adjustable timer make everyday use much easier. The device automatically shuts off at the end of the cycle, providing additional convenience without compromise. In short, the BÉABA Night Blue is much more than just a bottle warmer, it is a multifunctional companion that makes meal preparation more efficient and safe. A smart addition to simplify everyday life.

Babymoov is a French brand, a first good point. The advantage of the electric sterilizer over the microwave is that it accepts large sizes of bottles and has safety features to avoid burning baby. Here, the model provides of course automatic shut-off (with audible alarm), but also a drying function. Once the cycle is complete, the equipment is safe and can be used immediately. Once dry, the bibs can remain in the sterilizer, they are stored there. The sterilization cycle lasts 6 minutes and 10 minutes including drying time, so the operation is much faster than in the pan, a method I used until now at home during the stays of my family members with babies. Its branches are removable, which makes it possible to sterilize nipples or the accessories of a breast pump for example. Its design is sober, really classy. Good to know: the device is GUARANTEED FOR LIFE. A piece of advice: remember to wash your hands well by taking the bibs out of the sterilizer. The price can slow down a little for a device that will be used for a few months but if other children are coming later, the investment is worth the cost.

No more sterilizing bottles that took a lot of time and crazy space in the kitchen! This sterilizer that works with steam is rather compact and can hold 6 large bottles. ✅ It eliminates bacteria in just 6 minutes flat and notifies you when it's over: what happiness! ✅ It has a drying function (+ 4 minutes), and you can leave the bottles in it, it also serves as a bottle storage. ✅  It sterilizes but does not wash the bottles: you must first wash them, and then put them there to sterilize them. ✅ The operation is very simple: you put tap water in the base (with the container provided), you place the bottle tree with the bottles and teats, you press the big button to start the sterilization:  That's it! ✅ We also appreciate the possibility of adapting the interior configuration (removable temples) to place fewer bottles but more teats or other accessories. We can't find any fault with it: it's a simple, fast and effective device!

I would have expected something different from the Grundig brand... Initially already had problems, because the instructions are extremely meager in terms of information, there is nothing really helpful in it. It continued with heating the milk, as can be read in the many other negative reviews you can keep warm milk warm with this device, warming up is rather not possible or possible with a long waiting time and a screaming child. Furthermore, it is more than poorly thought out in terms of construction, in the container for the water, in which you should put the bottles is a holder, which floats naturally in the water. So consequently the bottle with the milk floats up if it has less than 150 ml content. But since the milk should be completely under water as described in the instructions, warming up cannot work if the bottle floats on top. But if you then put more than 150 ml content in, the bottle stands, but unfortunately in such a way that the complete bottle is still not in the water due to the maximum display below. CONCLUSION: We buy another one and are disappointed that a product from a former world market leader is so bad.

Product Features:8-in-1 Quick Bottle WarmerLiquid Warming in 2-7 MinutesKeeping Warm for 24HDefrost Gentle FreezingTimerBoiling & SteamTemperature AdjustmentFood HeatingMemory FunctionThis is a multi-function bottle warmer that will also allow you to reheat food or thaw to the right temperature. The included thermostat will allow you to keep the milk warm for up to 24 hours You will be able to carry out a deep cleaning of the bottles and teats thanks to the 100° steam function. Food preservation will be respected and this bottle warmer will be easy to use due to its great compatibility with all wide, narrow and inclined bottles. Equipped with an automatic shut-off and a reminder beep for your safety and that of your baby. A fr leaflet is provided and extensively documented and the main options available are cleverly reproduced on the body of the product, which will prevent you from consulting it later.

Comment number 2 updated after an exchange for the same product:bottle warmer that definitely doesn't work; I ordered one that AMAZON exchanged for the same new model, I've been using it for a week and since yesterday it starts to turn off again in the middle of the bottle so it's a manufacturing defect I'm thinking of sending it back again but changing model because this one probably has a recurring problem..... it goes out while there is water left and you have to relight it again and again... infernaloriginal message of the first bottle warmer received:At first I was happy it is relatively fast but now; On the other hand, I haven't even had it for 1 month and it already works almost no more, it cuts off while it hasn't finished heating up, you have to press it every minute, it's annoying and the other day it didn't turn on at all, I think it's going to let me down and the worst thing it's brand new, not even 1 month.... deplorable 🙅🏻 ♀️🤦🏻 ♀️

Perfect for washing and sterilizing bottles, pacifiers, breast pumps, plates, knives and forks with ease!this 4-in-1 electric steam sterilizer from Philips Avent has been designed to make our daily lives easier. Thanks to its adjustable size, it adapts perfectly to the elements you want to sterilize while taking up minimal space in the kitchen. The 4-in-1 functionality allows:- 1 small configuration to sterilize pacifiers- 1 medium-sized configuration to sterilize breast pumps, baby plates, knives and forks- 1 large configuration to sterilize 6 bottles- 1 Dishwasher basket for easy pre-cleaning of bottles and accessoriesAdapts to all types of bottles:The sterilizer has been designed to hold both wide-neck and narrow-neck bottles as well as several breast pumps and accessories. This offers the freedom to choose the bottles and accessories that are best suited for baby. The sterilizer can hold up to six 330ml Philips AVENT bottles.Kills 99.9% of bacteria:Sterilization protects baby from particularly harmful bacteria until their immune system is strong enough. Philips AVENT sterilizers use the fast, efficient and chemical-free steam sterilization method, which is also used in hospitals. The contents remain sterilized for 24 hours if the lid is not lifted. Advanced display:The state-of-the-art digital display keeps us informed throughout the sterilization process and tells you when the bottles are cooled. 6-minute cycle and automatic shut-off:Your bottles and accessories will be sterilized in just 6 minutes. Once sterilization is complete, the device will automatically turn off, for safety and energy saving. This product perfectly meets all my expectations and I am completely satisfied with it.

First of all. It was a free Vine product. But this is not included in the rating.

Let's look positive. It looks neat, has a USB-a to USB-C cable and even a power plug with USB-C connector. The user manual is also good and in several languages.

Unfortunately, that's the only positive thing. Fully charged for the first time according to the instructions. It was relatively fast, because it was already full to 2/3 or more.

According to the instructions, you need a maximum of 7 minutes for water and 10 for milk. The 7 turned into 13 minutes and the milk was still at 26 degrees after 20 minutes. Unfortunately, I couldn't test it any further because the battery was already empty. According to the manufacturer, the battery should last about 1.5-2 hours. I would even say that this value is not even reached in keep warm mode.

Based on these facts, I only give one star. What good is a mobile kettle (which it is in the end) if it is already empty after one use? You can also buy the normal, wired ones,

The Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer is the perfect solution for parents who want to keep warm water or breast milk for their baby on the go. With two heating modes – specifically for breast milk and water – the device allows precise temperature control to prepare formula or gently heat milk. The fast heating function ensures that water is heated to 40°C in just 3 minutes and chilled breast milk to 37°C in 5 minutes, so meals are always ready on time.

The generous 500ml capacity makes the bottle warmer ideal for families with multiple babies or longer trips. Its leak-proof thermos bottle design keeps the contents safely stowed away, and the compact weight of just 600g makes it easy to transport – a perfect travel companion for families with newborns.

On a single charge, the bottle warmer can heat up to 24 times of 230 ml of water or up to 8 times of 113 ml of milk. The cordless design ensures maximum portability, so no power outlet is required. The battery is fully charged in just 1.5 hours and ready to use at any time. Please note that the included charger has special specifications (18V, 2A, 36W) and compatibility should be checked before use.

The Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer offers an ideal combination of functionality, portability and ease of use – perfect for parents who don't want to sacrifice comfort on the go.

The Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer is simply an absolute lifesaver for us parents! We are thrilled with the practical handling and versatile functions. The bottle warmer is ideal for on the go - whether traveling or on excursions, it always ensures that the bottle is warmed up quickly and safely.

What particularly impressed us is the fast heating function. In no time, the baby bottle or water is brought to the ideal temperature - perfect when things have to go fast. The practical design and the long battery life make the bottle warmer really reliable and easy to use without having to constantly search for a power outlet.

Another highlight are the two heating modes - one for breast milk and the other for water. This allows flexible use according to your needs and ensures that the sensitive breast milk is always optimally warmed without losing nutrients. The 500 ml capacity is also large enough to warm enough liquid throughout the day, which is very convenient for longer trips.

The Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer really has everything we need for mobile bottle warming: efficient, practical and comfortable. We highly recommend this product to all parents – it has made our everyday life a lot easier!

We are on the road a lot with our little one - whether on a walk in the park, on longer car journeys or even on air travel. The comflyer bottle warmer has become an absolute must-have for us!

What I immediately liked is the wireless design. No more searching for sockets! I can easily store it in the diaper bag or stroller. Especially in the car or plane, this has often saved us when our little one was hungry and there was no kitchen nearby.

I was particularly impressed by how fast the device works: Within 2 minutes, the water is e.g. up to 40 degrees – perfect for preparation depending on the desired temperature. Chilled breast milk is at drinking temperature in a few minutes. And all this wirelessly - really super practical!

Another plus point: The battery lasts a really long time. We were able to heat up several bottles (approx. 150 ml) without any problems during a day trip without having to charge in between. And if it is empty, the battery is full again in about 2-3 hours with the fast charging adapter.

It is also important to me that no harmful substances get to the milk – and this is where the comflyer also scores. The inner container made of stainless steel (SUS 316) is completely odourless and without plastic - this gives me a good feeling about my baby's health.

I also find the different temperature levels and timer functions really clever. I can choose the right setting depending on the type of milk or the situation. Especially at night or when traveling, this saves an enormous amount of time and nerves.

In short, the comflyer has made our everyday life with baby much easier. I can really recommend it to all parents who are on the go a lot or just want a little more flexibility with feeding!

Consistent with the description. Future grandparents for the first time, the Vine club allows us to test and reconnect with the equipment for early childhood. This type of equipment has taken a leap forward in quality, efficiency and safety! I really appreciate the temperature control which, thirty years ago, was still done with the back of the hand! Well I think this reflex will remain, but hey the little heat strokes on the skin will be less and above all baby will wait less time for it to cool down! In short, this bottle warmer offers more features with the reheating of small jars for example. For the moment our little child is not there, but we are ready! I take a star but for all the manufacturers of these equipment who take a nice margin with such prices! There are equivalent household appliances in their concepts and functionalities at much more affordable prices, we play on people's maternal sensitivity!

It does the job well, especially for its price. What I immediately liked was its speed: about 2 minutes to heat a bottle, perfect when baby wakes up in the middle of the night hungry. There's also a function to keep the water at a constant temperature, so you don't have to wait for each preparation. The LCD screen is easy to read, with the remaining temperature and time displayed. There is also a beep to warn when it's ready, which is handy. On the other hand, if you're the type to get up in zombie mode at night, it can be a bit annoying and what's practical behind it is displayed on a label according to your use of the bottle which avoids going to search the manual. Another positive point: it comes with a measuring cup, so there is no risk of putting too much water and messing it everywhere. In terms of compatibility, I tested with several bottles, and everything goes smoothly. It also makes a sterilizer, which is a nice bonus, even if it won't replace a real sterilizer if you use it often. In short, it is efficient, simple to use and really practical on a daily basis. If you're looking for a quick and hassle-free bottle warmer, this is a good choice

I was initially excited about the idea of the Blimbini Pro All-in-One Bottle Warmer – a compact, portable device for on the go. Unfortunately, it doesn't live up to all the promises the seller makes. I've had the device since July 30th and use it regularly, but some weaknesses can't be overlooked. The biggest problem: one charge is definitely not enough for 6 bottles, as indicated. I use regular water and only mix in the powdered milk when it's warm. Nevertheless, the battery seems to drain incredibly quickly. When the device is charged at 100% and I use it once, the battery level drops directly to 60%. This clearly shows that it is impossible to manage 5-6 bottles on one charge. In addition, it takes much longer than expected to heat up, so you have to plan ahead when the baby might be hungry. Spontaneously warming up a bottle? Difficult. What's even more frustrating is that the device doesn't work while charging. The Blimbini is therefore only suitable to a limited extent for travel, especially if you don't have constant access to a power outlet. Another annoyance is the lid. Not only is it impractical, but it also keeps falling off or comes out easily. Why wasn't a screw cap used here? That would have been much better and safer. Instead, it's annoying every time you have to take off or put on the lid. For the price, I would have expected a lot more. The basic idea is great, and the design is otherwise well thought out, but unfortunately not as convincing in practice as I had hoped. Too bad, I would have liked more reliability and user-friendliness after four months of use.

I can't breastfeed my daughter, so I always pump out the milk and then warm it up again to drink. So far, I have done this on the road with the help of a thermo jug, a thermo mug and boiling water. This took a long time and every now and then I overlooked it and the milk was too hot. To be honest, I didn't like to be on the road longer because of this effort. The bottle warmer tested here provides a remedy here and I don't want to do without it anymore. On the contrary, I think it's a real shame that I didn't discover and buy it earlier, because it really brings a lot of relief and is even space-saving. The handling is super easy and once charged (works perfectly overnight), I can get by with the battery all day. Cleaning could be a little easier, but is still acceptable. My bottles (Lansinoh) don't fit, but I heat the milk in Tommee Tippee bottles and then decant them, which works without any problems.

and above all, the Philips Avent bottles we have also fit with the included adapters. I didn't even know that there was such a thing for on the go. We always took hot water in a thermos bottle with us, which was quite cumbersome and which cooled down in the long run. Of course, this bottle warmer for on the go is much easier and better. Positives:- You simply charge the bottle warmer via USB-C.- The battery is enough for a few smaller and larger bottles, more than you actually need on the go.- The operation is very easy.- You can set the temperature to three different values (37°, 40° and 45°).- You can also use Philips Avent bottles via adapter.- The bottle warmer is not large and should find a place in every diaper bag. Cons:- Heating takes longer. I didn't stop the time, but the 10 minutes should be right, depending on how warm or cold the milk is and what bottle size is used. This could be done a little faster. In addition, you should then shake it together with the attached bottle again and again when heating it up.- I think the price is a bit high for this. I think 49.99€ would be more appropriate, because there is not much technology behind it.

We have been using the bottle warmer several times a week since receiving it and are very satisfied. We have compared our experiences below. Positive Rechargeable✅ via USB-C! ✅ Fair price✅ Usual good workmanship✅ Also suitable for other types of bottles (it is even in the instructions, suitable for MAM and Philips Avent) - Top! ✅ Optimal for us are about 10 minutes (150ml bottle). ✅ Handy and light - fits easily in your hand luggage! ✅ Very good instructions✅ Good battery life, the battery lasts about 1.5 weeks in our test with daily use (1-2 times). Negative❌Contents are not always heated homogeneously / evenly, but this is also simply due to the design of the bottle warmer. We always take the bottle out after a few minutes, shake it briefly and then heat it again for the rest of the time. We don't want to miss the bottle warmer anymore, it has become a constant companion for us!

I bought this portable on-the-go warmer to warm my expressed breast milk. The milk warmer comes with 2 attachments.The attachments do not fit all bottles (especially not on no-name bottles), which is why I bought 2 extra bottles from Tommee Tippee.What I like very much is the easy operation and the short time that the warmer needs to heat the milk - at 120 ml at 40^C it is 9-10 minutes. Ideal for on the go, to warm up the milk. It takes quite a long time to fully charge the device, but I can heat the milk to 40^C 4-5 times on the go. For the price I still find it a bit poor, because the milk is only heated to max. 35^C at 37^C, despite swivelling during the heating process, so I have found the solution for myself to heat the milk to 40^C, because the temperature of the milk is then only 37-38^C. While heating, you have to turn the bottle over and swirl again and again so that the heat really reaches every ml. Well thought out in itself, but still expandable. Ideal for on the go when you have no other option, as it is very small and compact.

For my partner and me, it is always important that when we give away something that is for young or new parents, you should not save at the wrong end. Because, as we have experienced, this always has a negative effect afterwards.

Since we are true fans of the manufacturer Momcozy, we always prioritize giving away utensils from this brand manufacturer.

The bottle itself has a good capacity and makes a very stable and robust impression. The liquid in the bottle cannot leak even if the bottle is stored horizontally. At the upper area, the lid is additionally reinforced with a silicone ring, so everything that is inside stays there.

The bottle is also very handy and you can also heat it practically with one hand, so you can concentrate on the essentials, namely the child and don't have to worry that the bottle doesn't work as it should.

The operation is very simple and requires absolutely no reading of the user manual. I also think it's good that in addition to the USB cable, a cable with USB is also included, which is already paired with an adapter. As a rule, you only have pure USB cables today, but adapters are rarely included.

The time it takes for the milk or water to warm up is anything but long and you don't have to worry about the liquid boiling, because you have full control of the temperature with the bottle.

I am absolutely thrilled.

I am very happy to give my full 5 stars and recommend the bottle clearly

A bottle warmer and not only since it is equipped with different adjustments.
We used it to heat milk and were able to try the different temperature modes. With medium level it made the milk reach temperature in 6 minutes. The main feature is its steam operation so we will enter the amount of ml of water and set it on the touch dial of the controls and then start the heating phase. Thanks to the transparent container/lid, a steam chamber is created that allows you to heat, defrost, maintain baby food, milk, baby food, etc. Another favorable thing is the fact that working with steam and high temperature, with a single product we can also sterilize teats and pacifiers 👌🏻
Aesthetically very beautiful thanks also to the LED control panel with touch system.
Too bad you can't have the predisposition for attachment in the car but for this you can look for a separate accessory.

I attach some photos to give an idea of the product.

I hope I have been of help.

Simple to use even if the gradations of the measuring container would deserve to be in color. They are in relief but this does not make it easier to read. I sometimes have to put more water than indicated because it doesn't heat up enough. Beautiful design épuré.je uses it for both heating and defrosting. I have Philips avent bottles and storage jars of the same brand.bought with home connection only.

The portable bottle warmer makes a good and high-quality impression at first glance. The design is simple and functional, the workmanship seems stable and the transport is very pleasant thanks to the compact shape. With a capacity of 500 ml, it is large enough to heat water or milk for a bottle.

A USB-C cable and a charger were included in the scope of delivery - this is very practical and saves additional effort. The battery operation makes the device particularly mobile and flexible, which is a real plus when traveling with a baby.

However, I was not entirely convinced of the heating performance. The water does get warm, but not as quickly and effectively as I would have liked. For longer trips it is enough, but you should plan a little more time. The price is also a bit high in relation to the performance.

Overall, however, a good product that serves its purpose and scores with its design and mobility - it would have been perfect with a slightly stronger heating power.

I give this product 4 stars from my point of view.

I immediately indicate that this bottle warmer has a "visual alarm" and not an audible one, that is to say that the heating button turns off when there is no more water in the tank. For my part, it's an advantage, especially at night because it avoids over-arousing baby if you know what I mean ^^For the rest, I appreciate that he accepts all shapes and materials of bottles (including big Advents) and that there is an adapter for baby food. Provided you dose the water well, allow about 3 minutes for a large bottle, barely + for a small jar of mashed potatoes. Its look is understated despite the wavy finish, and will fit into any kitchen. Drawbacks:→ concerning the power supply:- its cable is short- if it can be plugged in in the car, the adapter is not included→ plan to maintain the tank regularly with a mixture of water and white vinegar to preserve its life (it is nevertheless announced with a LIFETIME WARRANTY!). For all intents and purposes, I give you the number of the hotline on the packing box: 04 73 28 37 37

Very good product.
Beautiful build and finish quality.
As always with Momcozy it is aesthetic, practical, solid.
Everything works very well overall.
Small detail, I don't find the closing of the charging port very practical, you have to press hard to push it in well.
And in terms of temperature settings, we just have a few steps, we don't choose to the degree what we want; Water: 37 40 43 50°, Milk: 32 35 37°

I always have it in the diaper bag, ready to use. Batterie that holds the charge. Don't care about their bottle. You can do it anywhere (in shops, on the way to vacation, during medical appointments....)I had the case of a hospitalization and really even the team was surprised. No need to look for a microwave, not too much recommended for bottle warming. I never go out without it.

The bottle warmer has been tested and used by me in different ways.
From the outside, the bottle looks chic, and the color is great. Cable with USB. C port and also a power supply! are included, you don't have that so often anymore.
I can heat water and milk here and keep it warm, of course it also works great with coffee and tea. The bottle can be easily washed by hand after use.
The temperature can be easily set on two profiles and then remains stored there.
The currently reached temperature is monitored and displayed.
The lid is leak-proof and can be locked for transport.
Heating takes a few minutes, the heat is then held until it is switched off.
The battery lasts the whole day that you are on the road and it is then quickly recharged in the evening for the next active day. The battery is not replaceable.
So you are independent of power sources during the day.

💭 Foreword
-----------------------
If the very little offspring gets hungry on the go, then good advice is expensive and the nearest socket for the bottle warmers is usually far away. Now there are one or the other model that heats the water or milk either via the cigarette lighter in the car or even by means of a battery, but I have not yet come across such a practical thermos flask, which heats the water or milk completely self-sufficiently and keeps it warm.

👁️ First impression
-----------------------
The bottle comes in a very nicely designed cardboard box and is therefore also wonderful as a gift. Inside it is safely packed in a foam molding. It makes a very high-quality impression, is very cleanly made and I also like the green color. I also find it particularly great right away: In addition to a USB-C power supply, you also get a USB-C cable and thus two ways to charge the device.

📦 Scope of delivery
-----------------------
1x cordless bottle warmer
1x USB-C power supply
1x instructions (multilingual, also German)
1x USB-C to USB-A cable

✏️ Usage
-----------------------
After the first cleaning, the bottle warmer is ready for use.

To switch it on (press the middle button), the desired temperature is already displayed in degrees, which we can set gradually via the left or right button. It should be said that we have two profiles with the two buttons (left and right) and by pressing the respective button several times, we switch through the temperature in steps. The next time we turn on the bottle, the previously set temperature and profile is selected. So you can easily switch between milk or water temperature if you have set it there once.

After that, the bottle switches directly to heat mode and displays the current temperature of the liquid inside - this is determined by a built-in probe (and not just estimated). When the desired temperature has been reached, a (not too loud) beep is emitted.

The warm-up process works wonderfully and the set temperature is reached in a good time (about 5-6 minutes for 40 degrees) - I think it's very good that the temperature is maintained afterwards until you turn off the bottle.

I think it's absolutely great that they thought of a cap that can be locked and thus prevents unintentional opening. To do this, simply slide the button on the lid down. Slide up to open and then press.

Practical: The lid contains a spout, which makes it easy to fill the drinking bottles. There is also a practical and flexible holder made of silicone. The very large bottle neck is also practical, which makes it very easy to clean.

⭐ Rating & Conclusion
-----------------------
This bottle warmer is just great: You can either transport the water or the milk in it and warm it up immediately when needed. It keeps tight and is also easy to clean. You can read the battery level very conveniently and have a power adapter in the scope of delivery, but also the possibility to charge the device via USB-A. I am super satisfied with it and give it the well-deserved 5 out of 5 stars.
That was the best investment, handling super easy and the milk is quickly warmed up, you can even charge the device in the car. For the price, I would still like to see a longer battery life

Have the device for on the go. Are very happy with it. Recommendation: Do not use water that is too cold, then it does not take so long to heat up and consumes less battery. Would buy the device again and again.

I find that this bottle warmer takes too long to heat up. In addition, the heating is not optimal at all: if the bottle comes out of the fridge (expressed breast milk), the milk is completely cold at the end of the recommended heating time. In the end, to have lukewarm milk it is doubled in time, 8 minutes far too long when you have a hungry baby. The water system to be added at the milk level is also rather difficult because you can't see the water level in relation to the milk. And if you have a baby who never drinks the same amounts, you always have to adjust the water height, which adds extra time... I personally advise against it, I would have preferred to turn to a faster bottle warmer and especially with a more efficient heat for bottles taken out of the fridge. I haven't tested the other possibilities (defrosting and heating small jars) but given the hassle for just small bottles I can't imagine the rest

If you have a child who can wait at least 30 minutes for a warm bib then it's OK. Otherwise, move on! I used this bottle warmer as indicated on the leaflet, except by leaving it in hot water once the cycle is over, my bottle stays cold. It's not great when you have a hungry baby. So we went back to the good old microwave and my son only waits 30 seconds. Magic!

I put the average because I have one that works, a defective one bought on another site and two purchases made here on Amazon and both don't work... So 3/4, the one I have, it works very well and it's very practical! The 3 heat up but do not stop, which is a problem. The first was returned to Amazon and the second was sent back to Tigex. Waiting for their return, hoping it's a bad series!

After 2 weeks of use I notice that the bottle warmer doesn't heat up anymore! The bottle is hot but the milk is always cold I have to renew the heating at least 3 times to have a barely ambient temperature of the milk... which is very annoying when baby is impatient to drink his bottle ... It's a shame because the car/home system is very practical. I will contact customer service to return the item

I was looking for a totally nomadic bottle warmer for short walks and possibly for the night in the bedroom upstairs. I hesitated with another well-known brand on the market and my choice fell on this model because of its capacity (300ml), its autonomy and its design. I'm not disappointed at the moment!!! The bottle warmer is very beautiful, and as mentioned in the other reviews, ergonomic and easy to use. I appreciate the spout, as well as the handle to hold or hang it everywhere. Fast heat-up time, easily dismantled so easy maintenance, very good warming, good temperature. It is as large as a thermo; It can be a bit heavy but I don't mind if it allows you to have a sufficient amount of water and especially a daily autonomy. And for the price personally, in view of the quality of the materials and the freedom that the product provides, I don't find it that excessive (anyway even taken for other models). Lately, very responsive after-sales service (contacted just for a practical question, answer during the day and very friendly). Overall very happy for the moment, I recommend !!

Let's start from the assumption that the competition costs up to 70 euros more and there is a reason ... It marks 37 degrees but then they are always around 35.White LEDs in the sun are not visible. An eternity to recharge and there is no way to know when it is charged. After turning a blind eye to all this I bought it, out of 10 times 3 did not heat up and they were just 3 times more serious. He gave me random time and the milk remained cold. I'm on vacation and luckily I also have the emergency one with boiling water. As soon as I get back I make the return and hello. Ps inside there is not even a bag for transport and the plug, only the cable. Currently, setting 45 the milk reaches 40/41. It is simple and as soon as we understand how much water we actually need to obtain the desired temperature, it makes our lives easier. Easy to use and quick heating. I recommend

We also have the large electric sterilizer from avent, if it has to be done quickly because all the bottles are dirty, we use it. everything sterilized in just four minutes. The super quality of Philips doesn't really need to be mentioned :-)If you have a microwave at home, the model is more than sufficient, I wouldn't buy the electric ones a second time.

I am absolutely thrilled. Unfortunately, my child is already out of the "milk age", but I love coffee more than anything and got the bottle warmer for on the go. It is very practical, especially on vacation. The kettle has so many limescale residues in it that I'm glad to have the transportable bottle warmer with me. Great product. It is very intuitive to use! The materials are of high quality and the heating is fast for a portable device. It has become indispensable! Finally, an after-sales service like no other!

The product is available in two versions. I tested the premium version, the more high-end of the two currently at €95.79. In the box there is obviously the sterilizer but also a clamp that allows you to grab the bottles at the end of the process. The difference with the more basic version is that the premium version in addition to sterilizing the bottles can dry them. This is very practical on a daily basis. Whatever happens, they must be cleaned and dried before the next use, so why not sterilize them on the go. To sterilize the bottles (up to 6 at a time) and dry them, the device only needs 40 minutes. It is obviously possible to also sterilize teats for example. We had never used a sterilizer until now for our son's bottles but we were tempted by this one, even if its price remains relatively high (hence the minus star).
Very fast, does its job, easy to clean is great ability to put water only small flaw we would like to have a larger capacity to put water, excellent battery

This bottle warmer is optimal; Its heat-up time is fast, its battery life is efficient and its design is particularly practical for parents who are frequently on the go with their child.  In addition, I would like to highlight the excellence of the after-sales service: following an accidental breakage of the glass container, a new replacement was quickly sent to us. I highly recommend this product.

Systematic sterilization... controversial subject... Nevertheless, it is practical and sterilization is fast, a little more than 5 minutes. No need to boil water beforehand, the machine takes care of it. But, sterilizing in plastic.... deep down, I don't like it... How about a stainless steel tank and a glass dome?

This bottle warmer is offered with documentation including the français.il should be noted that the display is exclusively in English. There is also an inner basket and a silicone dispenser to quantify the water to be put in the device. There are four operating modes:• a fast heating mode with temperature and time adjustment.• a keep warm mode over 24 hours to keep water at temperature in a bottle available all night.• a food heating mode to heat a small jar or a container of this type.• a defrost modeThere is also a boil mode at 100° for sterilization. The inner diameter of the heating cavity is 9.3 cm and 8.9 cm for the basket, so several types of container can be accommodated in it. The top cover is about 15 cm high, plus the 7 cm of the cavity, we have a good size for large bottles. Despite the English interface, you quickly understand how it works, the indications are in hours minutes and the temperature in degrees. Beeps accompany the operation and warn of the end of heating. A guide to heating times is also available in French. It is therefore generally a good companion for baby and especially at night.

This bottle warmer is delivered with the heating base, a leaflet in French, bottle basket, measuring cup, lid. It can only be used on a mains socket. This device adapts to all materials of bottles: glass, plastic up to 240 ml. A food mode for food, sterilization at 100 degrees for 10 minutes and a fast mode (fast between 0.5 to 10 minutes). Possibility to program the keep warm mode for 24 hours, by first filling with drinking water to the right level at the top of the bottle without it overflowing. Always add water before using the appliance in any case. Countdown to the right milk temperature display between 2 and 3 1/2 minutes. With a clear, crisp LCD screen, an automatic shut-off, multiple choices of heating and defrosting, the volume of milk between 60 and 240ml as well as the choice of the type of bottle: glass or plastic. Good entry-level.

This bottle warmer is simple but effective. The design is nice and the colors are sober. The advantage of this model is that you can heat all types of bottles but also small jars. The principle is simple: put the right amount of water and heat it. A graduated pod allows you to measure the volume of water to be added. It must be respected. This bottle is practical and effective.

I absolutely wanted to buy this type of bottle warmer and I was lucky enough to be able to test the Tommee Tippee knowing that I already have bottles of this brand. Verdict: I love it!!!! Just prepare the bottle at room temperature (you can heat the water before too) and heat. Two mouthpieces are provided, one for tommee tippee bottles and one for MAMs. So we put the nozzle on the bottle warmer, we turn the bottle warmer over to screw it onto the bottle ready to be heated, and we turn everything over so that the liquid touches the small heating plate. You have to press under the bottle warmer for a long time to turn it on, and you can choose between three different temperatures (personally I choose 37 because my baby has been used to this temperature since birth). We wait, and it rings when it's ready!! To heat around 40 degrees, I checked and you have to wait 10 minutes for a 120ml bottle. So you have to prepare in advance so as not to make your baby cry hungry!! The bottle warmer is recharged with a USB port so you can plug it in the car, it's great when you go on a trip. For cleaning, just clean the small griddle with water, and do a clean with white vinegar, heating occasionally. I definitely recommend this product!!!!

- Never heat to the same temperature (frankly I don't understand anything from the instructions, you have to put a certain amount of water in the tank to have a certain temperature depending on the amount of water in the bottle but it never works one time it's cold one time it's hot!)- Don't heat plastic bottles at all or you have to heat several times in a row and it's very long- Heat glass bottles correctly but never at the same temperature. it was offered to me on my birth list, used very little max 1 time a day (because we don't go out much for the moment baby born at the end of August), discharges very quickly, I have to recharge it every day or 1 1/2 days while I use it little and precisely when I use it it has more than batterie.je am disappointed with this product,  Despite the fact that it is very practical I do not recommend it

The Momcozy portable bottle warmer is a real lifesaver for me when I'm on the go a lot. Thanks to two heating modes, it can bring both breast milk and water to the ideal temperature – super handy if you need to prepare formula quickly.

Heating up is lightning fast: water is up to 40°C in 3 minutes, chilled milk is 37°C in 5 minutes – ideal for when baby is hungry and needs to go fast. With a 500ml capacity, there's enough space for all day, especially for families with multiple children.

A big plus is the impressive battery life – a full charge is enough for up to 24 warms of water or 8 milk bottles, so you don't have to worry about constant recharging. The cordless design makes it a perfect companion on the go without having to constantly search for a power outlet.

Through the amazon vine program I had the opportunity to test this bottle warmer from the well-known Momcozy brand, which deals purely with baby items.

The best feature of this product? Surely it is his speed!! It is in fact a milk warmer designed to heat quickly and efficiently, saving precious time, especially for your hungry newborns and safeguarding parents' ears from prolonged crying 😆

It has a built-in timer that allows you to set the desired heating time. This is useful to decide for yourself the degree of heating you like best

It is a compact and portable model, which makes it easy to carry when you are traveling or when you need to leave it at the home of grandparents or babysitters
It is designed to be very easy to use, with intuitive controls and a convenient LED timer that alerts us when it is until the end of the heating.

It is also very easy to clean, especially if you use demineralized water for heating instead of limescale rich tap water

It is equipped with a convenient removable basket that allows you not to take out the hot bottle with your hands and a measuring cup to choose how much water to introduce for heating.

It is essentially a super-performing device. It certainly does not leave you disappointed and is also aesthetically very beautiful.

The pros:Nice design, easy to use, a wheel to turn according to the amount of milkThe cons:Does not heat the bottle (MAM), you have to do it several times, cheat on the selected amount, sometimes as cold as at the beginning or too hot. We expect a product that makes our lives easier, but it's quite the opposite.

Overall the product is good but unlike the same product bought in the store, the one in the store is more powerful (same reference!) -> + expensive than AmazonSo I don't understand why the one delivered by amazon is less powerful in terms of heating and takes + time. End of series? Hence the price much cheaper than in the store? lots with a small defect sold..? I have no idea. We still use this product and work well. The only downside is:- Thawing a puree with the bottle warmer takes too long and you have to run it 2x for it to thaw properly.- To heat a puree put in the fridge, the same, it takes time and ideally put it 2x so that it is at room temperature. To heat cold water from the fridge, it takes too long! When you're in a rush with your hungry little one, it's complicated! The one bought in the store, RAS! ;)

The bottle warmer with battery is charged via USB C. It has 2 adapters to connect the bottles. They are intended for and fit the Tommee Tippee bottles and MAM bottles. Philips Avent bottles do NOT fit. The operation is very simple. You connect the bottle with the liquid to the device, turn it on and select the temperature. As soon as the device has reached the desired temperature, a beep sounds.For 100 ml of liquid, the device needed 5:41 min to heat it to 37 degrees. However, when remeasured with a normal thermometer, the liquid was only 36 degrees. So the device does not heat up exactly. Heating is noiseless. In itself, I find the device very practical. However, it is not so easy. I think it would be good if there were also more adapters for common bottles such as Philips Avent or Lansinoh.

Heats up quickly and has a good temperature for baby .I have had several bottle warmers and this one I recommend .very little water (pod delivered with) 60 seconds and the bottle is ready more than shake the bottle to homogenize the heat. Very practical it has a car or house position on the back of the bottle warmer and the cable for the car too.

Hello, I used a fetou and a saucepan to sterilize the bottles, the hassle, and the huge consumption. With the sterilizer it takes about 10 minutes and it's done. No limescale on baby's bottle. Have if it holds in time, because limestone and its enemy. For my part, I use bottled water. 130Ml is enough for sterilization. Top

It is a very compact portable bottle warmer. It doesn't take up much space and is very easy to use. It heats up quickly and can be taken anywhere with you. It is compatible with various brands (Avent, Mam...). Its digital display allows a quick reading of the bottle's temperature. It recharges very fzcilement. I recommend
Whether it's to warm breast milk coming out of the fridge or water at temperature, it's really not great. I do not recommend this product.

I had the chance to test this bottle warmer and its non-nomadic version. I really liked this practical little basic. Here it is a question of appreciating the fact that it can be used on the cigarette lighter. The idea is once again nice. It's always convenient to be able to heat up a little jar and not have to look for a gas station that also offers catering. The bottle warmer in "home" mode is fast and it's quite simple to use it. On the other hand, I'm not really convinced of its use in cars. Out of the 3 tests we performed, 2 times it did not work. We don't know if it's from the socket or if it's another problem. The table that indicates the heating time is very small and in the car it's not easy. You have to remember to look BEFORE plugging it in. In short, it's not bad but could be improved.

So far I can only say something about the 24-hour keep warm function and it works great, I set the temperature to 45 degrees and leave a bottle filled only with water inside, the powder is only added as soon as the little one reports and it is ready at the right temperature :) we previously had a quick warmer from Nuk only for breast milk but it wasn't so great and gave up the ghost after only 4 months. We will not test the rapid heating here, because we are afraid that it could also suffer damage from it. We haven't warmed breast milk yet, but only water for the pre-food, but I think it will work just as well. All in all, I would buy this product again and again. The only drawback is the instructions, which are not always on german, but you still understand them :)

Steam heated, correct heat-up time. All you have to do is find the right amount of water to put in the tank so that the bottle is at the desired temperature. However, it leaves traces (brown) very quickly, after a few days of use... I do not recommend for Mam bottles which unscrew downwards because there will be some once the bottle is heated.

Really shameful to sell a product of such deplorable quality at that price! I thought by putting a little money into it that the bottle warmer I was going to buy would be effective, I was wrong! It is totally random and cannot be relied upon in any way, which is frustrating at least and can also be dangerous for baby; Either the milk stays cold, or it heats up much too much, whether you respect the indicated heating times or not! I often had to cheat and put higher because from 120 ml the bottles stay cold every other time. Of course, to top it off, the waiting time is exaggeratedly long. At two in the morning, I certainly have other things to do than wait ten minutes for a bottle which in the end will be cold! Thank you but no. Move on.

We bought the bottle warmer to make a PRE for our child on the go and no longer have to have boiled water with us all the time. The warmer works really great, the bottle is simply screwed on and you can adjust the temperature. It keeps everything tight and nothing leaks. It's best to plan a few minutes to warm up. Overall, a real relief and highly recommended, especially if you are often on the road.

Very satisfied with this bottle warmer! It heats up quickly and evenly, which is convenient for nighttime meals or when you're in a hurry. The device is easy to use with no adjustments to be made and it adapts to different sizes of bottles. Compact and practical, it doesn't take up much counter space. A great product that really makes my daily life easier!

Simple and convenient to use. All you have to do is indicate the amount of milk to be heated. The temperature of the milk is not reliable, we are very often forced to check the temperature with a thermometer (often the temperature is 30 degrees, insufficient for baby) and to heat it again! Which is not practical and very time-consuming!

A good bottle warmer and jars, nice design, rotary knob to adjust the temperature in relation to the ml of the bottle, so far everything is ok, but in reality not at all!indicated time of 3 minutes is wrong it takes much more than that so don't do it at the last minute to warm the fascinator,  especially if it was in the fridge!it also doesn't recognize the temperature of the milk but only the water that is in it, so if you have heated a bottle and you want to make another one in a row or shortly after, the bottle warmer indicates that it is ready while it is still cold!I am surprised to find these disadvantages to this brand which is usually great, It is compatible with all standard bottles and jars on the market... For simple use like all other bottle warmers/pots.

I am very happy with my choice and I recommend it to all parents! It heats bottles quickly, which is very practical, especially on restless nights. It is very easy to use and its design is very nice with trendy colors. In addition, it is compatible with several bottle shapes. I highly recommend it!

This bottle warmer is disconcertingly simple. I was looking for a simple bottle warmer, to heat my little one's bibs and jars, and this one really surprised me with its practicality. It is small and easy to carry, and has a bottle capacity of up to 240ml, which is more than enough to heat even large bottles, or small baby jars. The LED screen is a real "+" because the timer is displayed there, as well as the desired temperature. It heats up quite quickly and above all it is a great alternative to microwaves, which is really not recommended especially if you use plastic bottles, in terms of health. The sterilization function will also be useful for the little ones, I haven't had the opportunity to test it, but it looks promising. I validate this product! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

For us, this sterilizer has only advantages with only one small disadvantage: its size. With 191 x 378 x 30mm (with all its layers), it takes up a little space. But this is the counterpart of its large capacity! The 6 bottles hold without any worries and the top of the sterilizer allows you to add a few teats. The use is really simple and a real time saver for us! We put the water and the elements to be sterilized and we start up. Then, nothing more to do! In less than 3/4 of an hour, the bottles and accessories were sterilized with steam and dried. It's magical! In addition, as long as you don't open the sterilizer, the contents remain sterile for 24 hours. We are absolutely delighted with this product, easy to use and clean, and recommend it for the time and safety it provides.
I am very satisfied with the momcozy water/milk warmer. Keeps the set temperature wonderfully, possibly times 1 degree deviation.

It works well, it's fast, not noisy. It doesn't take up too much space and the design is nice. The only downside is that some bottles can tend to fall inside during the operation of the device (the spaces provided for these are not very stable - it may also depend on the shapes/sizes/weight of the bottles).

I bought this bottle warmer for its positive reviews and for its car function, but I'm disappointed. So, yes it heats up very quickly, it's a plus, but it heats up very hard too, so if you put too much water it splashes and it's better not to put your arm over it at the risk of burning. These points, again, I could have ignored them, after all, it's a device that heats up so normal you will tell me. What I like much less is that it's not always easy to dose the right amount of water, and that you can't turn off the device on (you have to unplug the plug). And I don't know about the others but personally, when the water evaporates, it leaves me with a brown residue so you have to clean it systematically after use.

Following the previous comments, I would like to give some tips to the owners or future buyers of the said bottle warmer:- To avoid having to unplug the device to turn it off, you can either connect it to a power strip with a switch, or toggle the plug button from "Home" to Off.- The device does not rust. The brown deposits at the bottom of the tank that you can see on some photos actually show tartar. A wipe with a sponge soak in white vinegar and it's cleaned. If you want to avoid this, opt for demineralized water.- MAM bottles come in. You have to remove the gray ring which prevents splashes of boiling water, put the bottle in, then put the ring back around the fascinator. Then, start the bottle warmer.- For the dosage, it's still painful... I don't have any tricks.

We tested this Tigex bottle warmer, it's just perfect!! First at home or in the car, it is equipped to work anywhere by its 220v and 12v cigarette lighter sockets. It is one of the fastest we know and above all its instructions for use are very well done, it tells you precisely how long it takes to warm up a small jar coming out of the refrigerator or a bottle to room temperature. It's perfect! We recommend it 100%If this review was able to help you, like, it's always a pleasure and if you have any questions, don't hesitate to ask them, thank you. We are revising downwards our evaluation of this bottle warmer after several days of use including the car ..... It is still perfect but much too fragile-The 12v plug broke on the second use ....-The 220v cord is not removable, the cable gets in the way in the car-as soon as you plug it in, it starts to heat up and if it is empty (bottle or small potty) the instructions explain that a vacuum heater damages the bottle warmer!! -the basket and the ring are really too fragile and do not inspire confidence-The warm-up times written on a board are painful to remember and we can only have that the warm-up times are only given for the 120 or 240 mlIt therefore loses two stars because we would not bet on its longevity!!

The bottle warmer is used by us with Philips Avent bottles and it fits up without an adapter. However, there are 2 adapters in the scope of delivery, with which it is actually possible to use any other bottle. However, we only heat water with the device and that makes it really flawless and, above all, fast. It's a pity that this bottle warmer didn't already exist 2 years ago. I searched in vain for something like this at the time, as I always had to carry 1 thermos bottle with hot water. We use this warmer whenever we sleep out so that our little one can drink her usual milk in the morning without having to boil water and then get it back to temperature with cold water. I am really excited about the device and would definitely buy it!

Valid and super comfortable product. The only (and big) flaw is that it heats up quickly only the first or second time, after which it must be put back on charge because it heats up super slowly and then it doesn't even reach a temperature that goes out. However convenient and fast if you remember to charge it immediately after the first use maximum the second

Heats up properly but the battery doesn't hold. When it reaches 69% it cuts out, you have to recharge it fully to be able to use it again. Not to mention that the charge is very long and never reaches 100% but 99%, at the beginning the battery lasted until 35% when it cuts out, now 69%. A little disappointed with the price...

I was looking for a method to be able to heat breast milk on the go and with the Blimbini it works wonderfully. At the highest level, we have 120ml of milk at drinking temperature in about 3 minutes. When heating up, you should swirl the bottle of Blimbini in between so that the milk is heated evenly. Don't be surprised if the temperature display changes, but if the display remains constant after several swirlings, you can actually rely on the fact that this is the actual temperature of the breast milk. One more word about the great customer service: We had lost the seal of the MAM adapter on the way, which unfortunately is not yet available for purchase. So we contacted the support by e-mail and they helped us very friendly and quickly! Within 2 days we had a replacement.

A bottle warmer that perfectly meets all my expectations:
- Simple to use, it is very intuitive.
- The design is very modern, fits perfectly in my kitchen while in compact condition
- Temperature accuracy, no worries about heating my breast milk and powdered milk.
- Fast
-Built-in timer function

Works very well, very easy to use and does not take up a lot of space, it is the winning combination. The heating is done homogeneously in one minute 30 thanks to the steam and it is suitable for bottles as well as small jars. So for both toddlers and a little older, it is the essential accessory from 0 to 2 years old! As part of her activity as a childminder, it is incredibly practical for my partner. In these circumstances, she did not have the use of the cigarette lighter socket, which is however one of the key points of this device. Imagine during a holiday trip, what a comfort it is to be able to heat up baby's meal in the car while the adults eat their picnic, without having to find a microwave or stop in a restaurant.

The portable bottle warmer is a real lifesaver for parents who are out and about with their offspring. I was particularly pleasantly surprised that the temperature display is now also in °C by default - you can simply do more with it in this country.

The device heats water to 40°C in just a few minutes and chilled milk to 37°C in about 4-5 minutes, so the bottle is quickly ready to drink. With the battery, I can heat a few bottles per charge. If it does get tight, you can recharge via USB-A to USB-C cable (included).

Operation is very easy thanks to the clear display and the five adjustable temperature levels (37°C to 55°C). The high-quality workmanship made of stainless steel without plastic (inside) also ensures odourless and tasteless heating.

UNFORTUNATELY I didn't buy the warmer until the third child and regret not really having planned it directly into my basic equipment for the first child.
Absolute gamechanger!
In the past, I always took hot and cold water with me and then mixed it. Now I fill the bottles with the cold water and then fill it directly into the warmer to warm up. Set the temperature, wait a moment, done. This saves you the hassle of lugging a bottle of hot water and one of cold water. Just the bottles that you take with you anyway, the warmer and the powder. Really practical!

Tip for the battery - don't forget to turn off the device again when the water has been poured over, which of course eats up the battery. Otherwise, it lasts with us all day.

Real recommendation!
Excellent for car trips, compact and functional I recommend it! Personally I took the version with the different types of mouthpiece

I had taken it so that I wouldn't have to use the microwave to heat the water in the bottle. You had to put more water than indicated for the bottle to be warm and after a month of use, the product works for 10 seconds and of course the bottle remains at the same temperature. Buy this product = money throwing down the drain

This portable bottle warmer is really great! It is very easy to use. You screw, you press, you turn over and you wait for it to heat up automatically to 37°C.I was a little afraid of the waterproofing when you knock it over, but it's perfectly waterproof! It's really perfect! I see absolutely no fault with it!

This portable bottle warmer is really great! It is very easy to use. You screw, you press, you turn over and you wait for it to heat up automatically to 37°C.I was a little afraid of the waterproofing when you knock it over, but it's perfectly waterproof! It's really perfect! I see absolutely no fault with it!

To start by saying that in all honesty I think it is an excellent bottle warmer, things as they are:

👌 Valid for bottles of various sizes and the same with jars of baby food
👌 It fulfills its function without failure, as it is capable of heating, defrosting and maintaining temperature
👌 It is fast, the heating function goes from 2 to 5 minutes at most
👌 It has an intelligent function, which depending on the type of container, quantity and state (hot, cold, frozen), is capable of heating the liquid to the ideal temperature.

In my opinion, as I said above and without beating around the bush, I think it is a necessary product and as I say it is very easy to use.

I totally recommend it.

I am completely satisfied and happy with the device. The first 6 months it actually ran in continuous operation. Day and night alternately, because we bought two devices for downstairs and upstairs for the Nacht.Es heated reliably. The water was never too hot.
