So the bottle was always immediately available at night and also during the day.When traveling in the camper, the thing also did its job reliably. Above all, the warm-up function for jars was great, because you rarely have a microwave with you. Even homemade food was no problem. I just kept an empty jar of the ready-made food and then filled it there. It worked without any problems. The device is worth every penny. Even today, a year later, we still use the device. Also for sterilizing bottles and pacifiers.
Is not at all reliable on temperature. Does not allow you to set the desired time or temperature.  Really not great.

I'm particularly excited about the two heating modes: whether I want to heat breast milk or prepare water for formula, the temperature is always perfectly balanced. A highlight for me was a trip to the park – within 5 minutes, I had the milk heated to 37°C, and thanks to the wireless use, I didn't have to look for a power outlet.

The generous 500ml capacity allowed me to stay flexible throughout the day, even with multiple meals for my baby. The long-lasting battery is a real plus: I could easily heat water several times on one charge without having to worry. The safe, leak-proof design is also particularly handy – not a drop of milk was lost, even in my diaper bag.

I am very satisfied with this bottle warmerIt is very practical. I use it daily. The customer service is very accommodating and responsive. The glass part of the bottle warmer had broken because the bottle warmer had accidentally fallen on the tiled floor. The customer service offered to send me the missing part. Such customer service is rare these days! Go there with your eyes closed!!

I ordered this product so that I could warm up my daughter's bottles in my fastest and easiest way. The product is an electric bottle warmer that heats by steam. I highly recommend the product, the truth is that it has been very useful to me. The thing I liked the most is that you can introduce any type of bottle regardless of the brand or size, they all fit, also that it is valid to warm breast milk or formula. It is very easy and intuitive to use, everything is very well indicated, as for the materials the truth is that they look quite high. I'm delighted with him.
I hope you found my review helpful.
👇🏻👇🏻

There are some things I like and some I don't like about this heater.
Among the things that I like, one is its design, it has an adequate size to be able to transport it comfortably, the lid closing system and its automatic opening I also see it very suitable and comfortable, the rubber handle that comes is very good to be able to carry it hanging from the chair, the operation is very simple,  central On/Off button, on the left button to heat water "quickly", being able to select between 37ºc, 40ºc, 43ºc and 50ºc I have to say that I heated up to 50ºc five quantities of 150ml from the initial ±25ºc of the water, the fifth amount already took significantly longer to heat,  I understand that because of the already quite low battery capacity, taking approximately ±9 minutes this last time,
Once the selected temperature is reached, the water heater emits three beeps and maintains that temperature until it is turned off by pressing the OFF button.
On the right side is the slow heating mode for breast milk or formula, the selectable temperatures in this mode are 32ºc, 35ºc and 37ºc.
37ºC is the maximum temperature allowed in this mode so that nutrients are not lost and to be able to maintain an adequate temperature for intake.
The battery was charged from 12% to 50% in 35 minutes and up to 100% in 110 minutes total using the fast charger that comes in the package, during charging the base is slightly heated, it can be used while charging.
Inside the thermos are the measurements in Oz and ML to ensure the amount to be prepared.

Things that I don't like, for example, is the cleaning mode, not being able to separate the heating part of the thermos itself, it cannot be cleaned under water, the rubber that comes to protect the usbC charging port does not have much depth, splashes yes, but already passing water to wash it no,
The rubber gasket of its lid falls off easily and can be lost, the hinge of the lid does not look very robust, although the plastic with which it is built does, another thing is that if the mixture of formula, milk, breast milk is directly heated, it is possible that there are residues that are difficult to clean due to the problem of not being able to put it underwater,  The mouth is narrow, so even with a brush it is possible that not everything is cleaned well and there may be remains that produce bad odors or contaminate the contents, I see it much more practical to heat only water and then put everything together in the bottle than if you can boil and clean it well.

I see it ideal to take with you when you are going to be away from home all day or going on a trip and not depend on being able to find where to heat water or milk, if it runs out of battery with a powerbank solved.
The quality of the product makes it highly recommended, it is a product dedicated to what it is, to heat bottles and that's it, it works very well, for day to day it is very suitable if you do not want to carry a thermos with the product heated all day on you and thus avoid contamination by bacteria, this system is very suitable since filling with water or milk at the time,  In a few minutes you will have a "fresh" and much more suitable food.
The value for money is not spectacular but it is within the average, all these dedicated products are unfortunately like that.

I bought the water warmer for the holiday. I find the kettles in the hotel disgusting, and I like to drink a coffee in the morning (soluble, but never mind 😂).
I was skeptical at first with the temperature of 55 degrees, but it is already very warm, just the right drinking temperature without waiting for it to cool down.

There are different temperatures to adjust, once the desired temperature has been reached, the device beeps and keeps the heat constant.

When filling in 25 degrees cool water, it took me about 10 minutes to reach 55 degrees.

The device has a rubber ring at the bottom for a secure stand, the opening at the top for pouring opens and closes very well and the display is "hidden" and looks really stylish.

Great product, I highly recommend

I bought it a few years ago then used little and it broke down then I was sent a new one that I used a little and not at all for a yearI took it out and it doesn't work properly anymore it heats up for a few seconds and turns off. Disappointed because I really haven't used it much.

We use the bottle warmer mainly when we are on the road, but we are so satisfied with it and can recommend it, it fits in the pocket and warms the breast milk in no time and keeps it just as warm, the customer service has also been wonderful again and again! ☺️

The bottle warmer and baby food is very practical if you don't want to use a microwave. There, all you have to do is pour the dose of water into the device and place the bottle or jar in it and wait until it is hot. The switch-off is automatic when there is no more water. The device is efficient and simple to use.

My first purchase criterion was the ability to heat a large bottle. I am therefore very satisfied that the Suavinez zero zero anti-colic bottles can be heated thanks to this bottle warmer. You can also heat small jars during food diversification. We only use it 2 days a week, alternating with breastfeeding, so I can't comment on the robustness of the bottle warmer when used for every meal. However, it is very fast, equipped with a pod that allows you to find your way around the amount of water to put and there are indications on the amount of water to put behind the bottle warmer. Practical for mom, dad and especially for grandparents!

Like many others, we have this in continuous use to keep water for the milk formula. Operation is simple and reliable. You should just not forget to pull the plug and put it back in once a day. We have been using it for 8 months now and cannot report anything negative.

For practical reasons especially when we are not at home, I ordered this bottle warmer. The first positive point is that it is compact and light and it is not a luxury. The second good surprise is that it is visually nice, the finishes are good and the gold touch is nice. The interface is good and efficient and above all very intuitive thanks to its touch screen. Very practical, you can see how much time is left, it's appreciable on a daily basis. In use, the bottle is hot at the right temperature and above all the heat is homogeneous. It has 5 modes, I haven't used them all yet like the defrost program that I haven't tested yet. This pack is very complete, everything is there to satisfy you. So very satisfied, I recommend it!

The device itself is well thought out but after its heating cycle the bottle is just at room temperature ........ The goal is to have a hot bottle not at room temperature moralitya simple saucepan with water brought to a boil will be more effective and above all cheaper

The Tommee Tippee portable bottle warmer for on the go is helpful and practical when traveling & Co. The application is really simple, turn it on and put the bottle in and wait until the desired temperature (you can set 37°, 40° and 45°) is reached. The time specification of 10 minutes for 150ml is fine in my eyes. Between 4 and 7 bottles can be warmed up with it, depending on the filling quantity. It also comes with 2 adapters for MAM and Philips Avent bottles. I think that's really cool. We currently use the Tommee Tippee bottles anyway, but this way you are even more flexible. The bottle warmer is charged via USB-C, which works smoothly and well. The size of the bottle warmer is also small enough for a diaper bag.

I would have liked to have had it for my first one where the cold sterilizer and the bottle tree took up all the space on the kitchen countertop! There, indeed, the object is quite impressive at first glance, but as it is a sterilizer and a bottle tree in the end it is both much simpler and more practical. The color is versatile and will not look too "baby" in your kitchen. The use is very simple (and for once for this type of object the instructions are clear) and above all fast, barely more than 5 minutes, moreover given its size, you can put a lot of bottles and other teats in it. I recommend it to all the future parents in my life and many of them envy me ^^

With its high lid and large removable basket, this device for heating baby food has the advantage of being suitable for almost all models of bottles and ready-made jars found on the Marché.Il also has a sterilizer function, which makes it a multi-purpose piece of equipment. Its 200-watt power allows it to quickly heat up preparations, which is an interesting aspect when you have a busy professional activity! The device is accompanied by a user manual that holds up and offers its French version. Intuitive to use thanks to its various perfectly understandable control buttons, it is a bottle warmer that I recommend without the slightest hesitation.

We are very satisfied with the Blimbini and use it very regularly. Both on the road and at home, the Blimbini is our faithful companion and gives us maximum comfort, as our little mouse gets her meals very quickly. Greetings to Felix & the team of blimbini®.

Bottle warmer that does not work. It doesn't heat up. Bottle is hot but the milk is cold. Bought in March for my baby fortunately the heat came quickly so no need to heat anymore, I tried again this week it still doesn't work neither milk nor small jars. A real scam!

Probably one of our best purchases since we became parents. Super convenient and easy to use to heat the bottle quickly. With a larger ml capacity than the average of other bottle warmers. A must have, with a responsive and professional after-sales service!

This product has become indispensable for us on the go. We no longer ask ourselves the question of how and when we will be able to give the bottle to our daughter (who refuses it at room temperature)I recommend. The product is qualitative and the after-sales service is fast and efficient.

An electric bottle warmer model that fulfills its role perfectly and is easy to use! It has a good heating performance and also has the option of "defrost", which is interesting. Nothing to reproach him with..... I recommend it without any restraint!

With a full battery, the liquid is even warmer than stated in the description. I had ordered one for on the go and am so satisfied that I got another one for the night. For very small babies who drink even more often at night, the battery has to be charged every day, but the bottle warmer makes feeding at night much easier. Clear recommendation!

For any parent, you have to go through a sterilizer when you are expecting a child. This one, from the Avent brand, fulfills its functions perfectly despite its imposing size. It allows you to sterilize, dry or do both in one function. Which would take about 40 minutes. 10 minutes for sterilization and 30 minutes for drying. I find it interesting to have this device when you are expecting several young children. The fact that you can sterilize up to 6 bottles is a big plus. Otherwise, for 1 child, I don't find it necessary, knowing that it takes up a lot of space. The handling is quite quick thanks to its ease of use. For my part, with the materials used, cleaning is very easy.

This sterilizer is very easy to use, I put my bottles and pacifiers inside and wait for the sterilization to take effect. It is not mandatory to sterilize your bottles but for my part I find sterilization essential for my baby's health especially in the first months when the immune system is not yet strong enough. This one is very easy to use and clean, it is very intuitive and it stops by itself, it does not make noise and I am very happy to get rid of germs and viruses. This device is well finished, you can put up to 6 bottles in it. In short, this sterilizer is really good, I am really satisfied with it!

Great productHeats up very quickly, it holds the charge very well, there is the battery indicator that shows you the charge. We use it mainly when we go out, it's perfect. The after-sales service is super responsive. You can go there with your eyes closed. I recommend for anyone who hesitates

The bottle warmer makes reheating bottles super easy and uncomplicated - whether at home or on the go. You can heat a bottle several times with one charge and the operation is very simple. There is a star deduction for the fact that the sealing ring of the adapter cannot be repurchased, but it can quickly happen that you lose it. If this happens, you have to buy a new adapter directly - that's very annoying. But the customer service from Blimbini is great - they answered me quickly and helped. I would definitely recommend the bottle warmer, but ideally if you don't need an adapter. It would be great if Blimbini would also sell the sealing rings for the adapter.

It arrived with a deformed cap (which also gets stuck under pressure on the stainless steel part leaves plastic dust, see white studs near my finger in the photo) but I unpacked it well beyond the replacement period .. and patience.. my fault .. but the big problem is the biblical times for heating milk! I will do a comparative test but I think it takes 3 times the time it takes with the classic saucepan/water method. 80ml at 7° takes at least 15min to reach 37° (with 80% battery) with battery with lower residual charge it is literally unusable. Useful only outside in case of extreme need (no other alternative to heat milk).

This bottle warmer heats up well. Just put a little water at the bottom and then slide the bottle or jar in, set the temperature for the desired heating. No worries about heating, it's up to everyone to set the desired temperature, as with all bottle warmers.
Very practical on the other hand it has trouble "starting"... We only use it at home, we'll see when we're away.

And another product from MOMCOZY absolutely delights!!

I'm a big fan of Momcozy products, and the portable bottle warmer exceeded my expectations! With its two heating modes, it's easy to switch between breast milk and water, which makes preparing baby food much easier. The fast heating is impressive: in just 3 minutes, the water reaches 40°C, and cold breast milk is heated to 37°C in 5 minutes.

The generous 500ml capacity is perfect even when you're on the go for a longer period of time, and it's also light and handy. The long battery life allows you to heat the water many times.
The cordless design gives me the freedom to heat the bottle anywhere, and with the fast charging time of only 1.5 hours, I'm always ready to go. The Momcozy bottle warmer is truly a great companion for families with newborns! Highly recommended!

I am satisfied with this bottle warmer, you have to expect to fumble at first to choose the necessary heating time depending on the bottle and the amount of milk, but it does its job well and requires little space, practical for small kitchens. I recommend.

Ideal for breast milk. The temperature is still perfect, I checked with the kitchen thermometer, by selecting the quantity + glass bottle it's at 35°C when it stops flashing, and it goes up to 37°C if you wait a little longer. Then it goes into keeping warm so it never goes over. Defrost function in which you can put the bags directly if you forgot to put them in the fridge the day before. Small pot function, we heat the milk in this mode to make a cereal porridge. Fast enough but not too fast to preserve breast milk. For artificial milk, nothing beats the espresso bib but for breast milk it is really the best alternative.

For the breast milk in the fridge, we put it in the machine, we choose the quantity, a little water, we validate, very quickly the machine stops and the temperature is perfect. For the small homemade pots, in order to have the right temperature, I have to do the small pots function 2 times. After that it must be a question of adjustment and dosage. I haven't found the right one yet but it doesn't bother me because it's still fast. After looking at the comments on several bottle warmers, I opted for the one of the brand of my bottles, but I have the impression that they all remain equivalent. So no need to ruin this model remains a good compromise.

After turning it over the first time, the second time doesn't heat up either. I use the avent bottles which are recommended by the manufacturer and frankly I am very disappointed. I bought the same one I had for my 1st child, an Oxmorc that works great.

Quite pretty, it is above all very practical. Keep the milk at room temperature, reheat without the bottle being hot, it is really great. I also love the fact that we can heat up small jars, making them myself in glass jars, they were too big for my old bottle warmer and now they fit in without problems. I haven't tested keeping it warm 24 hours but already just a few hours are enough for me and it works very well. I haven't tested all the features yet, including the sterilization mode. Easy to clean, quite imposing on the other hand but of good quality, I adopted it and I am very satisfied with it.

Ideal for bottles outside the house Heats up fast with audible warning. Well use possible to make 4 heats of 300ml. Easy to clean because it can be completely dismantled. And responsive and commercial customer service. I regret not having had it for my first

Using a bottle warmer reassures me personally, because microwave tests have discouraged me (temperature control problem). Here I don't ask myself any more questions and above all I take it everywhere thanks to the cigarette lighter socket. The heating is ultra fast on the mains, on the other hand you have to be hyper patient (parents and baby...) for the heating in the car. The principle of use is simple: pour a small amount of water into a small receptacle at the back, which turns into hot steam to warm small jars and bottles. It works very well.

For mobile use, it's perfect. We use it when we are not at home. Slower than a model on the mains but very practical, no water, on battery, recharges by usb-c. Pretty fast if the milk is at room temperature. Highly recommend!

In the beginning it was fine. After 4 weeks, it no longer heats the milk to the specified temperature. It is always cold, although it is supposed to be 37 degrees. You have to try a thousand times until it slowly works. By then, however, the child will have half starved to death.

It has become indispensable for me when I am away from home. I can heat milk anywhere. My baby takes breast milk but in the bottle due to attachment problems so I have to carry the bottles with my milk in a cooler given the high temperatures. At room temperature it heats up very quickly but even with bottles from the fridge it takes about ten minutes. Really useful and convenient. I have Tomme Tippee and Avent bottles and they both fit but it also has adapter for MAM. I really recommend it.
Super fast heating convenient at home or in the car. The best for a very reasonable price

Easy to use, practical when travelling, my first experience with a bottle warmer. Unfortunately it does not replace the Bib espresso from Beaba.La bottle temperature is often hazardous despite the instructions followed to the letter. Used with MAM bottles.

Buying to prepare my very young son's bottles, very easy to use. Works well so far, only once, this one heated longer than usual, for no reason (always the same amount of milk to be prepared, and therefore, water, put inside), which caused a burning milk! The toasts after it went perfectly, to be monitored. On the product sheet, the photos show a "ring" all around the device, which shows a little the progress of the preparation of the bottle, changing color. On the product received it does not exist, only a light in the start button, exists, with only one color. Too bad you can't use it on a cigar light socket.

Easy to use, quick heating, solidity. Personally I use it to warm my breast milk and it changes your life, you choose the desired temperature and presto, it does everything by itself. Recharges via USB. Really practical accessory, I recommend it.

Easy to use, quick heating, solidity. Personally I use it to warm my breast milk and it changes your life, you choose the desired temperature and presto, it does everything by itself. Recharges via USB. Really practical accessory, I recommend it.

We took it to warm breast milk. When the milk is kept in the fridge it takes a really long time to heat it up (15min for 180ml). The bottle warmer should be made to prepare bottles from room temperature (with powdered milk and water at room temperature). For bottle preparation, the bottle warmer is equipped with a timer and not a temperature sensor. So does not say if the bottle is at the right temperature but just indicates that it has finished the heating time for a bottle according to the volume of bottle that has been set. We're rather disappointed but we haven't tested any other, so we don't have any other point of comparison or model to recommend

I recommend this bottle warmer, very practical for heating the amount of milk prepared. Be careful, the heating time is a few minutes, to avoid crying, be sure to anticipate the preparation according to the time of your little one's meals. This bottle warmer is useful and fulfills its purpose perfectly, it is easy to carry on weekends or trips. Allows you to defrost and reheat small jarsI find that the keep warm feature is not suitable because the bottle is then hot much too hot for our baby to eat. If it has been ready for 5 minutes, it will have to be allowed to cool down because keeping warm overheats the bottle. So be careful.

I have tested Momcozy's portable bottle warmer and find it extremely practical for on the go. The handling is simple: you set the desired temperature, and in a short time the milk is warmed up. I particularly like the fact that different adapters for different types of bottles are included, which increases compatibility. However, I noticed that the battery has to be recharged after about three uses, which can be a bit inconvenient for longer trips. You should also make sure to place the seals correctly to prevent leakage. Overall, however, I am satisfied with the performance and comfort of this bottle warmer.

We got the sterilizer for the microwave because we didn't want to fill so much work space with equipment. We use the MAM bottles, about 4-5 bottles fit in the basket. The operation is very simple, pour in some water and in 6 minutes the bottles are ready. Cleaning is also very simple, wipe with a damp cloth and everything is clean. Since we have twins we use it about 2-3 times a day and we are very happy that we bought this sterilizer. Quick, easy, does not take up much space, fits in our small microwave and is much cheaper to buy than the large electrical devices. From us a clear purchase recommendation.

Very easy to use and effective bottle warmer! It allows you to adjust the duration very easily. He helped us a lot to reheat the frozen homemade purees/compotes and breast milk especially at night! We keep it very carefully and recommend it!

Nothing negative to say! Originally bought the product only for vacation. Good size because it doesn't take up too much space in the suitcase. But also use it at home and especially at night. Bottle is kept warm and is ready immediately when you need it.

Super great product. Keeps what it promises. The battery lasts great. Charging the product is super fast. It is also practical that you can charge it anywhere thanks to the USB port. The water warms up very quickly. Price is a bit expensive and honestly had to think very often about whether to order it, but I don't regret doing it. I can only recommend it.

efficient bottle warmer, holds the load wellThe temperature displayed corresponds to that of the bottom of the bottle so I stir slightly while it heats up so that it is homogeneous in the bottleeasy to disassemble to washSAV very responsive when I needed them
There is no stop button, once it starts it must finish! It makes a lot of noise, I often burn myself when I remove the bottle because of the steam.

After almost a year of loyal service, as soon as I turn it on, the device blows the lead in the house, it smells like a nice short circuit at the level of the heating plate..... Overall satisfied but I would have liked it to last over time........

Very good product. I tested one before that doesn't heat up at all. When I tried this one, I was thrilled. You just have to put 20 milliliters of water in it and when you press the start button, the water heats up so much that it evaporates when heating the bottle. And yes indeed you have to be careful not to burn yourself with the steam that escapes from the bottle warmer and also pay attention to the heat of the bottle when you take it out. I test it with a 150ml mam bottle because before that my daughter was breastfed. For cleaning, the bottom should be descaled from time to time.  I recommend. On the other hand, I haven't tried it in the car yet and I haven't tried the small jars to reheat.

Very disappointed with the product, the heating time is long (up to 2min) and above all you have to heat at least 2 times so that the milk is lukewarm. After once it's cold. Sometimes it heats up for 10 seconds and stops, the water doesn't evaporate... In short, not great!

I state that I have never used a bottle warmer before: not very intuitive, we had to do several tests before understanding how it works despite having read the instructions. Heating a plastic fridge bottle with a fast temperature at the time indicated in the instruction manual, it seems that at the end of the operation something has been wrong because the plastic of the bottle is hot enough to have to collect it with a cloth. Only later did we realize that the milk inside was not actually hot, so what you just need to do is shake the bottle well and then it is OK to serve. Used with 130 ml MAM bottles per hour.

The tub must be filled with water, and the thermostat keeps it at the right temperature. I used it to heat massage oil, but it's not conclusive.- The bottle is wet when you take it out, it drips, you have to wipe it- You have to leave the bottle long enough before so that the contents have time to warm up to the core. Otherwise it cools down right away- And you have to put the bottle back regularly so that it doesn't cool down too muchIn short, you would need two heaters and two cruets, and alternate: you might as well take a double one, it will be less cumbersome. Note: Warm oil is much more liquid than oil at normal temperature. It changes the contact.

As a mom, we are often on the road by car and that's exactly why this thermos bottle with USB-C is simply ingenious (can be charged in the car). The integrated heating function brings the water to the perfect temperature quickly and reliably. No eternal waiting and no waiting if you had too much heat.

The battery life is easily enough for a whole day outside with baby. The insulation function without electricity also works perfectly – water stays warm for many hours. Otherwise, everything can be charged while driving.

Design, function, suitability for everyday use: this bottle really surprised us. For moms who are on the road a lot, a must have.

At the beginning we were very happy with our purchase, because the use is convenient 1 month after using the device despite the launch of the cleaning of bottles and teatswe return bottles and teats partially cleaned and in addition it gives off a musty smell in the bottles. We have recleaned the device regularly with the self-cleaning program without bottles and teats of course inside. But nothing helps. We lost more than 70 euros for a device that lasted 1 month, it is very disappointing. We were told in fact after the purchase that the sterilizations of bottles and teats were no longer useful. Thank you for this useless purchase.

We bought this product with my wife as a backup bottle warmer for our outdoor outings, but it eventually also replaced the mains bottle warmer in our house. It is easy to use, heats up quite quickly (provided it is well charged) and is easy to maintain. It is surely the most compact bottle warmer on the market, which is very appreciable in a diaper bag. Its only flaw, in my opinion, is the lack of a battery level indication, although it easily lasts 3 to 4 heats before needing to be recharged. We use it with the included Mam adapter. I recommend this bottle warmer for families who like to move around

Bought to use in the car, to be more autonomous for long trips. You have to do several tests (in the car because the heating time is not the same in 12V and 220V) before to find the right amount of water (to the nearest milliliter) depending on what you want to heat. Difficult to measure (NUK does not provide any way to measure small volumes of water with the bottle warmer). In the end, I measured in small tubes with caps the volumes of water I will need for my trip. Too bad the 220V wire does not come off... useless and not practical in the car. Otherwise the product does its job, it seems solid and safe but the heating process needs to be improved and simplified.

I recommend very practical, easy to use, transportable, need a plug, prepare your bottle and heat it up before changing your baby, a total time saver heats the bottle to the right temperature very well. Haven't tried Potty yet

I'm so glad I found the bottle warmer! Everything has become so easy on the go. I can only give positive feedback. The only point of criticism from me. After you have used the warmer 2 times and the battery is actually still more than half full, I personally have to say that it can take a mega long time with the 3rd bottle! However, you must not forget that the device had to fight against getting the water up to temperature with cold water and outside temperature between 5 and 10 degrees! But otherwise it still takes longer to heat azf 37 degrees the third time... I think that's a shame! Nevertheless, I would recommend it. Essential ❤️ for on the go

A good bottle warmer but which requires a much longer heating temperature and heating time than what is indicated so that the bottle is hot and not just lukewarm. It's a shame because the use is easy and the design is nice.

Fast heat-up time, keep warm, rings when the water is at temperature, display of the remaining batteryAnd a responsive and very efficient after-sales serviceIt is for me by far the best, I recommend you, no negative points for my part

We find the product super practical and super easy to carry. We use it at home and also when we are outdoors. A very good autonomy and fast to recharge. I really recommend the product for the time being.

I was looking for a bottle warmer for our outings and adapted to mam bottles. I highly recommend. Large capacity and very practical, I bring it from everywhere. After-sales service to the top response in the same day on a Sunday. I don't regret our purchase

This sterilizer is really sensas. It's easy to use and child's play. My wife showed me how to do it and I understood from the third explanation. Before, I washed the bottles in the sink with hot water and a small suitable brush. But that was before. Now I put the bottles on a kind of drainer and they are sterilized in a few minutes, including the teats. Even I can do it. So why not you? Note that it doesn't take up more space than that and that you can sterilize several bibs at the same time. My wife is really reassured. Indeed, baby will not be infected by bacteria. Good value for money.

It will save you time for the sterilization of your bottles. Make sure you have the right microwave. Read the instructions to adjust the power and time that is suitable. The sterilizer itself is quite compact, and does not take up space. With 200ml of water (20cl) and no more, you will be able to sterilize your bottles in no time. Your bottles (teats etc...) will remain sterile for 24 hours but you will have to leave them in the device. The + is that it also dries and that's good. When you get out of the microwave, you don't burn yourself, your wrists stay cold. Cleaning is also easy and without constraints, it's really great!

Super easy to use, safety level I recommend because you put the proportion of water you want according to the amount of milk/jar you then on the button and it will turn off by itself uqfuqand the water will evaporate. Very fast especially if you have glass bibs, a little longer with plastic bibs but super reasonable anyway. Practical with the cigarette lighter in the car but really allow time to heat up because it really takes longer (I plan a glass bib if you use it in the car because less waiting time). I recommend on this site because in department stores the margin is huge for the same product (not far from double)

Meets all expectations! Easy operation, every function is sensible and well thought-out. Brings the expected performance and at a comparatively low price. In addition, the device is super quiet! The display with target and actual temperature/time is helpful and also the automatic switch-off. We like to use the keep warm function. All presets can be adjusted when starting the respective function, such as the 40 degrees for heating the milk, which we regulate down to 37. When sterilizing, there is enough space for two bottles with lids and a little small stuff, such as pacifiers. Clear purchase recommendation!

After a long reading and searching, I decided on this warmer. However, it takes ages to heat up and in the meantime I warmed the bottle in a water bath. It keeps the bottles warm, but only for 2 hours, even though it was switched on. The temperature display shows the wrong temperature. For me clearly a bad buy...

Unfortunately, we did not try this bottle warmer which was one of the best rated on the internet comparison. We didn't pay attention that there was only the house socket and not the car. So we sent him back. 😕

A huge help for us and we love that you can keep two bottles warm at the same time. Especially for the night an absolute relief, as bottles with perfect drinking temperature were available. In the evening, we always prepare the necessary bottles with necessary water. When hunger then appears, just put in the milk powder and the bottle is ready super quickly. We also use the device during the day because it is just so mega practical. The water in the bottle warmer is changed by us daily and the device is cleaned. This is also done quickly and easily. We are super satisfied with the device.

We received this portable bottle warmer as a gift when our daughter was born. We are very satisfied, we can no longer do without it, whether on the road or at home. In addition, they have a great after-sales service.

Very well designed, practical and ergonomic item. The battery lasts long enough to recharge it only a few times a month between two rides. The support is very responsive and very concise. Thank you to them for their answers.

I had to send it back after a few days of use so here is my opinion:

No control over the heat it's either cold or too hot with a crying baby I spent a lot of time cooling the bottle with cold water

As far as the different modes are concerned, well there are minimum temperatures that you can't change and it's a shame

It still fulfills its job

For parents who are looking for a good alternative because I have tried at least 5 bottle warmers I advise you to buy a cheap bottle warmer and a cooking probe with an alarm it saves my life

Edit: After two months of use, the sound has just let us down. Instead of a beep, we have an electric noise, very unpleasant and not loud. You can't hear when the bottle is ready in the other room:( I remove a star...

It's really great! We use Philips Avent glass bottles as well as medela containers and no worries.
It is possible to thaw breast milk, although we tend to leave the milk thawed overnight.
You can change the desired temperature so it's really great!
We even started using it to heat up our pesto 😆jars

In short, we really like its versatility!

I bought this bottle warmer to heat breast milk bottles. Frankly for the price, you can take it without hesitation! I decided to take a plastic syringe (with graduation in ml) to make it easier and faster than their container for measuring. Everything is noted on the back of the bottle warmer (milk at room temperature or milk coming out of the fridge). I find it fast but above all very practical (the bottle warmer stops automatically when there is no more water and therefore the bottle is hot). In short: easy to use, heats up quickly, easy to clean, attractive appearance

It works perfectly... Right now. We learned the hard way that the bottle warmer can only be fully charged with a 67W charger. It costs around €30 on Amazon. Without that charger, the bottle warmer worked poorly and always ran out of power. Important note, I do not recommend using the supplied cable (it is not for powerful charging). Absurd that all this info is not specified in the product description. Oh well, amen, apart from that the bottle warmer is a marvel. Used with both Avent and Mum bottles. Obviously with Avent it is the best because you don't need the gearbox which is included in the package.

Bought it after reading the various reviews and I must say that we found ourselves very badWe, unfortunately, are forced to feed our little artificial milk. So once prepared and left in the fridge we connected it to the bottle warmer. As soon as it was plugged in, it signaled 18 degrees, which was impossible since it was in the fridge. After a very short wait, it reported 37 degrees when it was 22. We tried to set the temperature first to 40 and then to 45 degrees. The problem is that, even after a while, the milk never exceeded 32 degrees. Return made

We felt the same way as the many first-time parents, the preparation of the first bottle formula unsettled us. It just always takes too long, because newborns are hungry NOW, especially at night. This device makes the preparation much easier. The temperature is really perfect and it goes relatively quickly. But I especially like the fact that almost everything happens automatically and you don't have to stay with it, but can use the time for changing diapers etc. The device itself also doesn't get so hot that you could burn yourself. The USB function is just so far thought out - a must for every trip. The price of currently 69.99 EUR is worth it.

I am modifying my comment to date because I am very unhappy! I bought this bottle warmer 2 months ago, I found it very practical because it takes up little space and heats quickly for some time it no longer heated the breast milk bottles that came out of the fridge unless they were in glass bottles but now it doesn't even heat the bottles of powdered milk anymore! While they must be at room temperature. I don't recommend this product at all, it's junk and I'm starting to believe that it comes from the brand! Why pay a lot for products that are not of quality?! Very disappointed
Very good product. High quality workmanship and does what it should. Everything is fine!

This portable bottle warmer is designed to make life easier for parents on the go. It offers dual heating modes, suitable for both breast milk and water, ensuring the ideal temperature without overheating. Its 500ml capacity allows you to heat bottles and standard-sized containers, while the rapid heating system reduces waiting. The long-lasting battery ensures autonomy during long trips or outings, and its compact design makes it easy to transport. It is a practical and safe solution, ideal for those looking for comfort, efficiency and reliability in feeding the baby away from home.

By using this bottle warmer I naively thought that it allowed you to heat a bottle always at the same temperature and in the same amount of time but not at all! From one time to the next, the bottle is more or less hot. As for the capacity, it is very good for bottles up to 240 ml but insufficient for 330 or 350 ml which are not immersed in water enough to be very hot. And finally all this seems very complicated, long and tedious to me for not much and what should have been practical turns out to be more gadget than anything else.

It warms very fast use bottles, rechargeable with USB and in just 10 minutes allows us to heat a 150ml bottle to the ideal temperature.

It is ideal to take it anywhere and be able to heat the milk in a very short time, being able to heat cold milk in 2-3 minutes.

The compatibility is very high since we can use it with the brand's own bottles, it also includes bottles so that we can take those for a very interesting price.

One function that I have missed is that of sterilization. This one is more focused on the possibility of using it anywhere quickly and easily.

According to the instructions in the instructions, you need a maximum of 7 minutes for water and 10 for milk. The 7 minutes turned into 13 minutes and the milk was still at 26 degrees after 20 minutes. Unfortunately, I couldn't test it any further because the battery was already empty. According to the manufacturer, the battery should last about 1.5-2 hours. I would even say that this value is not even reached in keep warm mode.

Then some comments would be deleted here, which were negative.
The device was previously classified as a frequently returned product.
Which is no longer any talk of now!

Tested only while waiting for the date of its daily use. The tests are convincing. To compensate for the somewhat negative comments I have read here and there, I only use glass bottles (it's the health of your children that we are talking about here) and it works for the models I use. As for the heating time, for me, the softer it is (therefore slower) the better. It's not a kettle I'm looking for and I found the product that fits the use well. There is no alarm, nor lights of all colors and perfectly useless. It's a bottle warmer

Had the product 3 times. The first two devices broke after 2 months. It just didn't work anymore. Although the device was charged, the screen didn't turn on anymore. Also charged again without success. (The device didn't fall down or anything else)
We have always handled the device well
. The device was exchanged 2 times for me. Now after 2 months and on
vacation again the same defect. I can't understand that. Either this is intentional or a serious production error.
It has really always helped us a lot and has been really great for on the go. But 3 times the same defect is unforgivable

This device heats up your bottle in 1 minute flat, it can also be used when traveling thanks to its charging with the cigarette lighter, it is not too large which allows it to be easily taken in the baby's kit.

Product that arrived opened and packaging degraded, no instructions... efficient Amazon customer service to resolve the issue. However works great. Extremely effective. Can't wait to use it for bottles in the middle of the night.

For the moment, I can't answer, since this product is intended for a person in my family who is expecting a happy event. So, when she will have started to use it, I could answer your question. Thank you

excellent travel bottle warmer. The bottle warmer is very practical since it can be used without a direct power source; With one charge you can easily heat the bottle 6 timesIt is recharged with USB; only the wire is present in the box and there is no plugIt has three temperature options 37° 40° 45°, the temperatures are not 100% realisticit marks a few degrees more and is the only NEGATIVE note of this bottle warmer E Compatible with Philips avent productsWithout the need to take adapters

Not bad:
- compact
- Fits a lot of bottle sizes
- Easy to clean as no pimples
- Sleek design
But:
- not necessarily very fast
- expensive
In summary: not bad but not perfect.
€46.99 to date.

Multifunction bottle warmer, it allows you to heat the bottles not only you can also sterilize them, heat the small jars, defrost or heat continuously. I find its use quite simple and intuitive and the instructions are in French. Following my first use of the product I was quite pleasantly surprised since the heating time is quite fast and the bottle is heated evenly. It is a very useful device and does not take up a lot of space. And finally I find that the value for money is very good, so I recommend this product

This sterilizer is simply great. It is super easy to use and easy to maintain. It is higher than it is wide, which means that it does not take up too much space on the worktop. It contains up to 6 bottles, whatever their size and material, silicone or glassSterilization and drying last about 40 minutes and the whole thing remains sterile (if left in the device) for 1 day (24 hours). The tank is used to put the bodies of bottles and the basket above is used to put pacifiers, pacifiers, small objects/toys such as teething rings or even baby aspirators.
I'm very glad I got the product so soonIt works great, nothing adds 😂😂😂I invite all parents to try this productWe're quiet nowThis few seconds to make baby's milk

I relied on the many positive reviews but I am rather disappointed with the product. It heats the bottle rather quickly, which is a good thing, but because it's steamed, removing the lid and bottle is boiling. You have to take a cloth each time so as not to burn yourself and wipe the soaked bottle. In addition, if you leave an extra 30sec or 1 minute, the milk will overheat.  So you have to be on the lookout for the bell. The container is boiling while the contents are sometimes just warm

A basic to have at home for the arrival of baby, very practical, it allows you to heat most of the bottles we have at home in less than two minutes Which is really practical, especially at night when a baby is very hungry and the bottle must be ready quickly! It would be automatically when the water is at the recommended temperature (be careful however with the basic temperature of the water) Ideal when we are in the middle of the night, we do not have very clear ideas and thus avoid overheating. In short it is an essential to have, it takes up little space and its price is affordable.

I use it because it is V more comfortable than the saucepan but I am not completely satisfied. You can't understand the temperature, sometimes it gets hotter and sometimes less. The rapid heating is uneven, sometimes only the hot bottom heats up and the milk is cold. You have to heat and cool it down several times. Slow heating, on the other hand, is not usable for me because if the child is hungry it is not that he waits half an hour. In the end, don't think you'll save time, but it's useful to avoid the danger of boiling water in the saucepan

Unlike bottle warmers where you have to prepare the bottle beforehand or those that make a double boiler, this one allows you to heat only the water when it is not yet the time, to keep it warm. It heats up to a perfect temperature for my baby and very quickly. Its 4 features make it a very useful and practical bottle warmer.
For example, for 120ml at 37 degrees, just wait 3.5 mins. The steam makes the heating even. The container is large enough to accept all sizes of bottles. I've been using it for 2 months and I recommend it 100%.

If you are looking for a regular bottle warmer, just for home use, then yes, I can recommend this product. It's compact, and does its job well. For 30€, it is accessible to everyone and does not take up too much space on the worktop. On the other hand, if you are looking for a good product that heats up quickly to help out in the car, I advise you to go for another model. Indeed, I find it a bit long to heat up, and even then, we can't really talk about heat. The milk is just lukewarm, there is not much difference with a bottle left at room temperature.

I'm really happy that we ordered this thing relatively early. It's a pure relief, especially for the night. I always prepare all bottles of water, 2 bottles are of course always in the warmer, powder in and done! Especially for little crying babies who have absolutely no patience, perfect!

The main advantage of this sterilizer is that it makes a bottle tree too. The use is very simple: fill a container with water, empty it into the base, place the tree fill bottles and teats, close the bell. Turn on the device. When the sterilization is complete, an audible signal is heard. This sterilizer is bulky, but it replaces two devices, so it doesn't take up more space. The only negative point is that when you put a lot of bottles, teats and caps, when you remove the bell, some things fall off. That's annoying.

The box seemed to have already been opened because it was served by the pieces of tape + dog-eared instructions as if already used. Regarding the device itself, it turns on correctly and charges but does not heat the water at all even after several tries !! So I asked for a refund... Unfortunately I think I came across a bad series, it's a shame because I fell back on a competitor brand ..
I am very happy with this bottle warmer that I have been using for 4 months now, it still works well and its heating time is fast compared to others, it also holds the charge very well.

Absolute gamechanger for the nightly milk bottle. It is easily possible to keep water warm up to 40 degrees, the battery lasts all night (but then you have to recharge). I would recommend having the charging cable ready if you want to heat several portions overnight. Conveniently, you can also heat breast milk (much more slowly).
Super practical for us, just put a bottle of water next to it and always prepare a portion fresh if necessary. Of course, just as practical for on the go, for us it was THE solution for the night.

This portable bottle warmer is certainly a little heavy perhaps due to its battery and its heating motor, but it is really at the top for outings. The bottle fits perfectly to the device via its two adapters for universal screw thread size. Regarding its use, it remains relatively very simple with only a push button as control. It has three heating powers and you will have to wait almost 10 minutes for the bottle to reach the desired temperature. Really at the top! He never leaves the little girl's bag. Satisfied, I recommend ✅ it

Baby accessories. You receive a nnmade bottle warmer that works wirelessly. It has a capacity of 340 ml of water or milk and a pretty sage green color. Like a traditional baby warmer, you can adjust the heating temperature and keep warm for up to 7 hours. Easy to use and with a small footprint. Battery operated and rechargeable with a USB cord provided. An accessory from the BABYMOOV brand that guarantees the bottle warmer for life. I'm really excited about this accessory that revolutionizes outings with baby. I highly recommend it.

The bottle warmer is a must-have for busy parents. It quickly and safely warms baby food in just a few minutes, which is great for those times when your little one needs to be fed quickly. Easy to use, it allows you to set the temperature precisely with its timer, ensuring that your baby's food is always at the ideal temperature. With its convenient and efficient design, this bottle warmer simplifies parents' lives and ensures baby's comfort and well-being at all times.
Very good quality items, we use it very regularly for travel or other outings. And it is easily transportable, it works really well very good product. We are very happy with it

You can use this bottle warmer for a very long time because it warms the bottles... and the small jars!! It thaws or reheats food to room temperature.

It's fast, efficient. The desired temperature is chosen, depending on the material of the container. Really good!!

And then it's easy to clean, it's quite pretty so personally I don't mind leaving it in the kitchen.

A very good brand that I'm always happy with! Excellent value for money.

We may have come across the wrong one but our bottle warmer cuts off while there is water left - sometimes once, sometimes three, four - the toast is inevitably impacted. either too cold, or too hot even boiling (because restarting the heating with the remaining water totally changes the situation and does not bring us the expected temperature) but very rarely the milk is at the right temperature. Lucky days only! If we price this bottle warmer it was precisely for its alleged speed of heating... We obviously don't recommend.

This portable bottle warmer is certainly a little heavy perhaps due to its battery and its heating motor, but it is really at the top for outings. The bottle fits perfectly to the device via its two adapters for universal screw thread size. Regarding its use, it remains relatively very simple with only a push button as control. It has three heating powers and you will have to wait almost 10 minutes for the bottle to reach the desired temperature. Really at the top! He never leaves the little girl's bag. Satisfied, I recommend ✅ it

I didn't buy the Blimbini on Amazon but directly on the original website because it was cheaper there. Since we travel a lot and I would like to have the water warm to the point, we decided on the blimbini and I am totally thrilled. The handling is easy, it gets warm quickly. So it does exactly what it is supposed to. Ps.: there was a handwritten card (congratulations etc.) I personally found that very nice and shows me that the company still takes time for the customer.
During the first use I found the button stuck in the on position and it's clear that it's a manufacturing defect. Unfortunately I discovered this problem after 30 days of delivery.

This is our second bottle warmer from the brand (the first one fell from quite a height and didn't survive, at the same time it's not designed for :D)This model works just as well as the previous one. The box does not contain a cigarette lighter cable. This model does not sound when it has finished heating, the light goes out that's all. I find that it heats up very but quickly, certainly because I use glass bottles it transmits heat better than plastic. We are very satisfied with the product at home, I highly recommend it, for the price I have never found better.
It is a pretty practical accessory when outing with baby. Quite long charging time and correct use and heating time given that it is on battery (allow about 5min).

A well-made bottle warmer since it allows 5 modes of use. It is ultra-simple and intuitive to use and start. It is an excellent value for money that is offered ici.Je recommend as a birth gift, it will necessarily be useful, and in addition it is beautiful. I recommend.

1 month after buying it, he was already showing signs of failure... forced to press the button 4-5 times in a row so that it's not even hot but slightly warm (in the car let's not talk about it, wait 10 mins so that it's barely warm). Very disappointed, so we quickly went to the microwave and we used it just to warm the little milk until the day (3 months later) when it started to make a lot of steam and it smelled like it burning... Since then, no matter how hard we try to press the button, it doesn't work anymore!

This sterilizer has a drying function and that makes all the difference. The time saved is considerable, especially since its capacity allows you to start a group cleaning and in less than an hour, you have clean, sterilized and ready to use bottles. The handling is ultra simple. You can even use the drying independently. Its large capacity makes it a bit bulky, but it's not dramatic either. You can also sterilize other small accessories in the tank, such as teats. It quickly becomes a must-have on a daily basis.

In any case, it does what it's supposed to. It fits 2 vials + some accessories for sterilizing. However, I have one minus point: The rack for insertion is well suited for sterilizing, but for heating 1 vial, which is not very full, it is defective. It floats high and unfortunately you have no way to attach it to the bottom so that the vial is stable. Is a small balancing act.Maybe it is more stable with glass bottles, since they already bring a higher empty weight with them. Otherwise I have nothing to complain about so far. :)

We use the device several times a day to sterilize a breast pump, pacifiers, bottles or smaller cups, etc.... I have also sterilized small juice bottles or jam jars for household/cooking use in it. Warming up also works great and the operation is absolutely uncomplicated. Before buying, it is only important to note that the device really offers relatively little space (e.g. two bottles with teat OR a Philips Avent pump built on top of each other OR two medium-sized cups with lids). We would buy the device again.

〰️ This bottle warmer sells dreams! A bottle heats up in 3 minutes, the dream! In theory.. Because in practice it's not always that. 〰️ At the 1st use, I was delighted, the water in the bottle was quickly heated and without any problems.The 〰️2nd (the next day) took much longer, while the quantity was the same.And 〰️on the 3rd day, the water was super hot, I had to run it under water and add cold water so that baby wouldn't burn himself.. 〰️The bottle warmer is therefore practical but don't trust it and don't expect it to be good in 3 minutes.

The Nuliie electric bottle warmer is a 6-in-1 device that allows you to quickly warm breast milk or infant milk in 2 minutes thanks to its 400W power. It offers precise temperature control with LCD display, a 24-hour keep warm function, and an automatic shut-off for added safety. It is compatible with most types of bottles (glass and plastic) and has 100°C sterilization and thawing functions. I appreciate how fast it is, how easy it is to use, and how good it is for money.

"- What's that? Is this your new kettle?" Thus begins the story that will lead my parents to give me an envious and disgusted look. Why disgusted? you may ask. Because becoming a father in my turn, he was making a joy, I think I am experiencing the same worries that they may have experienced with me. The parents, these resentful beings. They couldn't wait to see me get up, prick up my ears every ten minutes, thinking they heard the baby crying. I can't wait to be able to say: so, we're too worried, aren't we? Do you remember when you told us that we were doing a lot about safety? But technology has countered them. And I have a baby monitor that warns me when the baby is crying. And so on for each aspect of daily life. And we come to that famous little afternoon in March when my father asks me: "- What is this? Is this your new kettle?- No, it's the sterilizer.- ...- At night, I put the bottles and teats, he heats, sterilizes and dries everything. No need to boil like you do.- ...- Bah what?- Honey? Put on your jacket, quickly: we're breaking!" Well, the last line is of course false, but I saw in the back of their eyes the flashback of all those moments lost forever boiling water to immerse bottle teats and other totottes. And just for that, it's worth having this sterilizer at home:)

This bottle warmer has a simple and original operation, it is practical in the sense that to have the right temperature without risking burning baby's tongue, with this one we aim it on the bottle 4 accessories are provided if necessary, and we turn it over, no it is not a cocktail but a fascinator that your child will drink at the right temperature 37 degrees,  It is displayed on the screen, allowing you to control it. The sterilization option is very practical for bottles and teats. This bottle warmer is small and compact even with its accessories.

The device does what it should, when it is fully charged it takes just 3-4 minutes until the water or the finished milk has reached 40 or 37 degrees, especially at night simply bomb. However, only when it is fully charged, the lower the battery level, the longer it takes. Nevertheless, faster and safer than with other warmers that work with water, there the milk was sometimes so hot that it had to be waited again. We have been using the device all day long for months and are still very satisfied. Even my midwife was thrilled. 😀
At the beginning 3min was enough to heat the bottles. A few days later it took 4.At one point it relieved me, I put it in a corner. I'm going to post on a classified ads site

I bought this product following the good reviews. But this item heats up too much to the point where it melted the plastic of my bottles Mam.Je am forced to move the bottle while it heats up to prevent the base from sticking. Similarly the bottle is quickly hot but the contents are not heated enough. So I am disappointed with this product from this brand, I have another bottle warmer from a sub-brand that works better. I bought this one for the car mode option that I didn't have with the first one, that's the positive point of this device.

Positive points:-Practical because it can also be used in the car-The priceNegative point:A little difficult at the first uses to adjust the amount of water in relation to the volume of the container to be warmed. It is important not to fill the bottle warmer with water, otherwise your container will come out boiling. The amount of water needed depending on the volume of the container is very small to put in. For a volume of 120ml I put a small amount of water and the bottle comes out at the right temperature. Remember to test my temperature before giving to baby.

... or at least saviors of our nights. Simply prepare enough water in the evening, start heating at night at the first sign of the little one, add prepared milk powder and feed it still half asleep. Of course, it also works great on the go. Charging via USB makes you super flexible and the charge is enough for enough bottles, even if the little one dozes off again deeply and the water has to be kept a little warm. We are actually thinking about a second device in case it should 😅 no longer work

So the bottle warmer TO Go is really great in itself!! We love using it! Unfortunately, the customer service is pretty lousy! I've been trying to reach someone for a long time, since I lost the rubber seal for the MAM attachment, I wanted to ask if they could send me a new one. In vain..
It has saved our lives when traveling or away because we are forced to heat for thickened milk. It holds the charge and easy to use, nothing to report I recommend

Absolute bad buy.In itself, the bottle warmer heats the water and also works. However, the device loses water through the underside. The water runs down right next to the power cables. If you look into the device from above, you can also see beautiful Chinese characters. Everything became clear to me. It is simply a Chinese device (there are some here that look the same), which has received a Grundig sticker. This problem is also often found with these devices. Therefore, clearly no purchase recommendation.

Easy to use, I especially like the digital temperature display. The preset programs are quickly set at the touch of a button and can then also be adjusted manually in temperature. I find it particularly good that the temperature is really maintained, even if the bottle is in the device for an hour, with another device the pre food has virtually cooked. The sterilization program also works perfectly and to complete satisfaction. Absolutely recommended, I have no negative points about this device.
Mediocre product, heats up but doesn't stop on its own and heats up before you even press the power button... 2 products ordered, 2 defective products. Fortunately, returns are free.

Bought as a replacement for a bottle warmer that gave up the ghost. Big disappointment! It takes at least 2 (long) heating cycles for 270 mL of milk in the fridge to be barely lukewarm, regardless of the setting (270 mL or more). And my daughter complains that her bottle is cold one time out of 2.The water in the device is a little more than lukewarm but not really hot either. Of course, heat transfer is not very efficient in this case. So yes, it is easy to use, but this bottle warmer does not perform its only task as it should.

We are glad to have decided to give a relief after 6 months of bottles. Until now, we had laboriously put together perfectly tempered thermos bottles every day. Lies and remains within reach in the backpack, together with a power bank and is indispensable on the road.+ handy+ USB+ good for cleaning- Price is steep but comparable to other devices- I have to set the temperature to 45 degrees to reach about 40 degrees. 37 degrees will not be 37 degrees, but if you know it, it's not bad either. It's best to test all temperature settings at the beginning.- Battery empty quicklyCONCLUSION: again and again, but from the time you get to know your baby well. In the beginning it has to be faster!

Keeps two bottles of water constantly warm and so the bottle is immediately ready for use, especially at night. You only have to add the milk powder. However, we have set the setting for the drinking temperature of about 40°C to 47°C, as the display seems to only refer to the water. But compared to the Nuk bottle warmer, the temperature does not fluctuate. or compared to the Linii you don't have to wait until it is warm. Was really a good investment. In fact, we only tested the keep warm function.

Best investment ever, that's what my husband also says. Before that, we boiled the bottles in a pot. Now we can sterilize 5 large bottles (260ml) and a small bottle of 150 ml including teat and cap at once. 6 min in the microwave with 200 ml of water.

We quickly switched from Reer to this device, as it has space for two bottles. The plastic insert, which always floats up in the water, could be improved. A fastening would be useful. In addition, it is stupid if you use the small plastic bottles from Avent or Nuk, because they also float on top and fall over and the teat is then under water when you take out a bottle. We have made do with a small divider so that they no longer tip over. Otherwise, it does what it is supposed to
The product was delivered defective, so it is difficult for me to evaluate it correctly. The 90-second timer did not work. The unit never stopped heating up.

This 6-in-1 bottle warmer is a practical and versatile device for parents. It offers intelligent temperature control, allowing breast or infant milk to be warmed or thawed to the ideal temperature. Its LCD display makes it easy to set up, and its timer function ensures precise warm-up. In addition, it has an automatic shut-off feature for added safety and comfort. BPA-free, it's designed to be safe and healthy for your baby. This bottle warmer is a must-have and very practical.

Personally, the product was primarily used by me to transport and heat coffee, and it can do that more than well!

While coffee keeps quite warm in the thermos, you have a guaranteed warm drink at hand at the touch of a button, so far I am convinced of both the quality of this hot water bottle and the fast, adjustable heating and battery life. The fast charging is also a great extra, comparable products usually need several times the time!

We bought this bottle warmer almost two years ago and if we had to do it again, we would buy another reference. The heating is very average and rather random even if we take the maximum mode. It would have been nice if the product had sounded when the heating is over. The product still works and we can use it, but we finally heat it at least twice to obtain the desired heating (i.e. far from being hot but at least lukewarm). On the other hand, it takes up little space.
This bottle warmer is very pretty with a great design with its digital screen. It heats up quickly, very easy to use. Very convenient to carry. Good value for money

Product purchased for occasional use when breast milk has been previously expressed and refrigerated. Bottle warmer incompatible with Mams bottles. It is very very long for breast milk mode, sometimes more than 25 minutes to have barely lukewarm milk which is not ideal with a newborn who screams because he is hungry... The device received was certainly defective: it turns off by itself during heating, sometimes the bottles come out barely warm, sometimes hot for the same setting. We sent him back.

This bottle warmer has advantages:- quick temperature rise, practical when baby is very very hungry- it is compact, easy to fit in the kitchen and to take away- a reliable brand that has secured its product well (for everything childcare, we don't skimp on baby's safety, in my opinion you have to invest in brands)... And disadvantages:- its price a little high- the impossibility of heating large capacity bottles in 2 minutes, which is logical, it takes a little more time.

I bought this product because it said it was compatible with bottles from other major brands. After 1 month during which the bottles came out cold, I contacted Philips customer service who told me that despite what was written, only some brands were compatible (I have standard plastic MAMs, one of the leading brands on the market...). So I had to buy a new set of bottles! False advertising!!
The bottle warmer does not heat up try several times but does not heat bottles or small jars offered to a person who unfortunately can no longer return the item

I confirm the words of other users: the bottle warmer does not heat the milk (which comes out of the fridge). The water in the tank is very hot, the bottle itself is hot, but the milk inside the bottle remains coldAfterwards, if you leave the bottle much longer, then yes after a while the milk becomes lukewarm. Except that a hungry baby can't wait 15/20 minutes for it to be ready... In short, unusable, we refer to AmazonPS: we use Avent bottles so no compatibility worries

I was looking for a bottle warmer in which you can easily heat breast milk on the go. And I definitely found that in this product!! Highly recommended! Due to the eyelets, the warmer fits in any diaper backpack. The battery lasts a really long time and the most important thing, the milk is warm within a very short time! Best invention for moms who pump out mid-milk and feed from the bottle!

After sending back my first bottle warmer following a manufacturing defect, the Reveal Baby brand contacted me and allowed me to receive a new product with this a led night light as a gift just sublime, I thank the Reveal Baby team who are very responsive & that the satisfaction of their customers is their priorityThank you again to the team

I bought the bottle warmer, arrived early and seemed to work, it warms in a few minutes 3/4 easy and practical. Unfortunately after a few days it no longer worked, the temperature jumped from 25 degrees to 35 then 28 and then it reached 40 degrees in 30 sec and the milk was cold ... he practically got high... I make the return and have the same new item sent back, unfortunately as soon as it arrived it had the same defect so I asked for a refund directly to buy another one of another brand ... Too bad

After several weeks of use, very easy to handle, the keep warm function is great, but if the water put in to heat is lukewarm the temperature of the bib will hardly change. So in summary, if the water inside the bib is fresh and not the one in the bib warmer, then the bottle won't have time to get up to temperature... I like the fact that there is no need to measure the water to put in the device and you can reuse the water present, it's great especially in the middle of the night

Good quality, super easy to use product. However, what disappoints me is really the heating time of the bottle which is long I think! And when you make large bottles the heat is not always great 👎Also don't forget to bottle with the cap otherwise it doesn't 😓heat up Usually I use the espresso bib, but for the holidays I wanted to buy a bottle warmer that takes up less space, frankly I regret a little 😣
I tested in order to put the bottle at 37 to avoid my son's colic. I saw an improvement. Discreet product, sober design to leave it in the kitchen.

Hello,I find this multifunction bottle warmer very intuitive and easy to use. It has 5 automatic programs: Water bath, potty, sterilization, defrost, fast mode with 2 heating modes for bottles. It heats the milk bottle evenly (without hot spots), has overheating protections, and a steam bell for faster and more economical heating; Its touch screen is very easy to use. It is easy to carry. Thanks for reading!

We bought the bottle warmer so that we don't have to heat the kettle to 40° all the time. The device keeps the temperature constant at 37°. Two bottles fit in it, which is really practical. I don't think it's so good for sterilizing, because you can only sterilize two bottles at the same time, or there is not so much room for sterilizing. It is not so suitable for on the go unless you go on vacation, but of course it is practical again.

The great thing about it is it is small and mega handy, very easy to use. Charge and go..... Yes, then the first disappointment at setting 37 degrees, hand test oh pretty cool, restart again and measure temperature .... well unfortunately only 34.1 degrees which is clearly too cold ... ok nu you want to know, on setting 40 degrees it is a little different. So it heats up there to a whopping 41.2 degrees, much too hot! It's also a pity that the company's support only appears with the note "Page not found......

It is an ideal bottle warmer so you don't have to get up at night.
You can leave it next to the bed, have it plugged in and when the child wakes up, have it ready to drink.
You have to put a little water on it and press the button, it just reaches the ideal temperature.
It can also be used for defrosting or even steaming, but I think there are better products for these uses.
I like the product, in fact I have given several to acquaintances with newborns and they all like the product.

The sterilizer does what it is supposed to. There is a star deduction for the fact that it is advertised that it is not explicitly pointed out to pay attention to the dimensions. We have 2 minrow blades. It doesn't fit in one at all, in the other jur very tightly. The tellet can then no longer rotate. If you want to take out the sterilizer, you have to use quite a bit of force. We don't have any unusual microwaves and in the end we were lucky that it just works with one. Alsinbe sure to measure beforehand

I chose the steam sterilizer because it was cheaper than the electrically powered one. Now that the first vacation is coming up, I regret it a bit. The sterilization of Avent and Medela bottles (incl. pump utensils) as well as pacifiers works uncomplicated and flawlessly once you understand the description. The instructions are confused in my opinion, but if you find your way around, then the sterilizer is very good. It's a pity that it doesn't dry the bottles at the end.
Easy to use after a while. because the water level is more or less based on feeling (too much water -> too hot...) and the explanations are quite succinct...

Happy with my purchase. I only gave it 4 stars because I find it expensive, but fulfills these functions perfectly, both at home and in the car (longer, but that's normal). I bought a bottle warmer, for when you travel more than 12 hours in the car, I recommend it for moms who give hot bibs during travel. Me personally, contrary to comments I've read, there is no boiling water splash if you put the water on recommend...

I bought this bottle warmer for on the go to have the perfect temperature for bottle feeding. With a full battery, heating is super fast, with a low battery it takes a little longer but still works perfectly. The design is really nice, the workmanship is also top. Since I only heat water and only then put the powder in the bottle, I have no problems with cleaning.I am currently completely satisfied, have now been using the device for about 2 weeks.

I have now tested this bottle warmer for a few days. It is much too expensive for what it does and I had expected more. Actually, it does not warm up bottles, but only keeps them warm. I don't know if it hits the right temperature. Usually feels too cold for me. The sterilization program is okay - but with 15 minutes (minimum) it is much too long. Warming up and defrosting does not work with this part. For just under 40 € much too expensive and goes back.

The Momcozy bottle warmer is super practical for on the go - 100 ml of water is warm in 3 minutes, and milk is also reliably brought to 37 °C. The capacity is large enough for several bottles and the battery power is enough for a whole day. A real game changer, especially on the go, because you don't need a power outlet.

But: You have to pay close attention to the included charger – other chargers don't work, otherwise there is a risk of damage. That makes him a bit inflexible.

This bottle warmer does not work. The amounts of water have nothing to do with what is recommended. It must be turned on at least 3 times for the water to be lukewarm. The water splashes boiling. If you want to take it out of the bib warmer you burn yourself. The water that runs outside is boiling if his grave on baby ouch.
