And in the car after a quarter of an hour I gave up to have a bib that wasn't hot. For the price of the product to avoid.....

This device is not recommended. Easy to use, you can then press the button when the button no longer shines it's close. However, it does not heat up well. Every other time the bottle comes out cold from the bottle warmer, you have to put the bottle back on to heat a second time. In addition, when the water starts to boil and the machine has finished heating the bottle, it is impossible to take the bottle without burning your fingers. In short, thirst the bottle is cold, except you burn your fingers

We have been using the bottle warmer for about 4 weeks. After it worked great at first, it is now going completely crazy. We used it to heat a bottle every few days (warm milk mode) and about every 2 days the sterilization mode to disinfect pacifiers and bottles. So far I was very satisfied. Now all of a sudden the device no longer switches off by itself. In sterilization mode is always set to 15 minutes, it should then turn off by itself. The last few times this switch-off function no longer worked, the part continued to run for over an hour (the water boils audibly in the device even though the display has already switched off). This has happened every time since then. The warm milk mode also no longer works. Here the device is set to 40 degrees, but the device heats up to 100 degrees, the water boils (see photo and video). So it is absolutely unusable. This is very dangerous!! I strongly advise against buying! No longer usable for us, and only after about a month!

This bottle warmer is a must-have for busy parents! In just a few minutes, it heats up baby food with ease. It's intuitive and easy to use, making it convenient for parents on the go. No more worries about too hot or too cold temperature, this device guarantees optimal reheating of baby's meals. An essential accessory to simplify mealtimes and take care of your little one with peace of mind.

The bottle warmer is really a great relief on the go. It doesn't weigh very much and is easy and intuitive to use. The number of degrees also corresponds to the desired temperature when measuring and keeping warm also works great. Cleaning is child's play.A star deduction, because I would have liked a continuous current solution here - especially for the night to keep the temperature constant and because the heat function does not work when charging. Otherwise recommended!

I didn't dare to use it for my baby, and will return it. The device does not stabilize (and therefore does not control) the temperature: the milk therefore continues to rise in temperature if the bottle is not removed instantly when the bell rings.
In addition, the water vapor makes the walls of the bottle very hot.
Finally, the device does not seem to turn off: it remains in standby mode at least, and the bottom plate remains hot, unless you unplug it.
In short, not safe enough for my taste.

I've been using it for 4 months to sterilize my daughter's bottles, it's very practical, very fast, and very easy to use. I put one star less because I can see that the plate that heats up is boiled the water works only on the right side and not on the whole plate, but this does not prevent it from working properly. I am satisfied with this purchase.6 bottles + 6 teats with rings + 3 suckles + 3 spoons fit perfectly 😊👌
Practical bottle warmer, I had a problem with the graduation and the charger and the seller was super responsive and professional, I recommend thank you again

This PHILIPS Avent293/00 sterilizer is the ultimate. Fully autonomous and super easy to use, it can sterilize and dry up to 6 bottles simultaneously. The sterilization cycle is reduced to only 10 minutes, add 30 minutes for drying. If you leave the bottles inside you keep the effects of sterilization for 24 hours. The noise level is acceptable, the size quite large. It has 3 intuitive operating modes.
Is very practical, easy to use, especially if you want to go fast. Unfortunately, the case will also be quite warm, so be quick to get it out. ;)

Brief instructions for use. No measuring spoon provided, no table, manage to find the right amount of water to add to warm a bottle to the right temperature according to its size and material (glass or plastic). The "on/off" button is only used to start the heating cycle. Not to interrupt it. On the cigarette lighter it hardly heats up. Another object that will end up in the garage or that may go to the next garage sale for a ridiculous price...

For a 180 ml bottle, the Heating time is quite fast, we take about 8 min for it to reach an ideal temperature.3 Heating mode 37°c/40°c/45°c.The device adapts to two types of bottle, thanks to two adapters, one for tommee tippee and another for MAM (for good use,  Keep both silicone gaskets well to prevent water leakage. )Very practical no need to ask the question: "where to heat the bottle?" I recommend +++

For a 180 ml bottle, the Heating time is quite fast, we take about 8 min for it to reach an ideal temperature.3 Heating mode 37°c/40°c/45°c.The device adapts to two types of bottle, thanks to two adapters, one for tommee tippee and another for MAM (for good use,  Keep both silicone gaskets well to prevent water leakage. )Very practical no need to ask the question: "where to heat the bottle?" I recommend +++

✔️ On the mains, it's a very ordinary bottle warmer, nothing negative to report though! ✔️ On the other hand, for me, it makes sense when going by car, because it is possible to connect it to the cigarette lighter and that's essential! ✔️And in addition, it heats up quickly, even on the 12V,  The warm-up times are still very good, especially with the use of the adapter! ❌ The only small downside, on my side, is the absence of a switch...

I'm delighted with this purchase! At the beginning, you have to test a little (with basic milk) the amount of water to put in order for it to heat up but after 2-3 tests you take the hand and it rolls. I bought the glass bottle from the same brand that I use to heat breast milk before putting it in a plastic Mam bottle, and frankly great! So we make a bottle in 1min and baby doesn't wait long ;-)

Very good bottle warmer. It is compact so it is very practical when traveling. It keeps the liquid warm for several hours. The value for money is excellent and in addition you can repair it if one day a part breaks. I'm delighted

I ordered this bottle warmer for my wife because we are traveling with a toddler and needed a practical solution for heating baby food. The bottle warmer is portable, cordless and equipped with a large battery.

The bottle warmer is very light and compact, which makes it ideal for traveling. It quickly heats the bottles to the desired temperature. The two heating modes are very convenient for switching between breast milk and water. The battery lasts all day and can be recharged quickly.

Conclusion: A very practical and well-thought-out product that makes everyday life with a baby much easier.

For our second premature baby we bought a new bottle warmer. The old one was a very simple one without a display and only with a rotary control. You always had to estimate. Now it's so easy and works wonderfully. So far a little over a month in continuous use and completely satisfied with the product. I had previously informed myself about other warmers and got stuck here due to the few but good reviews and have not regretted it so far.

Does what it is supposed to. Maintain the temperature And that makes the device solid. The programs are simple and understandable. For us, it was important to be able to keep two bottles warm and sterilize them for our twins. Since keeping warm and sterilizing cannot be done in parallel, sterilization for an extra device is recommended for handling. Or, as we do, drinking bottles that are even sterilized in the microwave, e.g. from MUM. Clear purchase recommendation.

For me, the reason for buying was the functions, the many positive reviews and the price-performance ratio. I didn't care that you can keep two bottles warm at the same time. But that's exactly what saved some moments. When our little one didn't have a regular rhythm or the amount increased over time and we had only prepared the usual amount. The three of us were very happy that in these moments the next bottle was already ready to be prepared.

Bottle warmer with timer and temperature display. Auto shut-off function with beeping sound. Allow between 5 and 7 min for a 240ml bottle with fresh water (fridge temperature), but with room temperature water in 3-4 min the bottle is hot.8 heating modes with keep warm, defrost, boil and steam, fast heating, temperature adjustment, food heating, memory function. 200W power. 👉 Complete and fast bottle warmer.

After more than three months of use and several models of other brands used, I can say that it is the best bottle warmer in terms of value for money. It is quick in the function of heating up in the minutes indicated. And, for me most importantly, it's effective at keeping the water warm overnight so it's ready the moment the baby wakes up to eat. It makes hardly any noise and does not splash anything around. Without a doubt, it is The Bottle Warmer.

Disappointed with this bottle warmer which is supposed to make it easier. After 5 months of use, it takes more than 3min to heat the bottle and the heating is totally random: one blow, the milk comes out cold and you have to do a 2nd pass; One blow it comes out hot and you have to run cold water on the bottle to hope to give it away. Having a rather impatient baby, between the time when we notice her hunger and the moment when she finally has her bottle, we have a good 5 minutes of screaming

I'm generally happy with the product because it heats up quickly, looks good, seems to be of good quality and the battery holds up well but the display is a little blurry (be careful you have to be wide awake at night to decipher the display). Downside: my graduations are distorted. They don't correspond to reality so I always have to measure with something else. I can't trust the bottle warmer...

Very good product. This bottle warmer works perfectly. It heats automatically according to the amount of water poured into the tank so that the bottle is always at the right temperature for baby. However, I only give 4 stars because using thickened milk, the water is not hot enough for the powder to mix well, so lumps form and baby has trouble sucking. If my comment helped you make your choice, feel free to click on "helpful".
Perfect use. Nice designBe careful if you use glass bottles it may be hot when you get out (but the contents are at the right temperature)

The Philips Avent electric bottle warmer is a practical and reliable piece of equipment for parents. Its simple design allows breast milk or baby formula to be heated quickly and safely, without the risk of overheating. Plus, its compact size makes it easy to use at home or on the go. In summary, the Philips Avent electric bottle warmer is an ideal choice for parents who are concerned about their baby's convenience and safety.

Great product, we have been using it every day for 8 months. It has become an essential part of our daily lives, as well as our stays and walks. In addition, it has a capacity of 300ml which will allow us to use it for a long time to come. In addition, we had recourse to the after-sales service, concerning the glass container that broke. They were more than responsive, we had a response within 12 hours, we received the new container within 3 days. We recommend it 100%.
We are very satisfied with this bottle warmer that we bring everywhere with us. The customer service is top-notch, we recommend it with our eyes closed.

So it is well thought out because the bottom of the tank is wide for MAM type bottles, it is very easy to clean with a sponge. It heats up relatively quickly and you find a base to wedge the small pots! You have to be careful when it comes to a boil that it is far from any danger. There is an operating light but be careful it doesn't beep when it's finished, which is a real shame. An effective product that for the price is worth it!

This bottle warmer will follow baby from the bottle to the baby food. Easy to use, it is reliable if you take into account the three minutes indicated. It will often take a little more though. Easy cleaning, light and not bulky, I think it will also be useful for the future little brother or sister. It heats, it thaws, it keeps warm, you can't ask for much more. From a recognized brand, it is good value for money.

The device is just 2 weeks old and just goes off despite 100% charging! And since yesterday, the device suddenly needs half an hour until the water is warm. You try to reach the support but a wrong page was deposited. You can't even send the thing back, let alone request the replacement. Even on Instagram, the page cannot be reached! So hands off! Better to invest money in other warmer bottles!
The best for a bottle child!! Easy to use and saves so much time in the kitchen🙏🏼

Very good bottle warmer and sterilizer. You just have to find the right setting at the timer, in my case I heat the breast milk that comes out of the fridge and it takes 6 minutes. I have seen very negative comments but if you follow the instructions for use, namely to put the right amount of water recommended, there is no risk that your milk will come out boiling from the bottle warmer. I am not a tester but a happy and satisfied user.

Hello, I needed to heat oil for my professional activity. I couldn't find anything good so I chose this camera. Good thing I did: it heats up quickly, doesn't consume too much, turns off when the temperature is reached. The cable is thick and very strong. It is easy to clean I recommend. Edit: I ordered a second one which as soon as I put a little liquid at the bottom blows the leads. Unusable. I had to throw it away. I don't recommend it anymore.

I bought this bottle warmer and I'm very happy with it, it heats up quickly and heats up very well in all three positions. Although I didn't buy it for the bottles but for my relaxation practice as a massage oil warmer, and I can say that the three temperatures are very well distributed in degrees. Notice to those who do massages and are looking for a good product that is cheap and "for the moment" seems reliable. to be seen over the course of use.

I didn't even try the product because the packaging was clearly already opened and ruined. On the body of the bottle warmer there are signs of previous use. Since these are tools to be used with my son, I prefer to buy a new product. Otherwise, the products used have a lower cost. Not having tried it I can't review the features. Too bad.

A good bottle warmer. Quick to understand, quite compact can be used individually (e.g. as an egg cooker). Unfortunately, the values and functions for heating from the operating instructions do not fit us. We use the first function to keep warm and set 48 degrees individually. After decanting, adding milk powder and shaking, 42 degrees of drinking temperature remain. Our child loves it that way and the higher temperature does not cool down so quickly, of course

Attention! The included charger is only suitable for this bottle. It is not a universal USB-C charger and will harm other devices!
That's why 2 stars deduction, something like that should be banned.

I think the bottle warmer itself is very good. I particularly like the function of heating at the same time with the charger connected, as it allows you to keep water for the milk constantly at the right temperature without the battery running out.

Simple and practical bottle warmer that takes 3.5 minutes to heat a bottle (sometimes a little long when baby is screaming with hunger! - hence 4 stars). On the other hand, it is practical because the adapter ring also allows you to heat small jars, and allows you to heat any type of bottle (shape or material). The same goes for the insulation grid. The bottle warmer automatically shuts off when the bottle or jar is ready. Very easy to use and maintain.

This mobile bottle warmer is really very easy to use, the battery lasts a really long time and the big advantage is that it is cordless and therefore mobile and therefore perfect for on the go and is actually always used at home. Finally you can leave the apartment or house without having to worry about when the baby is hungry and how to heat the milk or water to prepare milk powder.

Super practical for on the go or at home. My husband uses it mainly to heat breast milk while I work or am on the go. Look and workmanship are top. Easy to use and easy to clean. Attention ⚠️ signal tone when heated is very quiet.

One star deduction for very long warm-up time (5 minutes with a hungry baby can be very stressful) and high purchase costs.

Nevertheless, absolute purchase recommendation.

Never worked, the bottle warmer burns bottles (plastic or glass) and does not heat the milk at all. I tried everything, followed all the recommendations, listened to all the advice, nothing to do. Either the product is defective, or I'm doing it really wrong but I don't think so. Even after 5 minutes of heating to 37 degrees, the milk is still cold, but it is impossible to hold the bottle with your bare hands because it is so hot!

I bought this product urgently because I needed to heat the bottles as soon as possible. When the package arrives, I open the box, I read the instructions, I turn on it and there surprise, it's cold. I want to do it again, but I can't get it to work again. I start again a little later, it works but always comes out cold, yet the bottom of the bottle is warm, it's that it heats up a little. So either my product is defective, or it's a nice scam!

The temperature displayed was never correct (according to my kitchen thermometer, which doesn't lie); the container is not waterproof, so you cannot move around with liquid already in it; and after a few months of very little use, it broke suddenly, no longer accepting to charge. So I threw it in the trash before returning from our last vacation. Avoid my mistake, and don't waste your money on this junk.

I wanted to make up my own mind, I shouldn't have. Completely ineffective for the breast milk that comes out of the fridge, yet I put water from the fridge so at the MM temperature than the milk, it was a failure the water is hot but the milk is cold, maybe with powdered milk at room temperature it works but for fresh breast milk Zero zero zero,  I send back

In principle, a great product, easy to use - fill in water, place the bottle in the recesses provided, put the lid on it and put it in the milrowelle. For taking it out, there are also small tongs so as not to burn your fingers. However, the sterilizer is relatively large, which is why it is not suitable for every microwave - so be sure to compare the dimensions of the sterilizer and the microwave before buying!

Mixed opinion:The +: nice shapes, supplied with the holder for small pots, meurette stored on the back with a practical measuring table, turns off by itself. Les-: not easy to clean, by dint of putting water there is limescale and at the end of the heating time it smells burned, while little used, the quantities of water are not reliable the liquid remains cold so you always have to count about 2 ml more to have a correct temperature

🍼 I find this bottle warmer more compact than average. It can be easily stored in my changing bag, so I can heat my bottles no matter where 👌 I am. 🌡️In terms of functionality, we find the classics with the temperature selection, a timer but also the keeping warm for up to 24 hours! 😉 💰The price-performance ratio is average. It's an essential piece of equipment for me, especially when you move around often 😅.
To heat baby's bottle in the middle of the night, this bottle warmer is simple to use and made of durable plastic. However, the way the light works is a bit confusing: for me it's not a big problem.

I bought the bottle warmer to keep the baby bottle warm. I set the temperature to 40 degrees so that the water in the bottle is ready to drink (worked quite well). I always put the powder of the milk formula in when my baby got in touch, before there was only boiled water in the bottle. I have not tried the finished milk formula in the bottle and then in the warmer. The warm-up function with the porridge has not yet been used either. The function with the sterilization also worked great, went easily and quickly, in 10 minutes the bottle was boiled out without any problems. The instruction manual is understandable so far, despite small grammatical errors and in between just French came up in the German manual (I was very amused). All in all, a great part so far, so 4 stars because I haven't tested all the functions yet. But the 2 functions were my priority and the device fulfilled that completely 👍🏻
Good quality and effective product. Very useful when traveling. Customer service available when needed. I recommend.

It is quick, comfortable and easy to clean. To put some drawbacks would be that it is necessary to use distilled water and it would be more comfortable than the current. As a sterilizer it also works perfectly.  Purchase recommended!

This bottle warmer has served well for 1 1/2 years. Unfortunately, I discovered a crack inside a few days ago and can no longer use it now. Too bad, we would have liked to continue using it. The bottle warmer never fell down or was otherwise damaged by us. How long the crack had been in it, I can no longer determine in retrospect. But we can no longer use it like this. What a pity!

I have tried several brands of bottles, most of them fit in and the water in the bottle heats up quite quickly, however if you add the milk before heating it then it takes longer. I have to clean the bottom of the bottle warmer regularly with white vinegar because of the very hard water but it's not the fault of the bottle warmer. This product is good, I don't put 5 stars for the size of the cord which is way too short

This bottle sterilizer is just fantastic!! Before, we had to struggle with the microwave and the bottle displays... It's over, we finally got our microwave back and the space taken up by the bottle dryer is now used by this sterilizer! So we have gained space and functionality in the kitchen. This sterilizer is simple, fast, reliable and above all super secure! In short, it's perfect and we're very happy! The icing on the cake is that it is very easy to clean! Frankly, to try it is to adopt it... It's quite simple, the other young parents who come to the house have all taken the reference when they saw it working! :-)

This bottle warmer makes a good impression right off the bat. It is compact, light and easy to handle. I appreciate the fact that it warms up quickly and keeps the milk warm if needed. It is better to check the temperature beforehand (depending on the quantities). In any case, the promises are kept and the device is rather easy to clean. To see the compatibility with all types of bottles (I only had Advent bottles on hand).

We absolutely love this portable bottle warmer. He made it much easier for us to travel with our baby. The fast heating function is particularly practical: within a few minutes, the milk or water is at the desired temperature. The 12000mAh battery lasts a really long time and saves us from constant charging. It also works reliably on longer excursions or car journeys. The two heating modes for breast milk and water are very well thought out. This allows us to choose the optimal temperature according to our needs. The operation is easy and versatile. The bottle warmer fits perfectly in our backpack and takes up hardly any space. With a capacity of 340 ml, it is also suitable for larger meals. We were particularly impressed by the possibility of using it on the plane. It is really quiet, so our baby will not be disturbed while warming up. Everything feels stable and durable. For parents who travel a lot, this bottle warmer is a real game changer. We would buy him again at any time.

Does its job very well. We didn't take the cigarette lighter option, but so far we managed without finding 230V outlets when we traveled. On the other hand, one time out of 10, the heating stops while there is still water at the bottom, and the bib is not hot. You then have to restart it manually and no more worries. Rather bring more water than the pod to have hot bottles or jars, but nothing too annoying.

Momcozy convinces once again and delivers as usual.

Fast heating: The bottle warmer reaches a ready-to-drink temperature in about 3 minutes. This is significantly faster than many conventional models, especially in mobile use.

Two heating modes: There are separate settings for breast milk (gentle heating to preserve nutrients) and water/formula milk (higher temperature possible). This is practical and prevents accidental overheating.

High capacity (500ml): Larger bottles can fit in easily, making it suitable for older babies as well.

Portable & wireless: Thanks to the integrated battery, the warmer can be used up to 24 times before it needs to be recharged. Ideal for traveling, traveling, or nighttime feedings without the need for a power outlet all the time.

Robust workmanship: The stainless steel inner container looks high-quality, is easy to clean and tasteless.

Safe operation: Automatic switch-off and overheating protection ensure safe handling.

Cons

Slightly heavier than pure USB warmers: Due to the battery and the 500 ml tank, the device weighs more than simple models, for long trips this must be taken into account.

The price level is slightly higher than that of other portable bottle warmers without a battery,
which classifies the product in the upper price segment.

The portable bottle warmer from Momcozy is primarily intended for parents who travel a lot and do not want to do without warm milk or water. The device has a high-quality finish and can be used flexibly thanks to wireless operation. It is particularly practical that it can heat not only breast milk but also water, which expands the range of use.
Handling is simple: connect the bottle, select the appropriate mode and warm milk or water is ready within a short time. This is an enormous relief, especially on the road, as you don't need a power outlet. Thanks to the included adapters, the bottle warmer is also compatible with many common bottles, which makes everyday life much more relaxed.
What convinces is the speed and the high battery power, which enables many applications with just one charge. This makes it suitable for longer trips. It is also positive that the manufacturer pays attention to safety and has integrated protective mechanisms against overheating.
However, it should be noted that temperature control is not always accurate to the millimetre. Some users report that the milk can quickly become too hot if you let the device run for too long. Therefore, it is advisable to check the temperature before feeding. The weight and size are also slightly higher than simple solutions such as a thermos, which could be a disadvantage for some parents.
Conclusion:
The Momcozy bottle warmer is a well-thought-out aid for mobile everyday life with baby. If you are on the road a lot and value comfort, you will find a reliable companion here. It is not the cheapest solution, but it offers flexibility, speed and ease of use. With a little attention to temperature control, it is a practical companion for any parent-child bag.

I was looking for a rechargeable hot water bottle for my daughter who had her baby a few weeks ago. Since I have already had good experiences with the company Comfyer, I decided on this hot water bottle. It arrived quickly and well packaged and makes a good and high-quality impression. Fits well in the hand and is not too heavy. Since I want to give them away, I only tested them with water. It fits about 350 to 400ml of liquid. You can change the temperature at the touch of a button. From 37 degrees to 55 degrees in 5 levels. Depending on the temperature, the battery lasts at least 4 to 5 warm-ups (at 55 degrees). At a lower temperature, also several warm-ups. Charging the hot water bottle takes about 3 to 4 hours. Charging is done via the included USB-C charging cable. The lid makes a robust impression. The clip closure prevents unintentional opening. The design is very successful with the choice of Fsrb. The hot water bottle convinced me and I came to give it away with a clear conscience and also recommend it to others.

I have just tested this bottle warmer, it is easy to use, the operating indications are clear, the small container to dose the water is practical but the graduation should be clearer with the number of ml rather than the number you have to look in the instructions to look for the right dosage of water.
A strong smell of burning was present during use!
To be seen with time
By that it does the job well!

I gave the Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer to a friend for the birth of her daughter, and she is so grateful for it! She has told me several times how practical and helpful this device is in everyday life with her baby. Especially on the go, it makes feeding much easier, as she no longer has to rely on a power outlet.

The bottle warmer scores with a fast heating function and a long battery life, so it is ready for use all day long. The two heating modes are perfectly matched to breast milk and water, so the milk is gently heated without losing important nutrients. The large 500 ml capacity is another advantage, as it offers enough space for several bottle fillings.

My friend especially loves that the warmer is compact and lightweight, so it can be easily carried in the diaper bag. The ease of use also makes it the ideal companion for overtired parents.

Conclusion: A well thought-out, efficient and easy-to-use bottle warmer that makes life much easier for new parents. It is ideal for on the go, heats up quickly and reliably and lasts a long time. A perfect gift for anyone who travels a lot with a baby - absolute recommendation!

I have to say very clearly: As parents of a newborn, we were of course happy about every little relief! From a neutral point of view, however, the Momcozy KleanPal Pro Baby Bottle Washer has many large and small disadvantages. Even if the real dishwasher is not full (who always manages to do the dishes with a small child?) you have fresh and neatly cleaned bottles every day.At the same time, you have to run the machine often, because not much fits in here. Four bottles and some odds and ends, or a set of breast pumps, and the machine is already full. Amazing, because the machine takes up a lot of space for this. You have to have it, and not just anywhere: although the rinse water comes from a water tank, for waste water it needs a drain nearby; even if the tank is portable, the machine must be placed near the sink and socket. In the end, the machine was in our guest bathroom, because nowhere else were there all connections plus a door, so that no curious toddler pulls on the cable or hose. Of the programs, we ended up using only cleaning and one-time sterilization; this splashes loudly, but reliably cleans the bottles. But why you need a 72-hour continuous sterilization for storage, for example, is not clear to me with the best will in the world.

This product looked interesting on paper. 3 in 1: allowing the sterilization, drying and storage of bottles. I took the product for the last 2 modes because the usefulness of sterilizing bottles is not proven... Suitable for my advent bottles, it can be used for almost all brands of bottles and all sizes. You can sterilize up to 6 bottles in the central part and some accessories in the upper basket. You pour 130cc of purified/demineralized water into the tank contained in the base of the device. This tank is easy to access and therefore easy to descale if needed. There are 3 modes: sterilization (10min), drying (30min) or automatic which combines the 2 in a row. I find this sterilizer unconvincing:- it is bulky.- the drying mode is particularly noisy with a blower noise equivalent to the noise of a "silent" vacuum cleaner- 30min to dry is still quite long... When I put my bottles on my advent bottle dryer, in 30min they are almost dry...- the storage mode would have been interesting but from time to time, there can be a little water left in the bottom of the bottle, which creates condensation in all the bottles...- even after having carried out several cycles, after an automatic cycle the bottles smell hot, you are forced to wash them before filling them... What is the point of having sterilized them? In my opinion, expensive and useless purchase. While I love this brand as much for bottles, baby monitor, steamer...

Travelling or hanging out with a newborn is easier with the portable bottle warmer. you just have to remember to load it every 4-5 times you use it (depending on the amount of milk). I would have paid more attention to the closure with bottles (avent) milk comes out when you turn even if it has closed well. It does not happen with adapters and therefore with other brands of bottles.

The Philips brand with the Avents range offers quality products, I had the bottles, teats and now the sterilizer is a time saver for the overbooked parents. It takes up little space, put in a corner at the end of my worktop, I can even put bottles, teething rings etc. on it. It connects to the mains, works easily, you put water in the white basket, about a tea glass, then you put the compartment above where you put the bottles, then above the rack to put the teats, caps and pacifiers. And finally the 3rd compartment which also serves as a storage space, then you close the lid. The adjustment is simple with the single button. Effective, it eliminates up to 99% of bacteria, which is rather reassuring, especially in this time of pandemic, we want the best for our babies. The appliance is easy to clean, as each compartment is removable, I use a special bottle dishwashing liquid I also use it to clean it. Don't hesitate to clean it after use because there may be deposit in the lower part. The sterilization/drying cycle is done in 40 minutes so you can run it as many times as you want in a day or between 2 bottles.

This sterilizer is very easy to use, however, it will be necessary to adapt the heating time to the power of the microwave, this is essential to guarantee a real sterilization. Otherwise the handles do not heat up and this is a guarantee of safety when you want to take the container out of the microwave. The container is also quite large (280mm and 166mm high) and it will be necessary to make sure that the microwave can receive the sterilizer.

Gute Sterilisation, zuverlässiges Trocknen – braucht aber mehr Platz als erwartet

Wir nutzen den Sterilisator jetzt seit zwei bis drei Tagen und sind bisher sehr zufrieden. Die Sterilisation funktioniert zuverlässig – in nur ca. 6 bis 8 Minuten sind Fläschchen, Schnuller und andere Babyutensilien hygienisch gereinigt.

Auch das Trocknen klappt gut, es dauert zwar etwa 60 Minuten, aber die Teile sind danach wirklich komplett trocken – das ist uns wichtig.

Was man vor dem Kauf wissen sollte: Der Sterilisator ist größer, als wir aufgrund anderer Rezensionen erwartet hatten. Wer wenig Platz in der Küche hat, sollte das unbedingt einplanen.

Ein interessanter Punkt zur Wassermenge: Eine Füllung mit destilliertem Wasser reicht für etwa zwei Durchgänge. Wir persönlich wechseln das Wasser nach jedem Durchgang, um eine möglichst saubere Anwendung sicherzustellen.

Unterm Strich: Das Gerät tut, was es soll – gründlich und zuverlässig. Ein Stern Abzug für die Größe, aber ansonsten klare Empfehlung.

Vielen Dank für dieses durchdachte Produkt!

I had been looking for a mobile bottle warmer that quickly and precisely reaches the desired temperature and at the same time works without a lot of accessories and especially fiddling around. Honestly, your product keeps what it promises! Absolute game changer when you are outside with the baby.It is also worth mentioning that great customer service is provided. I was answered directly (on a Sunday!) and helped.

Using thickened milks for our baby who has GERD, this cordless water heater is super handy for the holidays. Allow a little time to heat the water (6/7 min for 180ml of water in a glass advent) but effective for the price. Very satisfied with this product. I also discover the brand which seems to be serious and of good quality. The package includes the USB wire but not the plug and the simple, effective and clear instructions.

Using thickened milks for our baby who has GERD, this cordless water heater is super handy for the holidays. Allow a little time to heat the water (6/7 min for 180ml of water in a glass advent) but effective for the price. Very satisfied with this product. I also discover the brand which seems to be serious and of good quality. The package includes the USB wire but not the plug and the simple, effective and clear instructions.

Very good quality price. Once you master the use, it's easy. Be careful, the heating power when plugged in in the car via the cigarette lighter is limited and therefore takes much longer to heat up (like any device plugged in in the car). However very fast when connected to 220V. I recommend this product for anyone who goes on a trip with baby, small, solid and efficient! Carrefour offers the same more expensive.

Well sometimes it's not really warm, need to put a warm-up lap, but most of the time it's ok. Only bottle warmer I have tested, compared to others it seems easier to use. I appreciate being able to defrost baby purees too with it (you have to anticipate it takes 10-15min, but otherwise I thaw in the fridge so I'm fine with it)

Very good product that works perfectly when used well. In particular, it is necessary to think about adjusting the water level of the water in the water bath according to the amount of milk prepared. I have not noticed any reliability problems after a year of use. I still remove a star because of the lack of an audible indicator. We learned to do without, but it would have helped us considerably in the first 6 months.

I'm loyal to the brand and that's why I decided to try it. Being able to have warm bottles anytime, anywhere is fine. The problem is the lack of compatibility with other bottles or even other jars. It takes a long time to heat up and it really doesn't get very hot. The battery lasts quite a while, with one charge I have heated 5 bottles of 120ml.

As said in the comments, the small negative point of this bottle warmer is without lack of sound signal when the bottle and jar is ready. Heating the jars also seems a bit long to me (5 min). Otherwise this bottle warmer satisfies me

We bought this product in July and are really happy with it. Really functional and very useful bottle warmer. It is lightweight and fits easily in the diaper bag or even in a pocket. It holds the bottle for up to 4 hours if it is not turned off. We use it on the go as well as at home. We always have "amazed" looks from our bottle warmer when we are in public places.

We bought this product in July and are really happy with it. Really functional and very useful bottle warmer. It is lightweight and fits easily in the diaper bag or even in a pocket. It holds the bottle for up to 4 hours if it is not turned off. We use it on the go as well as at home. We always have "amazed" looks from our bottle warmer when we are in public places.

Perfect bottle warmer for our twins. We use it mainly at night to control the temperature of the bottles.The device is easy to handle and the temperature control works perfectly. The programs can be adjusted manually (temperature differences due to different materials such as glass, plastic, etc.). The device is compact and can also be taken with you when traveling. Bottle warmer quite compact, base wide enough for large bottles like MAM. Heats up quickly and safely (unless the bottle is removed before the complete evaporation is complete). In any case, the recommended doses of water are a bit fanciful, we should always put more water than recommended so that it is at the right temperature.

Less than 3 weeks of use with MAM bottles. In terms of heat, it's very very light, we don't have the impression that it really heats up following the doses of water. By adding more water, the result remains mixed. The bottle warmer smells hot after each use despite cleaning white vinegar and water every 10 days. Very disappointed with my purchase, I didn't keep the box unfortunately otherwise I would send it back.

Easy to use, heats up quickly from an electrical outlet at home (1 min). Top temperature. Goes out on its own. For any size bottle or potty. Be careful, on the cigarette lighter socket, don't forget to put the cursor on "car". The time is longer to heat a bottle in the car (6 minutes). Be careful also, on cigarette lighter socket, heats it, does not turn off by itself, you have to remove the bottle because there is a risk of milk being too hot.

Useful but not so practical, you need the right dosage of water to get the right temperature of the bottle otherwise the bottle is either too hot or too coldWhat is not practical is to have to put the water in the very small dosing spout especially when baby is in a hurry, the graduation of the water according to the temperature should have been inside the bottle warmer which would have been more useful and practical for us Moms

My little one is now 2.5 months, that's how long this device has been with us. It is super practical, heats water at room temperature to 37-40 degrees in about 5-7 minutes. One little thing bothers us, you can't charge and heat at the same time, either, or. This has already become a disadvantage for usCharges but super fast, battery lasts a long time, fully charged 2 times I had 60% remaining battery. I would buy again.

On the first day, the device was working properly. After 3 weeks, the bottle warmer started to stop working in full use. When plugged into the power supply, it would turn on and off by itself for no reason. The user guide indicates a 365-day replacement warranty. Very good support responsiveness. Receipt of a new bottle warmer in less than a week.

This bottle warmer is really very practical for everyday use. I must say that this prevents us from getting up. In short, the heating is rather good overall and its use is rather simple with buttons that are quite ergonomic, and quite pleasant to touch, probably to avoid bad handling. This makes one of the best allies for our nights, of course, concerning its solidity, it is to have in time...

I bought this bottle warmer to heat my son's bottles so that he digests them better except that the bottle warmer does not heat up! The milk is still as cold as ever, even if you follow the instructions in the instructions, nothing helps! This purchase was useless to me, what a pity! Quite bulky, it takes up more space than a simple microwave sterilizer. It is nevertheless very efficient. It sterilizes very quickly, and efficiently. I like the fact that it is studied as a bottle tree to dry. He is two in one. You can decide to place the branches as you wish, which makes it adaptable and universal to any brand of bottle. Very efficient, I recommend.

Received the product as described. Not disappointed with my order. It fits perfectly into the criteria and adjusts the temperature according to the quantity, there is even an indication of how many milk pods to put in. 90 ml next to it it says 3, 150 ml 5 etc. Super top and easy to understand. If I had to give a negative point, it may be its size which is quite big and therefore difficult to transport.

Bottle warmer that I have been using for two weeks now, I am very satisfied with it. Very easy to use, you can set the temperature as desired. My 210ml bottle is ready in 2 minutes, I also use it for small jars. It keeps you warm for up to 20 minutes, which is very practical. Simple, fast and effective, that's all I ask for. I hope it will work for a long time. I recommend it

The Momcozy Bottle Warmer is a convenient on-the-go companion that heats breast milk and water quickly and reliably. With two heating modes, a large 500ml capacity, and a long battery life, it ensures hot meals for your baby all day long. Thanks to the cordless design and fast heat-up time, it's ideal for travel and everyday life – an absolute relief for parents!

Fairly small bottle warmer that fits well in a kitchen. On the other hand, you can only heat 120ml or 240ml bottles, frankly it's not practical! And even with these quantities the bottle doesn't come out hot enough on the first try, so you have to put it back on a little which makes the fast mode lose all its meaning! Really a shame, I hope that with time I will find it more practical!

I didn't use it in the car because apparently there is a risk of burning the cigarette lighter. At home, heat up quickly, but you need to take precautions to get it back at the end of the heating (risk of burning). I use it with the mam anti colic bottles. It's a product that I give as a birth gift to a young mother. She opened it in my presence and to our great amazement the cable to adapt it to the cigarette lighter is missing.... So I'm absolutely not happy with this product and I'd like to get this cable. Could you send it to me? I am waiting to hear from you. Thank you

Unfortunately, when it comes to children's products, we end up overpaying for things that would otherwise cost two lire. If at least they worked, I wouldn't complain. Immediate return. really difficult to find a valid product
I had bought the device for the night. I use it to keep the water for 2 bottles warm and only need to add the milk powder. It works perfectly and is a complete relief.

After comparing the reviews of the different portable bottle warmers on the market, we opted for the reveal baby. A very good investment, we use it on a daily basis, it has become essential to us! Fast heat-up time, in a few minutes, battery strong enough to last the day, relatively fast charging time too. Unfortunately, we broke the glass of the bottle warmer. We contacted the seller to find out if a sale of the glass alone was possible, and yes!! Responsive and very accommodating, we are impatiently waiting for the spare part. Thank you!

For the price as a bottle warmer top quality rather cheap, works supertemperature from 40 degrees.Water must be refilled more often about 2 /3 times if it runs 24 hours. Cleaning is also ok. Water marking for bottles or glass heating is the elongated elevation inside (I put the bottles in and fill up to just below the rim - should just not overflow)

The device does what it's supposed to. Really a relief and time saver. Sometimes I have the feeling that the water is getting hotter than 45 degrees... often switch back to 42. But it's great that the temperature is displayed and you can heat or sterilize two bottles at the same time. Apparently, you could also cook eggs in it, but I haven't figured out how yet. The part does not work at all as it should! Either the milk is too cold, too hot. The keep warm function does not work at all. I stuck to the previous recessions, but they don't apply to me at all. not great at all, termostat?? does not heat up enough even if you leave the bib for a long time. Article not recommended. too expensive for what it is supposed to do. To delete items on sale

Does not heat up. First of all, it's pure physics, there's no way for the water to mud, so to heat reasonably, you can't dream. Very good bottle warmer! Thinner than many other bottle warmers which is VERY appreciable in the diaper bag already filled with everything a baby needs! Our eldest child has always been against sterilizers because the lozenges of the time could provide a dose of external agents. Here no worries, sterilization is done by steam. The inside of the bottles and teats will be sterilized effectively and they will be ready to be refilled. Imposing but replaces 2 devices. We love the simplicity and security of the system.

Practical overall. Heat a 210ml bottle at about 3-4min. However, you have to pay attention to the amount of water poured into the bottle warmer because it determines the final temperature of the bottle. Too bad a small vial is not included. Compatible with all Avent bottles. Tip: leave the head of the bottle unscrewed on the bottle during heating. It sterilizes a little.

DEFINITELY DON'T BUY! For a 90 ml bottle, we are obliged to position the slider at the maximum, i.e. 330ml. After 3 attempts to heat to 330, the milk is still cold! More than 15 minutes to warm up a bottle, with barely lukewarm milk, or even cold! The bottle is hot, but the milk is always cold! We are disappointed with this product! Too bad we can't give 0 stars!

Hyper practical allows you to have the bottle at body temperature 37° however is only effective with the glass bottles avent because the plastic bottles avent anti colic hardly heat the water of the bottle, I have the 2 types of bottle and I see the difference compared to milk which dissolves better in the glass bottle because the water is more heated than in the plastic bottle...!

Very bad product, I used it for 3 months and it started to have problems, the plastic bell melted and the sterilizer is supposed to stop by itself, at first it stopped and here after 3 months it didn't want to stop and continued to heat even without water, lifetime warranty is useless because I couldn't have an exchange for defective product just the refund

Long bottle warmer! Very long to heat up!! Fortunately it's a mixed breastfeeding and I can make my baby wait but I feel sorry for the mom who uses it at night! Very easy to use and learn. Following the heating water volume guidelines, I got to 34 degrees. It's not a big deal because we end up adjusting the volume to our bottles. Note that during heating, the device consumes almost 700W!

I think the microwave sterilizer is great. Many bottles fit in and it is very practical because you can also sterilize pacifiers in it. But you have to keep in mind that the microwave must have a certain size, otherwise the sterilizer does not fit in and you have to be careful after sterilizing that you let it cool down otherwise it is quite hot! But I can only recommend it.

I already knew Nuliie for its breast pumps with a very good quality/price ratio. This bottle warmer follows the same logic and is really of good quality. The device is very practical and avoids boiling water in a saucepan to sterilize the bottles. On the other hand, I agree with other comments, limestone is really its enemy. The device has become indispensable for us on the first day and runs almost continuously in use. The bottle warmer is ideal for on the go. The fast heating function and the long battery life make it super practical, especially if you are on the go all day. The bottle warmer warms everything up super and quickly and thaws well when you have frozen breast milk. I use it all the time and warming up the bottles of breast milk is done quickly. Easy to use. It also serves as a sterilizer and also allows you to thaw and heat the puree. This bottle warmer holds up, that's a promise, the bottle is warm in 3 minutes and even if you leave it longer than 3 minutes it is just kept warm and does not become hot. "I am very disappointed with this Phillips bottle warmer. I bought this product to use it during our trip during the Christmas holidays 2022, I had to return it a few weeks ago because it never worked. It doesn't heat up to the specified temperature. I bought the bottle for heating the milk for my baby. If I set it to 37 degrees, you end up at 35.5 degrees. We have been using the device for 5 months and are completely satisfied. The only thing you shouldn't do! The finished milk would be. Always warm up the water, then there are no problems. I took him for my travels and did his job, quickly warmed him up well and charged him well baby and very happy

A large sterilizer for 6 bottles (allow space) that surprises with its ease of use and speed. I've been using it for almost 4 months and it's perfect. I hope he will hold on. Perfect customer service as the package got lost and they quickly shipped me another one. Quite disappointed with this bottle warmer:- The filling by the included doser is not practical, the graduations are difficult to read.- After heating the bottle, you have to wait 15 minutes to be able to use it again, not at all practical if the bottle is not hot enough for example.- The instructions lack clarity, information contradicts each other. This bottle warmer can hold bottles up to 7 cm in diameter (it fits up to 7.5 cm, but then there is no more room for water). It works only on the mains, and by boiling: you put a little water, according to a rule noted on the bottle warmer, a measuring spoon is provided to put the right amount of water. And we wait for the water to boil and evaporate. The bottle is then ready. There is an adapter ring for thinner bottles, so they stay upright, and a basket for heating small jars. I don't really like the principle of boiling: it makes the bottle rise to a high temperature, and even if there is no more BPA in the bottles, doesn't it risk causing other toxic molecules to pass from the plastic into the milk? (unless you use glass bottles of course). In addition, it requires more maintenance to remove limescale. That's why I take away 2 stars.

We have been using the device for 6 months now. Especially to heat the water for the bottles. We also had it with us on vacation to use it as a sterilizer. The instructions are reduced to the absolute minimum and leave a lot of room for interpretation. The construction with the sterilization frame is wobbly and is also not really explained. Why is milk heated to at least 40 degrees? How much water really needs to go in? How do you keep the bottles from tipping over? Sorry, the part goes right back and then there's something classic.

I've had the bottle warmer for a good two months now and I'm absolutely satisfied with it. I leave both bottles filled with water in the device. This sterilizer is a 3 in 1, it sterilizes and dries the bottles quite quickly! It allows you to sterilize 6 bottles and their accessories. sterilizer for large bottles that allows you to sterilize up to 6 bottles at once. The cycle lasts 40 minutes to sterilize AND dry the bottles after sterilization is effective 24 hours.
