I am more than thrilled with the warmer I use it to keep the water warm at night 😊 it keeps the water warm all night so that if my daughter is hungry at night I just have to fill the powder into the water fladche and then it starts, no more long waiting or mixing water together I would buy 🥰 it again at any time

INTRODUCTION
For 90€ we tested the momcozy bottle warmer for trips with our baby. The wireless function sounded promising for on the go.

PROS
- PRACTICAL FOR ON THE GO: Very flexible to use without cables and sockets. Ideal for car, walks or visits.
- RELIABLE FUNCTION: Heats bottles evenly in 3-5 minutes. The temperature maintenance works well.
- GOOD BATTERY LIFE: One charge is enough for several bottles, which is enough for day trips.

SMALL RESTRICTION
- UPPER LEAGUE IN TERMS OF PRICE: At 90€, the device is an investment that should be made consciously.

CONCLUSION
A well-thought-out product that delivers what it promises. Especially worth considering for active families.

RATING
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ (5 stars)
Works perfectly and makes everyday life on the go easier. The price is justified for the quality and functionality offered.

I would never buy it again. The microwave has to be open all the time to cool down, the light in my microwave doesn't go out when the door is open, so power consumption. In addition, the sterilizer just fits into my microwave. All in all, you get an electronic sterilizer, which in my opinion is better for less money

This device is a real game changer when it comes to bottle feeding! Within seconds, the liquid is reliably heated and can be used immediately. The adapter for the right bottle also fits perfectly. Small drawback: the battery is quickly empty, which is why you should have a charging option (e.g. power bank) with you on the go, so I deduct one star.

Portable bottle warmer very useful for outings and in our case at night, on the bedside table to avoid getting up. Good autonomy, fast heating and good capacity. Very appreciable keeping warm. Very pretty and robust. Very practical spout. Very good value for money. Very responsive and very friendly after-sales service. We recommend it without hesitation.

I use this nomadic fascinator warmer for my 2 month old son, who has trouble taking his milk at room temperature (colic). Since I received it, it has been running day and night. It has allowed me to go out with serenity and it takes up little space on the bedside table. It is a must for parents. It is very easy to use.

Impeccable and fast delivery as always with AmazonConsistent with the descriptionVery easy to useHeats up well and quickly! No risk of burnsGood cable lengthQuiet! By the risk of waking up babyPractical to be used at night, even by daddy hahahahaIn addition it is beautiful! I recommend 1000% because it makes my life so much easier!

Used to express bib warmers, this one confused me a little at first but finally I wouldn't want to change it anymore. I put the water in the bib to be heated, thoroughly, until 1 hour before when the button goes off (a few minutes) I put it in the "bottle" position and the device keeps it perfectly warm. So, when it's time the bib is ready!

I appreciated the automatic features of this model of bottle warmer:- automatic defrost and keep warm function (at the desired temperature) for 24 hours- "steam" function which allows you to disinfect the device by itselfThe front screen and the touch buttons for adjustment are easy to use. Finally, the device is compact.

I was satisfied with this product on the fact that you could sterilize several bottles in a short time until the day it let me down for no reason after a few months. I found that the button and switch on the back were not really practical, the drying was not very conclusive and that it still took up space. In the end very disappointed.

I thought it would take a long time to warm up and in 10.15min for the car it's ready. For the house in not even 5min. I only reheated purees for the inStant.  Super convenient. I'm delighted about that. I recommend. Look carefully each time you start it if it is on a car or a house because it may break if you start on the wrong button.

So temperature is ok if you set it to 40 degrees, the bottle is 42 degrees and that's ok. But what doesn't work at all is that the device switches itself off after 24 hours and that doesn't work at all when the little one is crying, just want to give a bottle and the device is off 😳, that only gives chaos. Buttons are cheaply made, would have expected more from Grundig.

At home, we have so far only used the device to keep bottles of boiled water warm. Take it out, open it, put the powder in and the milk meal is ready. Because you can use it as a sterilizer at the same time, we also took it with us on trips. That was super practical. I can recommend it without reservation.

Very easy to use. Simply select the volume of milk in the bottle, and the device does the rest. Once the right temperature has been reached, he signals it and then keeps the water bath stable for 1 hour. This allows the bottle to be left in there without the risk of overheating the milk. Really more reliable than other devices tested before this one.

We absolutely love this bottle warmer! I bought it because we travel a lot – in the car, on walks or even on flights – and it makes life with a baby much easier for us.

The device is of high quality, looks modern and is easy to use. I particularly liked:
 • Fast heating – the milk is ready to drink in a few minutes
 • Two heating modes – great for breast milk AND water without anything overheating
 • Strong battery – easily lasts for several applications (about 6-7 warm-ups per charge for us)
 • Leak-proof and compact – fits in any diaper bag

At first I was skeptical whether this would really work – but yes: No more stress when warming up milk!

Highly recommended for parents who travel a lot. A product that is really well thought out – I would buy it again in a heartbeat!

The water heater can be used on the road as well as at home or in the car. The integrated battery can also be used to heat milk for the baby at weddings or events. The temperature range is 37-55 degrees. The warmer comes with a matching charging cable. All in all, a very practical part.

It's worth the price. You heat the milk or water in 5 minutes to 45 or 50 °C. Just great. I had also bought cheaper devices, but it would take more than 45 minutes to warm up to 35 °C the bottle. This Produkt.Es fits me is nicely packaged and sent with care. Highly recommended.

I tested it on a day of outing, I was able to heat my water to a warm temperature quite quickly, 2 times during the day. And there was 82% battery left when we returned. Very good battery life!  Less stress, my ally of the next outings. To be seen in the long term! The only downside: a small difference in the graduation of the bars.

I bought the bottle warmer and the adapter. I'm super satisfied. It warms up quickly, is easy to clean and doesn't take up as much space in my bag as if I were to take a thermos bottle with me. I would buy it at any time. You can definitely warm up to 5 meals and it can be charged at any time via USB.

The blimbini® Pro is super practical for on the go. It warms the bottle reliably and is easy to use. It is a great help, especially when traveling or in the car. However, the battery could last a little longer, especially with several uses in a row. Nevertheless, a useful gadget for parents who are on the go a lot!

I've been using this bottle warmer for a few months, you have to heat the bottle several times before you have the right temperature, I don't know if all bottle warmers are the same, but it's not very practical, to heat in the car, it's another story, around 20 minutes of waiting to heat a bottle. Not great

Apart from the design which is rather nice, this bottle warmer does not fulfill this function, does not heat the bottles you have to add much more water than what is indicated on the backs, so the heating is really random. I regret my purchase and I don't advise! In addition, there is no beep announcing the end of the heating cable

Receipt without power cord for the car cigarette lighter. However, the description announced the warm-up time in the car. So I won't be able to test it while traveling. I use it at home, the dosage of water to be added to the bottle warmers is indicated to the nearest ml. It works quite well. The milk is warmed, warm but not hot.

Heats up in seconds. I particularly appreciate the board at the back with the necessary quantities of water according to the volume of milk to be heated + the small graduated tank that slides on the side of the bottle warmer so impossible to lose. However, the graduations deserve to be more visible. Easy tank cleaning.

Follow the water indications for the quantity and for milk coming out of the fridge. The breast milk was still cold in the Mam bottle. I recommend adding more water and creating your own dosing chart. Otherwise I leave the milk in the containers of the breast pumpHowever the objective of heating the milk rather quickly is validated
Excellent bottle warmer, fast, effective and easy to use, and it can also be used afterwards to heat small jars.

The bib warmer is goodIt does its job without frillsAesthetically, it goes well with the other elements of my KitchenI just criticize the fact that you have to clean the bottom regularlyThe price is right and the reception perfect and fast when you are a VIP in Amazon PREMIUM modeI recommend this product to all moms 😊🍼

Nice little design level but that's all: Ineffective to properly heat the bottle you have to restart 3 times in a row at least to have a correct temperature for baby in the meantime and well you have to manage the crying. So in practice we are going to abandon it... There are other options than the bottle, but it's off to a bad start...

For the moment heated the bottle, Not very practical, it all depends on the quantity of the bottle and whether it is small or large, you should always add or remove the water from the bottle warmer. Because either it overflows or there is a lack of it.  I don't like the use.

I was thrilled, if you have twins and can't breastfeed, this bottle warmer is just right. You always have hot water immediately available.As soon as the little ones are hungry, just add powdered milk and that's it. Don't boil water, let it cool down, that would take forever. I take purchased water, or boil tea and prepare it so that I reach my 40 crad. I, for example, only heat up the water, and as soon as the little ones are hungry, add milk powder and that's it. So everything always stays fresh. And the STERILIZER is great. But of course it's nothing for on the goI can't say anything about warming up baby food yet, because my twins are not ready yet. But I think that shouldn't be a problem eitherI am personally satisfied and I can recommend this bottle warmer.

We are more than satisfied and the device makes our lives much easier! Especially at night. We mainly use the keep warm function to keep the water for the nightly bottle at temperature. This is how it works quickly at night... simply add milk powder (which we have ready in portions), stir or shake, done.

An absolute all-rounder! Heats bottles quickly. Temperature can be maintained for 24 hours. And that for two bottles at the same time. The sterilization mode is also great. Clean bottles in no time at all.Saves a lot of time.Prepare water, and let it heat up in 24h mode. If necessary, only add powder - done! Top product!

We don't want to use the microwave because of the waves, this bottle warmer is very good, plus the cigar lighter socket allows you to use it everywhere. A little longer than in the microwave of course and you have to adapt the time, plastic bottles take longer to put on than glass but once you find it, it's perfect.

Buying as a replacement for a previous one that gave up the ghost, this bottle warmer does the job well because it heats up quickly on the other hand it is quite dangerous because there are splashes of boiling water. In addition, there is no button to stop the heating so you always have to keep an eye on it and it could cause a lot of damage if you forget.

Received on December 9th, we use it every day. Perfect for the beach and nights because we are upstairs, it avoids going down to bottle-feed. Essential purchase for parents. Pros: fast heating, with audible indication, fully removable and very hygienic glass container, battery indicator, keeps warm. Areas for improvement: Digital part lock function, especially for carrying in the beach bag. Can't wait for them to develop the nomadic pot warmer. To be seen over time if the device can withstand the humidity of the tropical climate.

This sterilizer remains a safe bet. Easy to use, it is efficient and of good design. Of course, we have a serious brand behind it. Nevertheless, it is still a little too expensive in my opinion given the competition that exists on this kind of equipment. It is still enough for a day in terms of capacity.

Great portable bottle warmer on battery. Suitable for water or milk. No more having to look for where to heat water or milk when we travel. Super easy cleaning. Several heating cycles possible with a battery charge. Super practical and safe glass container for liquids. We recommend it!

The 3-in-1 model on mains socket is a mess. The heating time is super long, no sound signal when the bottle is hot, so in the evening you stay in front of it for 15 minutes, or you do something else and when you come back the bottle is 50°c despite having chosen the special bottle setting. I plan to buy another one
Do the job! Obviously, it goes without saying that the latter works only and perfectly with Philips bottles

The touch screen is great and above all practical for programming the temperature for the bottle or for other functions... it is evolving. and fast too. All you have to do is pour water and adjust the device. The gold finishes I love placed on my worktop are chic I think!! There are 5 modes, the bain-marie, the fast steam mode, which I use the + often... Defrosting, pot warmer, fast mode and sterilization... Easy to use +++ I recommend
Product does not heat bottles sufficiently. You have to put it back on 2/3 times for it to heat up and again... Not great for Philips.

Update after new delivery: too bad that the color delivered for the new devices is different from what is presented on the website (gray instead of yellow) / Use as a massage oil heater. In the lowest bottle warmer position, it's just perfect. Pretty and sober on top of that, which doesn't spoil anything.

The device has been in continuous use since we have had it, it keeps the water warm, so that we quickly have something to eat for our child. The device goes off automatically after 24 hours, which we sometimes overlook and then stand there with cold water. Here I would have liked a short beep that would draw our attention to it.

We are just thrilled with the device. It heats up water within a few minutes, so you don't have to wait for a long time or carry heavy weight to mix cold and warm water. We previously had another mobile warmer that warmed the bottles from the outside. This had to make way for the Blimbini.

Bottle warmer that was offered to me for the birth of my little one, it unfortunately worked for 2 weeks and now there is a problem, I have to put the bottle on at least 4-5 minutes so that it deigns to warm my bottle enough. This is really very annoying, I would like to be able to have a contact with the seller. Thank you

We are super satisfied and it makes our lives easier! However, we only use the keep warm function, because the part is too small to sterilize the bottles and takes too long. But it's great for keeping the bottles with the boiled water warm - during the day in the kitchen and at night at the bedside table. It's also not loud and therefore doesn't bother you in the bedroom. The display lights up a bit, but that's ok. But not unimportant: The temperature specifications don't fit at all, we set it to 46, for example, so that the drinking temperature fits - but that doesn't matter in the end, you find out quickly anyway. And the negative comments, because the device switches off after 24 hours: Then you set an alarm clock and unplug it for 10 seconds and the problem is solved.
Excellent productHeats up quicklyKeep warm functionTemperature Adapted according to the level of the bottleDoes not take up space.

It is a very good product. You have to be aware that it is not for on the go. It fits 4 bottles, even from other brands, if the height is right. Likewise, 4 caps + teat fit in. There are recesses for this. The handling is super easy. It just needs a little more storage space.

I absolutely love this bottle warmer! As a mother of a small baby, it is particularly important to me to be able to bring milk or tea to the right temperature quickly and reliably on the go - and that's exactly what the comfyer baby Bottle Warmer does perfectly. The operation is super simple and intuitive, the display is easy to read, and the device also looks really stylish. I find it particularly practical that you can easily take it with you - ideal for walks, excursions or even nightly feedings in the bedroom. The temperature can be set precisely, and the milk is ready to drink in a short time. I really wonder how I managed without this part before! Clear purchase recommendation for all parents who want to make their lives a little easier.

The bottle warmer from Grundig is really great, you can keep the bottles warm, so you only need to take out a bottle at a perfect temperature, put in the milk powder and it's ready to be fed. Especially at night absolutely practical. The sterilization function is also very practical

I took this bottle warmer because I have MAM bottles that are large and this bottle warmer fits perfectly. It is good, convenient and fast. The only downside is the washing, there is a kind of mini plastic grid between the bottle and the hot plate and to clean between it's not practical. Otherwise everything is perfect

In itself a top warmer that requires little power and is easily adjustable. There is a star deduction because the lid is too low, not all bottles can be put in like this. The Philips Advent fakes fit perfectly but unfortunately not from Nuk in some cases. Then the lid has to be removed. Therefore, only 4 stars.

The bottle warmer is ideal for those who are on the road with their baby and still want to prepare a warm meal. The whole thing is a very well thought-out system, absolutely tight and has an internal battery that can be charged via an included USB C cable or via the included power supply with a small power cable.
For setting, there is a mode for hot water or for warm milk. After switching on, the whole thing happens in a relatively short time, so a maximum of 5-6 minutes are needed to heat cold water to about 40°.
The whole thing can still be charged quickly, and so the whole thing is ready for use again for a maximum of 2 hours. The battery lasts for several hours.
With a capacity of 500 ml, the device is more than enough for the short tour on the go.

Looks great. Super processed. Perfectly packaged. BUT, the most important thing is the functionality. Unfortunately, I would have to realize that the warm-up time is very long. For 125ml about 6 minutes, for 400ml it is even a whopping 14 minutes. Unfortunately, this is not possible at all and the product goes back. Unfortunately!

1 month and a half after daily use of the bottle: no longer heats up despite the temperature indication, and the battery no longer holds a charge (heats 2 bottles and more battery). Reactive after-sales service (refund). On the other hand, I was clearly told that it was not made for daily use! At this price, it's scandalous.

Works very well, but after 5 months of use the digital screen has had some small weaknesses in reading without preventing its use thanks to the beeping sound. After sharing the problem on their website, I was offered a replacement which I received within 3 days. I recommend this product without hesitation!

I took them to heat bottles, the only problem is that it takes a lot of time! Easy 7 to 8 minutes for a hot bottle! Frankly, no interest because when baby wants to eat, he doesn't wait for the bottle in the evening or at night. OnlyUsefulness: keep a bottle warm for quick heating to forget
Hello,The sterilizer no longer works after 1 month and a half of use. This item is under warranty and I would like to return it. Please inform me about the return procedures. Sincerely, Mrs. Salmeri

Practical because of its versatility (potty / bottle warmer). But the heating is quite long. Useful for keeping warm. Do not hesitate to check the temperature with a probe thermometer, especially in the early stages to get a real idea of the temperature. Pretty intuitive interface. Slightly high price: 40 €

This bottle warmer meets all my expectations! It is easy to use, but has all the necessary features. I particularly like the fact that the last setting is saved, but also the keep warm function. In terms of safety, it's great, it turns off as soon as there is no more water.

When you have an infant at home, the first fear is infections. The bottle is the object most used by parents and de facto the most sensitive to bacteriaWith this 2-in-1 sterilizer no more worriesIn a little more than 5 minutes the bottle is healthy and dryPerfect for another use

Disappointed with this purchase: After barely 5 months of use at the rate of one heating per day, this device seems to overheat: 2 times this week that it breaks my baby's glass jar:( I don't recommend it at all

ImpeccableSo for those who read the comments I have solved the major problems on my sideFor the side it gets dirty quickly use demineralized water (5l can 1.30 in supermarkets) to put in itAnd for the water doser I use a syringe-1€ in the pharmacy that's it for me it is impeccable

Notice to future parents, I highly recommend this portable bottle warmer which is very practical when you go for a walk or even simply to use at home and be sure of the right temperature of your bottle. Very easy to use, simple small downside, the battery holds for about 4 bottles

I use this bottle warmer to heat my modeling oil. He's just perfect. It heats up quickly, it is small, sober and it keeps at a suitable temperature without risk of burning. The oil is at the perfect temperature. Delighted with my purchase, for the price, there's no point in buying an oil heater on purpose....

We use it when we go away for the weekend. Used in the car it takes a bit long to heat, well 1/4 of an hour, but it's occasional and it helps out well. The quantities of water to be put to heat the bottle are not always reliable, I often put a little more. Happy with my purchase despite everything.

I bought this bottle warmer for my little girl because it's very practical when you go somewhere to heat it up in the car. In addition, my daughter already has one from the same Tigex brand at home and she is very satisfied with it. I therefore recommend this product which also heats small pots.
Good investment for me, I find that the heating is fast when baby is in a hurry to eat, the problem is the limescale which tends to settle after several uses.

One star for the fact that the delivery was on time, otherwise we had to find out today that the keep warm function does not work for an hour and the heating function has completely given up the service, and that two days after the expiration of the return period, very annoying with the high price

So I'm really excited. However, it takes a while if you have something cold in the bottle. The battery can be used for two waters, then you have to charge it again. We only use it for water and pour it into the bottle with the powder. So a kettle for on the go. Super
The best decoctioner I've ever had. Have had it for 4 months and nothing to complain about yet. Everything works like on the 1st day!

I bought this portable bottle warmer for my 2nd baby. My first one still taking bottles, I already tested it for hers. Nothing to say to the models! If only I could have had this for my 1st ... so much stress for the outings to know if I could heat his bottle, calculate the hours etc so we sometimes "deprived" ourselves of going out ... With this bottle warmer, no more stress! It heats up perfectly well, I'm impressed by that by the way. Warm-up time respected and rather fast! About 5 minutes for 150 ml at 50°C.  Indeed it largely holds the 7 heaters but obviously between 37 and 40°C, if you heat beyond that count rather 5 heaters of bib which is not negligible for this type of product! Be careful, however, of the strong smell of plastic that is released when unpacking the product! It took me several cleanings before it went away and the taste of the water was not altered... ultra quiet it makes no noise when heating, the only noise is the beep at the end of the heating time. Keeps you very warm and indicates what temperature the liquid is at in real time, so super convenient. The fact that you can see the battery percentage in one click is a plus. In terms of robustness like that, nothing to say I think it will last over time (it's just a little heavy but it's not annoying), I would just say that the cover (part grey/blue) at the spring level I'm afraid it won't hold because it seems weak to me but otherwise perfect. I also love the fact that it's fully removable for cleaning! I am completely satisfied and I recommend it 100%

So in itself a great device. The operation is also very easy once you have it figured out. Only the temperature doesn't always really work. Warming up sometimes takes a really long time. That's why we always leave it constantly warm now, otherwise it just takes too long for the little one. In itself just ok.
If the 1st uses are rather convincing (even if not sure that we reach the nun's temperature), the heating is almost non-existent even with a fully charged battery for a few days.
The product received is not waterproof: water seeps into the heater/battery pack.
I was disappointed by something, they solved the problem effectively, so I can't complain.

We use the device especially when we are on the go. On the other hand, the battery and the size are great. The battery only lasts for a few times, so you always have to keep an eye on charging the device. The rubber could be better, because milk leaks every now and then, which is not great.

I received the product today and what can I say, it does exactly what it is supposed to do. The milk is heated to the ideal temperature (just the way you want it). The operation is relatively simple and the product also makes a high-quality impression. I am very satisfied with the product!

Heating time too long. Baby starts screaming.  2m30 or even 3 min almost. And bottle too hot outside and sometimes not inside enough. Bottle from the brand MAM. I keep it from ribbing but unfortunately I don't use it... For now. Maybe for the little jars later...

As a childminder, I bought this bottle warmer for the children in childcare. It is very fast, which is a plus when a baby is hungry right away. Small downside, for my use, you have to wait a few minutes for the bottle warmer to cool down before you can heat a second bottle.

In principle, it's really good, but it's so big that it didn't fit into our standard microwave, so 1 star deduction. I sent it back and bought a sterilizer with a drying function, which was better for us. But the price-performance ratio is right here

To the product itself, it does exactly what it is supposed to. And is extremely easy to use. But the part is huge. Our microwave is already big but with the turntable inserted you can't get it in at all, from the height. Without just like that. Too big in our eyes.

I use happens every day, easy to handle, convenient, takes up little space at home, but a lot in the diaper bag, I think that some model without a grip are more convenient when traveling. The pod graduation should be darker. But it's a very good product

The product is good at the level of heating the water, take your time but it's okay. But at the battery level, I don't like, 30/40% on each bottle (and I don't fill it completely). And water runs sideways when I fill the bottle, normally this shouldn't happen.

I was pleasantly surprised by this bottle warmer. Heat very quickly with steam in the "Fast" mode, in 2.5min the bottle is ready coming from the fridge. The 24h function heats "in a bain-marie" very good to always have the milk ready. Overall very happy, I recommend it.

I bought this object because it combined an electrical outlet and a cigarette lighter socket and it was the cheapest... This bottle warmer has nothing to be ashamed of the others, it is easy to use, in addition there is an explanatory leaflet but it is useless since if I follow it to the letter my bottle is not hot!! Note that it is impossible to start a second heating cycle... It's like everything, you have to get the hang of it, and adapt to your own bottle and your needs. Then it will come in handy! It is compact, discreet, easy to clean and above all it stops on its own. Up to 30 € this item remains at a good value for money.

This box contains a sterilizer and a pair of pliers to take the bottles. It is very efficient because it not only sterilizes but also dries or even stores the bottles for 24 hours ensuring perfect sterilization. It is designed to receive 5 Avent brand bottles but can also receive the others. You can also sterilize teats and pacifiers. Note that you cannot sterilize a container with liquid (teething ring for example). The sterilization time is about 40 minutes and cleaning all parts is simple. It is easy to store in the kitchen because it is not heavy to maneuver. I recommend this purchase. I hope I have been able to guide you as well as possible.

Very well! The nuk quality is there. On the other hand, the plate would tend to turn brown quite quickly because of the limescale. Descale it every week to prevent it from being damaged too quickly... but I think that's the problem with all bottle warmers... otherwise very good product!
Excellent. Very practical because there is little water. There is no risk of it spilling. Heats the bottle very quickly.

Bottle warmer and very easy to use but very useful. It heats up quickly without the risk of burning yourself or baby, just press the button and go. It is beautiful and small in size, the price is a bit expensive but it is a quality product.

Practical if you want to sterilize several bottles, pacifiers, spoons, cups, etc. at the same time. Fortunately, the sterilizer just fits in the microwave. If you have smaller devices, it can get tight really quickly. All in all, a great everyday helper.

Very happy with this purchase, for the moment I use it on a daily basis, it is very practical, I hold the charge well. There is enough to make 8 bottles! Very easy to use. To see over time if the product is resistant but for the moment I am 100% satisfied

Very easy to use, very good product. Small downside on the heat which is not always right, sometimes the bottle comes out really too hot but it depends on the dose of water in the bottle so you have to know how to gauge the heating time yourself. But very good product!

Very disappointed with the product, the pod is illegible and impossible to make it work properly, the water is boiling even if I reduce by 3 times the amount of water that is normally indicated. I don't recommend at all unless I stumbled upon a defective product.

Uncomplicated operation and fast heating of the milk. We can definitely recommend the product. The battery also lasts a long time and is quickly recharged. The warmer is small, handy and ideal for on the go. The customer service is also great!

A very good sterilizer that does the job well. 10 min is very fast and honestly yes it sterilizes and "washes" perfectly. The only "big" problem is that it's soaked, it doesn't dry out afterwards and it doesn't drip either so I spend a lot of time drying everything every time and I'm afraid that suddenly sterilization is useless since you have to use a cloth or paper towel to dry everything and then a lot of water stagnates in the device so from time to time you have to dry everything inside as well of the device. In short, not very practical in the end and does not necessarily save time compared to washing with soap or sterilizing in a pot of boiling water.

Digital bottle warmer, very practical for programming the different functions and seeing how much time is left to heat. I recommend it.
I didn't appreciate the fact that the bottle warmer was shipped in its original packaging, without another box to protect it.

Hyper practical and functional bottle warmer. I've been using it for 1 year and it heats bottles very well. It was very practical from the beginning when we had to get up at night several times a night. Easy to get started. You just have to read the instructions carefully at the beginning.

The device has always worked like this. Battery performance left a lot to be desired and the time to heat up. Also, the water does not stay warm for long, as promised. Suddenly after 1.5 months and punctually after the return process, nothing works anymore. Conclusion: too expensive and no good

So my bottles (only 60 ml) it doesn't keep warm. No idea what I'm doing wrong. Sterilizing works but the rest? Goes back. … [eos]( sollte für die Welpen sein , dass ich den Rest in der Zeit während ich füttere stehen lassen kann ) aber es geht nicht .. ( should be for the puppies that I can leave the rest in the time while I feed ) but it doesn't work .. Too bad

The product works perfectly with Avent products. The bottle seems very hot when it comes out but homogenizing the temperature is ideal. Having had to change bottles along the way, the bottle warmer does not work with MAM anti-colic bottles

After 6 months of use I can see that it heats up randomlyWhat only certain mode heats up ... and still not all the time ... That the container must be specially adapted9 otherwise it doesn't heat up.... MAM bottles, for example, are not suitable at all

The bottle warmer is perfect. We have the device on the mains 24 hours a day and are ready at any time. The temperature can be optimally regulated. Previously had the bottle warmer from Philips Avent, which was an absolute zero number. Grundig has thought of everything here.

Multi function bottle warmerHeats milk, sterilizes bottles and warms foodVery easy to use with its bright and very readable screen Suitable for many models of bottlesButtons are pressurizedTimer and desired temperature control
I needed a bottle warmer for car with my twins, frankly at least 20min to heat a bottle a horror I plan to return it it doesn't suit me at all

As fast on the mains as on a cigarette lighter. A little longer for a small potty but logical. Plays its role perfectly. I'm just worried because the baby food jars in the stores are now changing, are made of plastic and no longer have the right shapes for the product...

Blimbini has become indispensable for me... A real relief with every bottle! Easy to use, pretty design and an insanely great customer service! Even if a lot is recommended to you about the baby, Blimbini is a really sensible purchase.

Super efficient and water saving! I would buy this part again ALWAYS! I hated rinsing bottles and parts of my pump were complicated to clean. It's quiet, it sterilizes and dries, so you save space to no end! It cleans everything without leaving any residue!

Very disappointed by this bottle warmer which does not perform its functions at all...- the defrost function does not work at all..  The milk is still partly frozen at the end of the 30-minute program... - to heat breast milk from the fridge, again it's mission impossible. the milk is either too hot (44 degrees again this morning !!) or too cold depending on the type of bottle used (MAM glass or anti-colic bottle). This is just a kettle with a timer. At the bottom 40ml of water go in and then you put the bottle on it. The water is brought to a boil. Accordingly, the bottle is boiling hot on the outside after heating. And the heating time can then be read from a table (depending on the amount and whether the milk is at room temperature or comes from the refrigerator). This is super inaccurate and uncomfortable - I can simply pour hot water over the bottle and test the milk temperature in between, because you have to do that with this device.
